episodes.overview: Cindy is quizzed by Ethan about the stolen bank notes. Ethan warns Mitzeee to be wary of the people she hangs around with. Mitzeee ends up being taken into police custody. Mercedes and Riley attempt to make a decision about their future.

episodes.name: July 6, 2011
episodes.overview: Mitzeee becomes anxious when Ethan questions her at the police station. Mitzeee is told she will be released if she tells them the truth about the money.Chez Chez is searched by the police for the stolen money. Carmel finds it hard to fight temptation.

episodes.overview: Brendan insists that he doesn't know where his money is when Warren questions him. Rhys talks to Cheryl about his marriage and Jacqui is annoyed. Carmel's faith is tested by Cindy after she tells her she has to massage Father Francis.

episodes.overview: Warren finds it hard to keep Mitzeee under control who is standing by the fire with the money. Jacqui ends up asking Carl for a job. Carmel is left feeling red-faced over giving Father Francis a massage.

episodes.overview: Jacqui remains determined to turn her life around as she starts working at the Dog. Rhys is concerned though that she is not coping well and thinks she should get some professional help. Amy is charged with assault and Lee ends up making matters worse.

episodes.name: July 13, 2011
episodes.overview: Liberty is happy after she manages to secure a high profile concert on the beach. Theresa is invited to go with her. Ethan is scared what they might talk about and decides to along with them. Amy is upset after Lee takes sided with Leanne.

episodes.overview: Liberty's performance at the beach concert is a massive success despite her nerves. The celebrations finish early though after Theresa gets a call to say that Jacqui has disappeared. Lee attempts to win Amy back.

episodes.overview: The search for Jacqui continues and Rhys ends up blaming himself. The McQueen family attempt unsuccessfully to reassure him. After both Liberty and Theresa decide they've had enough secrecy and it's time to go public about their relationships with Ethan.

episodes.overview: Ethan finds his love life becoming much more complicated after both his girlfriends want to see him on his birthday for dinner. After Theresa runs into Liberty only Doug can help Ethan. After Darren buys her a waterbed Nancy is impressed.

episodes.overview: Theresa ends up talking to Liberty after she starts to worry her secret boyfriend does not share her affections. Ethan ends up sending a text message to the wrong girl. Darren ends up proposing a dramatic solution to his and Nancy's money problems.

episodes.overview: Theresa finally confesses to Liberty that her secret boyfriend is Ethan and she learns that Ethan's been seeing Liberty as well. They decide that they need to confront the other girl who Ethan's been seeing as well. Will is able to get Diane to agree.

episodes.overview: Bart and Sinead attempt to avoid Diane by going to the prom and they end up making a life-changing decision. After Nancy moves into the Osborne house thing start badly. Ethan is about to finally get his comeuppance.

episodes.overview: Bart and Sinead end up running away together and stay at a seaside B&B. Ethan's desperate efforts to salvage relationships with each of his three girlfriends are stopped by Will. Nancy finds it hard adjusting to life at the Osbornes'.

episodes.overview: Noah ends up leaving for Newcastle on his own leaving Ste to make a choice about Brendan. Sinead decides to return home but with Diane closing in Sinead could be forced to choose between Bart and her family.

episodes.overview: Brendan ends up getting a shock after his ex-wife Eileen shows up. Darren attempts to play peace-maker between Nancy and Frankie. Tensions increase between Bart and Sinead after they spend the night sleeping rough.

episodes.overview: Brendan finds it hard to keep the truth about his sexuality a secret after his son Declan arrives to stay with him. Darren's romantic plans are ruined after Nancy receives a call about her dream job.

episodes.overview: Lee and Dodger vie to try and help Amy prepare for her interview Darren is angry with Ruby for ruining Nancy's job chances. Silas ends up recruiting Nancy to help him get insider information from Ethan.

episodes.overview: Lynsey becomes suspicious after she finds out about Silas's involvement in the press conference and she attempts to talk to Cheryl. Mercedes and Riley have a scan perfomed. Amy is shocked after she wakes up and is forced to face the consequences.

episodes.overview: Texas finds it hard to cope as she gets ready for the reconstruction of India's final steps. Lynsey ends up panicking after she realises Texas has gone missing attempts to find her. Carmel's baby shower doesn't go as planned. Jason is missing Bart.

episodes.overview: Lynsey wants to make sure that Silas is punished for his crimes and she ends up taking matters into her own hands. Seth is happy after he manages to find a date for Riley's wedding.

episodes.name: August 12, 2011
episodes.overview: Lynsey could end up regretting attempting to play Silas at his own game. Carmel makes up with Mercedes. Bart and Sinead find themselves without any money as things get tougher.

episodes.overview: The prospect of living on the streets ends up becoming even more unthinkable for Sinead after Jason shows up. She asttempts to get him to leave so that she can keep Bart to herself. Lynsey finds herself being forced to help Silas after his health gets worse.

episodes.overview: Bart is unhappy with Sinead after he learns that she has been trying to get Jason to leave. After she hurts herself while fleeing from the police his attitude softens though. Cheryl attempts to distract Lynsey from thinking about Silas.

episodes.overview: The resentment Sinead feels towards Jason increases as she begins to feel like a third wheel. After finding an empty farmhouse the three of them look for food, but as the tension increases Sinead and Jason they argue and Sinead ends up running away.

episodes.overview: Jason and Bart end up being locked in the farmhouse cellar. Bart's put in mortal danger as they try to escape. Jason ends up admitting his true feelings to Bart. Liberty and Theresa end up being surprised after they open their exam results.

episodes.overview: Sinead is the only person who can save Jason and Bart. Brendan decides to deny his sexuality. Carmel attempts to help Theresa prepare for her date with Will.

episodes.name: August 22, 2011
episodes.overview: After Tony returns home from his travels with a new laid-back attitude, Cindy is surprised. Brendan ups his his plan to make Lynsey a surrogate mother for Declan. Bart tells Sinead that he loves her but she has a bad reaction.

episodes.overview: Lynsey attempts to sort out the problems she has with Brendan following the events of the previous night. Silas's meddling ends up seeing her becoming even more isolated. Carmel attempts to cheer up Bart. Mandy is worried about Tony's new outlook on life.

episodes.name: August 24, 2011
episodes.overview: The truth about Amy's night of passion with Dodger comes out. Lynsey sets a trap to prove to Silas is sneaking into the flat and Brendan thinks she's going mad. Lynsey ends up deciding to leave town and Brendan begins to wonder if she was right.

episodes.overview: Ruby and Esther throw a party to try and impress the older teens on GCSE results day. Carmel turns to Darren for help with her new charity calendar.

episodes.overview: Lee's fire-walking event approaches and he prepares to try and win Amy back with a romantic gesture. Jacqui works out that Carmel has a crush on Father Francis. Tony receives an ultimatum from Mandy.

episodes.overview: Carmel feels embarrassed after Father Francis is forced to model on the day of the charity calendar shoot. Tony attempts to calm down Tom's nerves about starting secondary school. Ste feels unwanted after Lee moves in with him and Amy.

episodes.overview: Carmel is left feeling surprised after Father Francis reveals he has began to fall in love with her. Tom manages to demonstrate his skill as a matchmaker between Mandy and Tony. Ruby's amorous advances leave Pete feeling unnerved.

episodes.overview: Cindy is furious after she finally realises that Mandy and Texas have been ripping her off and she threatens to report them to the police. Cindy ends up leaning on Francis and surprises him when she kisses him.

episodes.overview: Carmel is upset after she finds out that Francis is returning to Uganda. Jason is upset after Bart attempts to try and win Sinead back. Mandy shares her concerns with Tony that she's going to prison.

episodes.name: September 2, 2011
episodes.overview: Bart is upset after Jason insists that they're no longer friends. Sinead is scared about starting sixth form college. Cindy persuades Carmel to follow her heart as Francis makes plans to leave.

episodes.name: September 5, 2011
episodes.overview: Bart decides to host an end-of-summer party before the new term at sixth-form begins but things end up taking a turn for the worse when another couple are caught up in his ongoing feud with Sinead.

episodes.overview: Sinead finds her first day at college difficult after her antics at the party. She does manage to impress Maddie though who is interested in learning more about Bart and Jason's complicated past.

episodes.name: September 7, 2011
episodes.overview: Jason and Bart are both left shocked after their complex history is spread around the college by Maddie. Bart is furious with Sinead for telling Maddie in the first place. Lynsey is worried that Silas is plotting his next murderous move.

episodes.name: September 8, 2011
episodes.overview: Sinead and Bart end up finding themselves drawn to one another despite their argument. Silas is warned by Brendan to stay away from Lynsey.

episodes.name: September 9, 2011
episodes.overview: Rae ends up having to deal with Brendan's fury after she pushes him a little too far. Bart isn't happy when he sees Gaz with Sinead. Jamil manages to sort things out with his mates comes to a huge decision about his future.

episodes.name: September 12, 2011
episodes.overview: Lynsey ends up being intrigued after Texas keeps getting messages from a girl from the chat room India used. Lynsey thinks they are from Silas and steals the details and arranges a meeting in the woods. Nancy ends up agreeing to go with her.

episodes.name: September 13, 2011
episodes.overview: Brendan is frantic after finding out that Lynsey is missing. After he receives a note from 'Lynsey', left on his windscreen, he goes to the woods to get her. Jacqui ends up making a hash of Rhys's birthday. Tilly ends up proving to be a real friend.

episodes.name: September 14, 2011
episodes.overview: Nancy ends up being too busy to spend any time with Darren.

episodes.name: September 15, 2011
episodes.overview: Esther tries to help Darren impress Nancy but Darren ends up feeling crushed after it fails. Rhys and Jacqui decide to try and spend some quality time alone together.

episodes.name: September 16, 2011
episodes.overview: Jack is worried about Darren. Liberty and Dodger offer Will advise about his love life.

episodes.name: September 19, 2011
episodes.overview: Nancy's efforts to sort her relationship with Darren end up making matters worse. Bart is frustrated as Maddie continues to encourage Gaz and Sinead's romance. Tony finds his job as the Dog's new chef uninspiring.

episodes.name: September 20, 2011
episodes.overview: Maddie encourages Sinead to take her relationship with Gaz to the next level, and makes sure Bart knows just how well the pair are getting along. Meanwhile, Jacqui's efforts to help a despairing Lynsey make Rhys proud, and Tony is devastated when Mandy decides to leave him.

episodes.name: September 21, 2011
episodes.overview: Bart plants stolen goods in Gaz's car in a desperate bid to make sure Sinead understands her new boyfriend has a dark side. Meanwhile, a cheerful Jacqui spends the day preparing a romantic meal for Rhys, as Darren worries he cannot match Nancy's career success. And Tony struggles at work as he tries to get in touch with Mandy.

episodes.name: September 22, 2011
episodes.overview: Rhys and Jacqui's relationship appears to be going from strength to strength, but the return of a familiar face places their happiness in jeopardy. Elsewhere, Darren is thrilled when he realises Nancy is proud of him while, a hung-over Tony finds out he quit his job. And Bart discovers his plan to frame Gaz has worked, but is shocked to hear Sinead was arrested too.

episodes.name: September 23, 2011
episodes.overview: Jacqui seems to be taking news of Gilly's return well, until an outburst during a counselling session reveals the extent of her anxiety. Meanwhile, Bart ruins his chances with Sinead when she discovers he was the reason she got arrested. Dodger gets a job as the manager of the SU Bar, and Carmel causes 'Father' Francis to suffer a crisis of conscience.

episodes.name: September 26, 2011
episodes.overview: A nervous Will prepares for student life as Freshers' Week arrives in Hollyoaks, and newcomer Ash grabs attention with a cheeky stunt at the SU Bar. Meanwhile, Rhys resigns when Cheryl gives Gilly a job at Chez Chez. And Carmel considers taking drastic action as Francis gets ready to move to Africa.

episodes.name: September 27, 2011
episodes.overview: Myra and the McQueens confront Gilly following his return to the village, much to Jacqui's horror meanwhile, Francis is stunned when Carmel reveals she wants to accompany him to Africa. Elsewhere, hung-over newcomer Ash faces the consequences of her wild actions the previous night, but finds a friend in the form of Will.

episodes.name: September 28, 2011
episodes.overview: The new HCC students bond and get to know each other over drinks. As Jacqui's relationship with Rhys reaches crisis point over Gilly, and she moves back in with the McQueens. Meanwhile the Osbornes face trouble when Tom is bullied at school for his association with a supposed rapist. And Carmel wonders whether she will be able to resist Father Francis on the trip to Africa.

episodes.name: September 29, 2011
episodes.overview: A spot of soul-searching prompts Carmel to finally gives in to her desires, and Cindy pledges a large sum to Father Francis's cause, but Tony grows suspicious of the priest's intentions. Meanwhile, Gilly finds a new home with Cheryl, and Jacqui is devastated when Rhys tells her he needs some space.

episodes.name: September 30, 2011
episodes.overview: Father Francis attempts to go straight and ends up finding himself compromised between Carmel and Cindy. Neil and Jono are surprised to find out that the flasher student is Callum's big sister.

episodes.name: October 3, 2011
episodes.overview: Father Francis is honest with Carmel about his indiscretions with Cindy. Warren is worried that Seth could be about to ruin his chance to take part in a spot of blackmail. Carl will not allow a frustrated Jason take hormone blockers.

episodes.name: October 4, 2011
episodes.overview: Carmel ends up deciding to follow her heart and leave the village with Father Francis. Cindy attempts to ruin their plans though. Jason takes a picture of Mitzeee and Riley together in a compromising position. Ash is surprised after she finally tells...

episodes.name: October 5, 2011
episodes.overview: Jason has a brush with the law and ends up reacting by sending an incriminating picture of Mitzeee to Warren. Carmel is upset when Cindy ruins her chance of happiness with Father Francis. Will is concerned that Dodger is about to invade his new life.

episodes.name: October 6, 2011
episodes.overview: Mitzeee manages to protect Riley by convincing Warren that nothing happened between them. Jason is pleased when Carl agrees to let him use the hormone blockers. Dodger's antics frustrate Will.

episodes.name: October 7, 2011
episodes.overview: Mitzeee ends up having a crisis of conscience about attempting to destroy the Costellos. Jason ends up taking matters into his own hands after Carl goes back on his promise. Scott, Barney and Rob attempt to work out how to use a washing machine.

episodes.name: October 10, 2011
episodes.overview: Mitzeee is no longer welcome at the Costello wedding. She decides to try and get revenge by revealing what she knows about the affair between Carl and Mercedes in her book. Jason manages to get his hands on the hormone blockers.

episodes.name: October 11, 2011
episodes.overview: Warren is pleased after he learns that Mitzeee has included everything she knows about Carl and Mercedes' affair in her book. Rhys looks his job at Chez Chez for publicly saying that Gilly is a rapist. Duncan attempts to impress Kelly.

episodes.name: October 12, 2011
episodes.overview: Doug is told to say nothing about Mercedes and Carl's affair ahead of the wedding. He ends up asking Seth to tell his brother the truth. Jacqui and Rhys' rift widens after Gilly becomes the victim of a vicious hate campaign.

episodes.name: October 13, 2011
episodes.overview: Warren wantss £50,000 from Carl to keep quiet about what he knows about the affair. Seth is pressured by Doug to tell Riley the truth but he wants Warren to blackmail Carl to teach his father a lesson. Jacqui is shocked to find out that Rhys isn't being honest.

episodes.name: October 14, 2011
episodes.overview: The wedding is just a day away and Mercedes is surprised after Riley gives her their dream house. He bubble is soon burst though when she needs to get £20,000 to help pay Warren. Rhys and Jacqui discover a way to talk.

episodes.name: October 17, 2011
episodes.overview: The wedding day finally arrives and Riley remains unaware about Mercedes' big secret. Jacqui attempts to persuade her sister to be honest before getting married. Doug decides to ignore Warren's threats and goes to the ceremony.

episodes.name: October 18, 2011
episodes.overview: The events which happened at Mercedes and Riley's wedding leaves some of the guests feeling guilty. Warren makes plans to try gain ownership of Chez Chez.

episodes.name: October 19, 2011
episodes.overview: Amy makes up her mind about moving to New York with Lee, and has to break the news to Ste about her decision. Silas decides to teach someone a lesson. Warren puts more pressure on Brendan after he refuses to sell his share of Chez Chez.

episodes.name: October 20, 2011
episodes.overview: Ash ends up enjoying a 'quickie' with an unlikely person. Maddie takes Bart for a night out to in an effort to cheer him up. Amy attempts to find the courage to tell Ste she's taking the kids to New York, but Ste refuses to let them go.

episodes.name: October 21, 2011
episodes.overview: Silas warns Lynsey that he's planning something very dark for Halloween. Mercedes receives some shocking news. Ste ends up agreeing to allow Amy take the kids to New York, but after Lee sees how crushed Ste is, he wonders if he can really go through with it.

episodes.name: October 24, 2011
episodes.overview: Lynsey is set by Silas a terrifying challenge which sees her being forced to identify his next intended victim before midnight on Halloween. If she succeeds, he claims he will hand himself over to the police, but if she fails another girl will lose her life.

episodes.name: October 25, 2011
episodes.overview: Mercedes remains captive up in Silas's vault. Lynsey tells Doug about the deadly game she is being made to play. Theresa and Will finsd it hard to enjoy a romantic evening alone. Amy attempts to deal with the fact that Lee has given up on his dream.

episodes.name: October 26, 2011
episodes.overview: Lynsey is concerned that Theresa or Texas could be Silas's next target after she receives a cryptic clue. Rob and Annalise's reconciliation once again ruins Theresa and Will's efforts to spend time alone together.

episodes.name: October 27, 2011
episodes.overview: A desperate Lynsey attempts to work out who the next victim will be before it is too late. Will and Theresa finally enjoy an evening alone together.

episodes.name: October 28, 2011
episodes.overview: Chez Chez hosts Fright Night and most of the residents of Hollyoaks have gathered to celebrate in fancy dress. Nobody believes Lynsey's claims of what's is going to happen. Texas finds out about the bet between Scott and Dodger and gets even with them.

episodes.name: October 31, 2011
episodes.overview: Fright Night continues at Chez Chez with Dodger attemting to charm Texas into returning to the party. Bart watches from the sidelines as Gaz and Sinead have fun together and becomes even more jealous. Cheryl leaves early.

episodes.name: November 1, 2011
episodes.overview: Hollyoaks' residents are shocked to find out that the serial killer has struck again. Riley starts to question his grandfather's innocence. Cheryl finds some comfort with Gilly. Silas's deadly games continue.

episodes.name: November 2, 2011
episodes.overview: The village grieves following everything that has happened but the spate of tragedies is not over for the McQueen family. Maddie ends up finding herself in a compromising position after Gaz reveals he prefers her to Sinead.

episodes.name: November 3, 2011
episodes.overview: The McQueen family are determined to see justice being done. Gilly turns to Frankie for advise about his growing relationship with Cheryl. Duncan makes plans to take his relationship with Kelly to the next stage.

episodes.name: November 4, 2011
episodes.overview: The McQueen family rally around as Silas plans his last move. Sinead has some difficult questions for Gaz.

episodes.name: November 7, 2011
episodes.overview: The sixth form students attempt to bring the village together as they pay tribute to the serial killer's latest couple of victims. Brendan is determined to get even with Warren. Bart thinks about telling Sinead how he really feels.

episodes.name: November 8, 2011
episodes.overview: Bart tries to warn Sinead to end her relationship with Gaz. Rob ends up panicking after he realises that Annalise expects him to celebrate their two-year anniversary instead of partying with Ash. Duncan enjoys his romance with Kelly.

episodes.name: November 9, 2011
episodes.overview: Sinead sees a job advert needing someone to come on tour to sell gig merchandise. Sinead want the job for her and her boyfriend. Gaz shows up to dump Sinead, but hears the man agreeing to give him the job.

episodes.name: November 10, 2011
episodes.overview: Sinead informs the sixth-formers and the she is leaving because she and Gaz are working at a gig tonight and then going on tour. Maddie has a chance to warn Sinead about Gaz but decides not to as she wants Sinead gone. Bart ends up telling Sinead.

episodes.name: November 11, 2011
episodes.overview: Bart attempts to get into the gig to find Sinead. Tilly urges Maddie to stop Sinead making a huge mistake. Gaz sees Bart and has him thrown out. Bart ends up making one last-ditch attempt to win Sinead back.

episodes.name: November 14, 2011
episodes.overview: After Ethan returns to the village, he ends up feeling more isolated than ever. As he attempts to find some reassurance it ends up leaving new guy Rob's life in jeopardy after he texts while driving.

episodes.name: November 15, 2011
episodes.overview: Ethan ends up turning to Theresa for help. A new Savage family member shows up in the form of Dodger and Will's cousin, Dennis.

episodes.name: November 16, 2011
episodes.overview: Time is starting to run out for Ethan when Theresa finally sees his true colours and refuses to keep his secret.

episodes.name: November 17, 2011
episodes.overview: Rob desperately tries to remember what happened on the night of the accident, while Dodger's womanising ways finally catch up with him.

episodes.name: November 18, 2011
episodes.overview: Annalise struggles with her feelings for Scott and the part she played in Rob's accident. Warren enjoys making Ethan squirm. Michaela's first rehearsal with the band doesn't go too well.

episodes.name: November 21, 2011
episodes.overview: A confused Gilly turns up at Rhys and Jacqui's flat. In a tense, emotional real-time episode, these three characters - bound together by events of the past - try to make sense of it all.

episodes.name: November 22, 2011
episodes.overview: Mitzeee is avoiding Warren, while sparks fly as feisty Maddie takes on enigmatic Callum for a debate at college.

episodes.name: November 23, 2011
episodes.overview: Maddie, Tilly and Sinead enjoy a great night out. Maddie attempts to make Callum jealous when she flirts with DJ Joel. The evening ends up finishing in disaster.

episodes.name: November 24, 2011
episodes.overview: An upset Maddie is rescued by Callum. The unlikely couple attempt to get beyond their spikey banter.

episodes.name: November 25, 2011
episodes.overview: Brendan is still AWOL after being let out of prison, which fuels Warren's paranoia. New boy Joel is curious to get the low-down on Warren.

episodes.name: November 28, 2011
episodes.overview: Mercedes attempts to make Riley spend time with her and the baby but things don't go to plans after he announces that he wants to know the truth with a paternity test.

episodes.name: November 29, 2011
episodes.overview: Warren finds it hard to deal with terms with Joel's presence in the village. Theresa attempts to convince him to find out exactly who Joel is.

episodes.name: November 30, 2011
episodes.overview: Joel ends up freaking out after he sees another side to Warren that he doesn't like. Warren is concerned that he may have made a costly mistake.

episodes.name: December 1, 2011
episodes.overview: Mercedes waits to discover who the father of her child is and hopes she will get the answer she is looking for.

episodes.name: December 2, 2011
episodes.overview: Mercedes has to deal with the results of the paternity test. Ash attempts to work out exactly what's going on between Scott and Annalise.

episodes.name: December 5, 2011
episodes.overview: After Brendan attempts to get his claws into Joel, Warren is furious. Sparks start to flow between Theresa and Joel.

episodes.name: December 6, 2011
episodes.overview: Ethan is pressured by Warren to give him with an alibi so that he can get rid of Brendan for good. Louis, Danny and Laurence are warned off Ruby by Jack. Ruby ends up taking a huge risk to try and win Sinead's favour.

episodes.name: December 7, 2011
episodes.overview: After Jack finds out that he's missing some money, Ruby's in trouble. Warren is confronted by Theresa about Ethan's confession.

episodes.name: December 8, 2011
episodes.overview: Callum attempts to get Maddie to learn more about him as they enjoy their proper date. Mitzeee finds out that Warren has been lying to her about Ethan. Nancy issues Mitzeee with a warning.

episodes.name: December 9, 2011
episodes.overview: Nancy is left reeling after she gets a warning visit from Brendan. Mitzeee ends up coming to the conclusion that there is no escaping Warren. Brendan ends up coming up with a shocking solution.

episodes.name: December 12, 2011
episodes.overview: Tara's return ends up causing trouble for Callum and Maddie's relationship after Tara refuses to give up on Callum. Warren's efforts to try and keep Mitzeee on side leave her feeling more scared than ever.

episodes.name: December 13, 2011
episodes.overview: Maddie ends up having a go at Callum which could see him ending up back in Tash's arms. Dennis attempts to impress Leanne, but she has her sights on somebody else.

episodes.name: December 14, 2011
episodes.overview: Maddie begins to self-destruct as she tries to get rid of her feelings for Callum. Leanne has no clue about Dennis' true feelings after she asks him to help her ensnare Matt.

episodes.name: December 15, 2011
episodes.overview: George's efforts to get Maddie and Callum back together end up failing when Maddie starts to isolate herself from the group. Ash's meddling ends up making Callum give Tara an ultimatum.

episodes.name: December 16, 2011
episodes.overview: Mitzeee returns following a trip with Warren. Leanne's efforts to try and make make Matt jealous end up leaving pleasing Dennis.

episodes.name: December 19, 2011
episodes.overview: Brendan and Mitzeee continue with their plot against Warren. Mercedes attempts to convince Seth to talk about Riley.

episodes.name: December 20, 2011
episodes.overview: Doug and new student Jodie go out on a date but sparks end up flying after she meets Dodger. Riley is surprised to learn that Mercedes has left baby Bobby at home with Bart. Joel becomes suspicious about Mitzeee after he catches her crying to Brendan.

episodes.name: December 21, 2011
episodes.overview: Brendan and Warren end up fighting when Nancy finds it hard to contain a shocking revelation. Mitzeee attempts to win Warren over. Riley and Mercedes plan a Christmas meal for Bobby.

episodes.name: December 22, 2011
episodes.overview: Mercedes finds it hard to create the perfect Christmas meal with Riley and calls for back-up from the rest of her family. Cracks begin to form in Mitzeee and Brendan's plans which end up having deadly consequences.

episodes.name: December 23, 2011
episodes.overview: Things end up coming to a dramatic conclusion on Christmas Eve when Warren takes Mitzeee to the place where he buried Louise's body. Brendan finds himself in a race against time to find them before history repeats itself.

episodes.name: December 26, 2011
episodes.overview: In a special It's A Wonderful Life homage episode, as Doug finds himself on a bridge at his lowest, and after jumping into the river he gets a visit from the much loved and missed Stephanie Del A Dean who shows him what life in the village would've been like had Doug never been there. He's then left with a choice to either join his girlfriend Bec's in heaven or to return to his life.

episodes.name: December 27, 2011
episodes.overview: Texas and Jodie deal with the fallout from the previous day's events. As Joel is left wondering if he has any place in Hollyoaks. And, Mercedes questions whether she can bring up Bobby on her own.

episodes.name: December 28, 2011
episodes.overview: The students prepare to travel to Barney's, but Theresa and Will feel further apart than ever. Meanwhile, Mercedes is gutted when Riley snubs her, but he soon regrets it when she stops him from seeing his son.

episodes.name: December 29, 2011
episodes.overview: The students are in high spirits, intending to enjoy their impressive surroundings, but an unexpected arrival threatens to spoil the party. Meanwhile, Jacqui tells Mercedes to move on and put the past behind her, leading her to do something drastic. The ongoing love-games between Jodie, Doug and Dodger continues. And the Daytona Lights set upon catching their big break when a record label label exec comes to see them perform at the SU Bar but not all goes quite to plan.

episodes.name: December 30, 2011
episodes.overview: Mercedes finally prepares to let go of Riley, but when she realises just how much this will cost her, she's not sure whether she can bring herself to go through with it.

episodes.name: January 27, 2012
episodes.overview: Mercedes starts blackmailing Dr Browning - could this be what Lynsey needs to get her old job back?

episodes.name: February 22, 2012
episodes.overview:
Mercedes is unapologetic for her actions last night, but Theresa is determined to give Mercedes another chance and suggests she could look after Kathleen Angel for a while. 

However, when Theresa returns to an empty house, she panics - where the hell is Mercedes?!

episodes.name: February 23, 2012
episodes.overview: A frustrated Mercedes tries her best to make amends, but things go from bad to worse when the McQueens end up in A&E. As Mercedes spirals further out of control, Jacqui decides that they have to do something - and soon!

episodes.name: February 24, 2012
episodes.overview: Jacqui pays a visit to a face from the past, determined to do what she can to help Mercedes. But while she's away, Rhys is shocked when Mercedes hits a new low. Is it too late to help her?

episodes.name: February 27, 2012
episodes.overview: Rhys reels in horror from Mercedes's kiss. Mercedes begs Rhys not to say a word, but will he or won't he tell Jacqui?

episodes.name: February 28, 2012
episodes.overview: Blood-thirsty Jacqui arrives at the McQueens to take Mercedes to task for snogging Rhys. Jacqui, Carmel and Myra tear a strip off home-wrecker Mercy and for once mild-mannered Carmel truly lets rip. It looks as if it's all over for the McQueens, until Mercy reveals a dreadful secret.

episodes.name: March 21, 2012
episodes.overview: Jacqui surprises Rhys when she invites Phoebe to stay the night.

episodes.name: March 22, 2012
episodes.overview: It is chaotic as everyone prepares for Bobby's christening, but the McQueens panic when they realize Mercedes and Bobby are missing. Following her discovery, Mercedes is ready to kill and Mitzeee is at the centre of Mercedes' scorn. And Jacqui and Rhys are fuming when they realise the cost of their kindness.

episodes.name: April 16, 2012
episodes.overview: Jacqui reluctantly goes to the McQueens' for dinner when Myra insists Mercy is out. However, it's not long before talk turns to her feud with Mercy and they're back to square one.

episodes.name: April 18, 2012
episodes.overview: Jacqui is determined to help Phoebe, but Rhys is less than enamored when he realises exactly what she has in mind.

episodes.name: April 19, 2012
episodes.overview: George washes his hands of Phoebe, while Jacqui is determined to help her. However, Rhys is less than enamoured when he realises exactly what she has in mind.

episodes.name: April 20, 2012
episodes.overview: Rhys makes Phoebe less than welcome when she moves into her new home, and enlists the aid of the other McQueens to talk some sense into Jacqui. However, the plan is derailed when Mercedes turns up, and the feuding sisters end up coming to blows again.

episodes.name: April 23, 2012
episodes.overview: Phoebe’s mum Mel turns up unannounced at Jacqui & Rhys’ determined to get her daughter back, while Mercy gives Phoebe money to buy Jacqui something nice… But what’s she up to?

episodes.name: April 24, 2012
episodes.overview: Phoebe runs away, giving Mercedes and Jacqui a chance to make amends as they try to track her down.

episodes.name: April 25, 2012
episodes.overview: Rhys is shocked at Phoebe's revelation that her mum is a prostitute. Mercy and Jacqui have realised the same thing and Jac is at loggerheads over Phoebe living with Mel. Will they all reach an agreement over what to do with Phoebe?

episodes.name: May 7, 2012
episodes.overview: It’s the opening day of Ste and Doug’s deli. To celebrate, Doug heads to the pub, but a few drinks lead to something more with Texas as his determination to play it straight continues. Still terrified of her stalker, Mitzeee is unsure whether she can handle a public appearance. However, Mercedes gives her just the push she needs to get back out there. Jacqui is determined that Phoebe has an education, but a meeting with a prospective school doesn’t quite go according to plan. Ruby is overjoyed not to be grounded anymore - until she discovers that not all of her friends are pleased to have her back.

episodes.name: May 8, 2012
episodes.overview: Texas and Doug agree that their night together was a drunken mistake. However, when they go for a drink to talk, things go from bad to worse for Doug. Could this have something to do with Ste? A furious Riley confronts Mitzeee about her lies, so when she gets an offer of work abroad, it seems like the perfect solution for them both. Later, when Lynsey calls time on their fledgling romance, Riley realises that she might be the one for him - can he convince her to take things to the next level? A contrite Jacqui is forced to undo the damage she did yesterday to get Phoebe into school. Esther is determined to get Ruby and Jono talking again.

episodes.name: May 9, 2012
episodes.overview: Doug and Ste’s professional relationship is put under strain when their personal lives get in the way. Later, Doug finally cracks and confesses his love. It’s the college open day and queen bee Maddie is in her element showing the newbies around, but she’s disturbed to find Ruby a potential threat to her status. Elsewhere at college, a shocked Esther discovers Jen and Tilly’s secret - and that kind of gossip is hard to keep quiet… Lacey finds herself attracted to a student, but is disappointed when their time together is cut short. When will she see him again?

episodes.name: May 17, 2012
episodes.overview: While Joel fights for his life, Brendan is hell bent on revenge. However, when Cheryl overhears a conversation between Brendan and Walker, she insists that there's only one person responsible - Brendan. Meanwhile, a heart-to-heart between Dennis and Dodger prompts Dodger to reach out to Texas, but will it be enough? Elsewhere, an old friend helps Amy realise she has to take a few risks. She heads off to tell Ally how she really feels before it's too late.

episodes.name: June 4, 2012
episodes.overview: The McQueens aren't letting Myra's court date get them down - it's party time for the family with Michaela's 21st and the Diamond Jubilee celebrations. Lynsey and Riley are also at the party and they struggle with how to tell Mercedes about their relationship. Mercedes finally turns over a new leaf, but when a drunk Mitzeee drops a bombshell, can her positive outlook survive this devastating news? Meanwhile, Ste and Doug deliver a cake to the celebration as well as the news that they are a couple. Later, the McQueens are sent into disarray when Bart returns from court with some devastating news…

episodes.name: June 5, 2012
episodes.overview: A jealous Brendan can't handle Ste and Doug's relationship, but before he can do anything, Doug comes clean to Ste about the money behind the deli. Meanwhile, Mercedes struggles with the news of Lynsey's betrayal, but can she find it in herself to forgive her friend? Elsewhere, with Jacqui taking control at the McQueens', Liberty finds herself homeless like Dirk and Dodger. Can the Savages raise enough money to buy a new home, or will they be forced to leave Hollyoaks forever?

episodes.name: June 6, 2012
episodes.overview: Manipulative Brendan presents Ste with a promising business proposal, but is that all he wants from his former flame? Meanwhile, Texas and Leanne help Doug find a way to win back Ste, but is he too late? Elsewhere, testosterone is flying high in the Savage household. Over the last few weeks, the sibling rivalry has been out of control and now it peaks when Dodger and Will find themselves in a race to raise enough cash to save their family. However, when the competition heats up, Will refuses to join forces with Dodger and instead makes a big decision that could cost him everything.

episodes.name: June 7, 2012
episodes.overview: Joel is seething when he discovers that Walker is back and wants to know exactly what Brendan is up to. Meanwhile, spurred on by Mercedes, a jealous Lynsey challenges Riley over his feelings towards Mitzeee. Desperate to prove his love for Lynsey, Riley suggests they should take their relationship to the next level. Elsewhere, Dennis is gutted to discover that the Savages have left. Also today, Lacey thinks she's found a new friend.

episodes.name: June 8, 2012
episodes.overview: Ste finally declares his love for Brendan, as long as he wipes out the deli's debt. Doug is devastated and makes a rash decision. Meanwhile, with no headliner, Will is forced to face the baying crowds at his party - but will a shock arrival save the day? Elsewhere at the event, Dodger is rocked to the core when he discovers a shocking family secret.

episodes.name: June 11, 2012
episodes.overview: Cheryl is unnerved when she sees an old face return to the village and fears that Brendan may be up to no good. Meanwhile, the Savages are in a celebratory mood after their festival success, but their high spirits are crushed when they discover that their profits have been stolen. Barney is horrified when the finger of suspicion points at him, but can he prove his innocence? Elsewhere, Mercedes makes the most of an opportunity to stir things with Lynsey. Also today, Phoebe is stunned by a revelation from Lacey.

episodes.name: June 12, 2012
episodes.overview: Ste finally declares his love for Brendan, as long as he wipes out the deli's debt. Doug is devastated. And with no headliner, Will is forced to face the baying crowds at his party.

episodes.name: June 14, 2012
episodes.overview: Lynsey and Riley host the dinner party from hell and no matter how much Riley tries to prove otherwise, Lynsey fears she still has cause to worry about him and Mitzeee. Brendan confronts Walker about Joel's discovery, but Walker insists that Joel doesn't know the full story and reveals a new side of himself to Brendan. Martha tries to buy Lacey's silence, but the tables are turned when Martha discovers Lacey's far from innocent. Carmel worries that her dreams of becoming the Face of Attwells could be over before they've begun.

episodes.name: June 15, 2012
episodes.overview: Joel's unnerved by Walker's continued presence in the village, while Lynsey calls time on her relationship with Riley, admitting that she can't be second best to Mitzeee. But with Mitzeee heading away on business, will Riley tell her the truth before it's too late? Carmel pulls out all the stops to prepare for the Face of Attwells competition, but her actions have horrifying results. Meanwhile, the Savages make a surprise return.

episodes.name: June 18, 2012
episodes.overview: Mitzeee's sudden return from New York makes Nancy suspicious, but then they meet gorgeous footballer Jay... could he be everything Mitzeee has ever wanted? Carmel struggles to come to terms with the news that her injuries will never fully heal and ends up on the hospital roof. Doug's confidence with Ste is shaken when a bitter Brendan makes his presence felt. Texas is pleased that Dodger has returned to Hollyoaks but is shocked to discover he hasn't questioned Dirk about his true parentage. The Savages' return infuriates Jack when they make it clear they're here to stay. And Brendan won't listen to Joel's warnings about Walker; is there someone else who might be able to get through?

episodes.name: June 19, 2012
episodes.overview: When a sick Riley needs help, Mitzeee is torn; should she choose the man she loves or a dream date with Jay? Lynsey finds a distraught Carmel on the hospital roof; can she talk her down in time? Doug feels increasingly emasculated when he realises that Ste used to fancy Ally; is he man enough for his boyfriend? The Savages come up with a plan to keep their boat outside The Dog, but will Jack fall for it?

episodes.name: June 20, 2012
episodes.overview: Mitzeee puts it all on the line when she declares her love for Riley, but his reaction isn't what she expected. Will Riley have a change of heart when he finds out about Mitzeee's sacrifice? Darren and Rhys feel taken for granted by their wives, so they head to The Dog, determined to show them who's boss. Brendan continues to mess with Ste and Doug.

episodes.name: June 21, 2012
episodes.overview: Tensions rise to the surface during a lads' night out as Brendan taunts his friends and neighbours. Determined to put an end to the problem, Rhys, Dodger and Darren decide to stand up to the crook, but drunken posturing gets them in trouble. Meanwhile, a few too many drinks prompts Riley to compose a revealing text message to one of the three women pursuing his affections - but he ends up sending it to the wrong person.

episodes.name: June 22, 2012
episodes.overview: Riley goes all out to declare his feelings for Mitzeee, little knowing that Mercedes has misunderstood and thinks he loves her. How will this love triangle be resolved? Phoebe tries to play marriage counsellor to Jacqui and Rhys, but is their relationship beyond repair? Newly empowered Doug finally sleeps with Ste, but their happiness is destroyed by an unwelcome visitor. Elsewhere, Joel shares his doubts about Walker with Lynsey and she decides to tackle him. Has Walker misjudged where Brendan's loyalties lie?

episodes.name: June 25, 2012
episodes.overview: A loved-up Mitzeee and Riley prepare to go public, but a humiliated Mercedes is determined to put an end to their happiness and decides to turn the heat up on Mitzeee. Walker warns Ally to keep schtum about his past, but when a passing Lynsey witnesses it, Walker's oblivious to the fact that he's put someone else on his trail. Doug and Ste break the news of their new landlord to Amy, while a rebellious Lacey decides she's had enough of Martha's hypocrisy.

episodes.name: June 26, 2012
episodes.overview: With the return of her stalker, Mitzeee starts to lose her grip on reality and a night out with the girls descends into chaos as her paranoia reaches new heights. Riley is horrified when he realises the true extent of the situation, but when a faux-concerned Mercedes learns that her plan is working, she decides to pay Mitzeee a visit. Tensions heighten between the two women with horrifying consequences... Elsewhere, Nancy is nervous as she braces herself for the scan, and Callum's frustrations grow as he feels totally alone.

episodes.name: August 3, 2012
episodes.overview: Will has a difficult decision to make when a journalist offers him a large sum of money for his story but his choice has consequences for Dodger. Forced to reconsider her religion, Carmel feels her dysfunctional family aren't taking her crisis of faith seriously. Tilly and Jen continue their secret love affair, but when Tilly feels torn between her friends and her lover, who will she choose? Leanne is enjoying working with Rob at the gym and tries to put him under her spell.

episodes.name: August 21, 2012
episodes.overview: Jacqui's concerns for Mercedes grow as Doctor Browning struggles to convince Mercedes that they have a future together - is Mercedes falling for him in spite of herself? Later, Mercy lands herself in even more trouble when she's kidnapped… Meanwhile, Tilly is comforted by Neil as she struggles to accept Jen's news. But is Tilly prepared to roll over so easily? Elsewhere, Dodger struggles to regain his mojo, while Texas makes plans for a future away from Hollyoaks. Also today, Phoebe's efforts to force a wedge between George and Ryan don't go according to plan, while Ally gains Ash's forgiveness - but Walker has bigger plans for him.

episodes.name: August 22, 2012
episodes.overview: Still hurting following Jen's revelation, Tilly acts out and finds herself in trouble with the police after stealing Jen's car. Meanwhile, struggling to get her head around recent revelations, Mercedes focuses her attentions back on Riley. Elsewhere, Texas's leaving party forces Dodger to take action, but are his words enough to stop her from leaving? Also today, Joel and Cheryl begin to build bridges as they unite in their grief for Lynsey, while Ryan's arrival leaves Phoebe out in the cold.

episodes.name: August 24, 2012
episodes.overview: Riley makes a surprising proposition that opens up the possibility of Mercedes' dreams coming true, and Dodger reels from the previous day's events. A newly returned Maddie turns the group against Esther, and Myra settles back into the family fold, but Jacqui suspects something is amiss.

episodes.name: August 27, 2012
episodes.overview: Tensions run high in the village as the day of Mitzeee's hearing arrives, and as the would-be Wag prepares to meet her fate, Mercedes continues to plot against her. Meanwhile, the newly released Myra appears to be hiding a secret, and Phoebe furthers her agenda by giving unreliable relationship advice to George. Callum tries to reconcile Martha and Lacey, and Bart's lie about his academic success proves hard to maintain.

episodes.name: August 28, 2012
episodes.overview: Dirk tries to offer Dodger some fatherly advice, but the gesture only serves to irritate him further. Martha struggles to resist toasting Lacey's 16th birthday, and Jacqui begins to notice something unusual about Myra's behaviour. Meanwhile, Nancy inadvertently gives Mercedes just what she wants when she questions Riley about his affections, and Theresa is tempted by an offer guaranteed to bring in easy cash.

episodes.name: August 29, 2012
episodes.overview: Dodger finds a scrap of evidence about the identity of his real father, while Ash confronts Martha about her behaviour and its impact on the rest of the Kanes. A jealous Joel delivers an ultimatum to Theresa after hearing about her new job, and Jacqui comes up with an unusual way of getting through to Myra.

episodes.name: August 30, 2012
episodes.overview:
Dodger will take a turn for the worse and drown his sorrows, worried he will never find his true father. The Kane family will be in tatters following Martha's disappearance, did Ash push things too far?

Myra will get back to her old self, and find an unusual way of letting out her anger. Elsewhere, an angry Theresa will look to someone new for comfort... will she be making a huge mistake?

episodes.name: August 31, 2012
episodes.overview:
A red mist will descend on the vision of a young Scottish Foxy, following the events of the night before. Will he be able to forgive Theresa?

A guilty Ash will refuse to stand by and watch her family fall apart, but is it too late for her to save them? 

Meanwhile at the McQueens, a surprise visitor will persuade Michaela not to give up a fantastic opportunity, while Myra will decide it's time for someone to move out...

episodes.name: September 3, 2012
episodes.overview: With the start of term looming, Esther and Ruby are dreading their first day at college, but will they be able to overcome their fears? The Kanes realise their cupboard is truly bare and are offered help from a budding friend.

episodes.name: September 4, 2012
episodes.overview: Following a nightmare first day at college, things go from bad to worse for Esther when Jack catches her skiving. And, with wedding preparations in full swing, Ste and Dennis are united in their misery.

episodes.name: September 5, 2012
episodes.overview: Dennis saves the day for Leanne, but Ste is at the end of his tether. How will Jen cope with a surprise new addition to her class?

episodes.name: September 6, 2012
episodes.overview: As the wedding day approaches, Dennis proves indispensable in keeping secrets, but he is having serious doubts. And, as Doug digs deeper, Ste issues an ultimatum.

episodes.name: September 7, 2012
episodes.overview: Mercedes is causing chaos in the village again, but has she pushed Nancy too far this time?

episodes.name: September 10, 2012
episodes.overview: An unscrupulous Mercedes threatens Nancy and her baby, but will it be enough to stop Nancy's quest for justice? Leanne is still in the midst of wedding fever and Walker gets defensive when the doctor makes it clear that Cam's prognosis isn't good.

episodes.name: September 11, 2012
episodes.overview: Darren urges Nancy to take it easy. Mercedes puts on the performance of her life when Mitzeee hears the outcome of her trial. Theresa's frustrated that she's not getting any alone time with Joel.

episodes.name: September 12, 2012
episodes.overview: Joel's mum begs Theresa not to tell him her secret. The Kanes are soon struggling when Ash is unable to pay the rent. Jacqui seeks help from Frankie about Phoebe.

episodes.name: September 13, 2012
episodes.overview: Theresa plans a birthday surprise for Joel. Lacey devises a fun-filled money making scheme to help pay the rent. Bart and Neil play a prank on Jono.

episodes.name: September 14, 2012
episodes.overview: There's chemistry in the kitchen when Ste helps Brendan prepare Joel's birthday dinner party. A bitter Maddie tells Ruby that Jono has a new girlfriend.

episodes.name: September 17, 2012
episodes.overview: The aftermath of the party causes ripples for the Kanes. While Rhys is busy trying to hold his family together, Jacqui and Myra enjoy a night on the town, and Cindy is left feeling neglected when Tony leaves her to spend an evening with the students.

episodes.name: September 18, 2012
episodes.overview: As Ally continues to get the Kanes back on track, Callum is left wondering if he's too good to be true. Phoebe and Esther bond over their shared hatred of Maddie and, in an attempt to make Tony notice her, Cindy flirts with Rhys.

episodes.name: September 19, 2012
episodes.overview: Callum is given reason to suspect that Ally isn't all he seems, while Maddie makes an effort to befriend Phoebe - but does she have an ulterior motive?

episodes.name: September 20, 2012
episodes.overview: Callum's efforts to expose Ally lead to some major revelations. Meanwhile, Esther's fashion showcase ends in humiliation.

episodes.name: September 21, 2012
episodes.overview: Phoebe determines to make Maddie pay, while Leanne attempts to heal the growing rift between Doug and Ste.

episodes.name: September 24, 2012
episodes.overview: Doug makes a life-changing decision when he realises he needs to accept Ste's history with Brendan or move on, while the students find their dream apartment but are bound by Tony's tenancy agreement.

episodes.name: September 25, 2012
episodes.overview: Riley is shocked by a surprise visitor, while Bart decides it's not quite time to face reality.

episodes.name: September 26, 2012
episodes.overview: Mercedes makes a horrifying discovery, while Bart lies about his antics in an effort to win back Sinead.

episodes.name: September 27, 2012
episodes.overview: A devastated Mercedes and Riley struggle to cope with events, while Darren realises Nancy is in touch with Mitzeee and begs her to go to the police.

episodes.name: September 28, 2012
episodes.overview: Mercedes makes a shocking accusation on live TV, while Nancy agrees to help a frightened Mitzeee.

episodes.name: October 1, 2012
episodes.overview: Riley comes up short of funds, so the village pulls together to help his cause.

episodes.name: October 2, 2012
episodes.overview: Riley is forced to break Mitzeee's heart, while Ste is caught in the crossfire of an on-going feud.

episodes.name: October 3, 2012
episodes.overview: Nancy and Darren fear for the future of their tiny baby. Jacqui can't believe that Myra has remained loyal to Mercedes, knowing what she did.

episodes.name: October 4, 2012
episodes.overview: There's tension between Nancy, who is scared, and Darren, who is angry. Ste points the finger of blame at an unsuspecting resident for the recent trauma.

episodes.name: October 5, 2012
episodes.overview: Darren's temper flares as he realises how much danger his wife exposed their child to.

episodes.name: October 8, 2012
episodes.overview: Struggling to deal with the loss of Mercedes and Bobby, Myra becomes a cause for concern to Dirk. Darren goes full throttle and tells Nancy what he really thinks, but can Jack talk him round? Rhys tries his best to lure Cindy into some bedroom shenanigans. Despite her best efforts to please everyone, Esther is made to look a fool.

episodes.name: October 9, 2012
episodes.overview: Cindy is getting frustrated with Rhys's pestering and heads to the McQueens' to call it off, but can she resist temptation? Meanwhile, Nancy is buoyed by a visit from Tom, but wonders what's got into Darren when he goes AWOL. Elsewhere, Myra decides it's time to remedy her wrongs and heads to Nana McQueen's. Also today, Esther is mortified when videos of her appear on Dylan's website, while Tony decides he's going to get his hands on Atwell's - but a mystery bidder gives him a run for his money.

episodes.name: October 10, 2012
episodes.overview: Darren and Nancy are anxious as their baby fights a serious infection. Rob and Liam develop a rivalry when Atwell's new manager is revealed. While Tony is away, Rhys and Cindy decide to play, but will they get found out? Myra resolves to get the McQueens back together, while Esther is further divided from her friends as the video publishers become known.

episodes.name: October 11, 2012
episodes.overview: Darren and Nancy appear to be back on track when the family gather together at the baby's christening. Tony's suspicions are misplaced after a rather green Cindy makes her escape. Jacqui confronts Rhys about his antics, while Esther is further ostracised when she is blamed for breaking Jen's sculpture. Ash's decision to prove her domestic goddess status to Ally doesn't last long.

episodes.name: October 12, 2012
episodes.overview: Darren and Rhys unwind at Ash and Ally's party. Stood up by Bart, Sinead drowns her sorrows and catches the eye of Rob and the guys. George bears the brunt of Esther's wrath when she realises the gang have read her personal letter, while Tony believes his suspicions about Cindy are confirmed.

episodes.name: October 15, 2012
episodes.overview: Rhys distances himself from Cindy when rumours surface that she's pregnant. Esther decides to skive college, but is mortified by Jack's punishment.

episodes.name: October 16, 2012
episodes.overview: As Tony's world comes crashing down he decides it's time for action and won't take no for an answer... Ally plays cupid for Lacey and Dylan, while Esther attracts unwanted attention.

episodes.name: October 17, 2012
episodes.overview: Tony is determined to prove his love for Cindy, while Ash, Callum and Lacey are devastated when Martha doesn't show up for coffee.

episodes.name: October 18, 2012
episodes.overview: A forlorn Ruby is left out of the fold, but desperate to get back in with Sinead and Maddie.

episodes.name: October 19, 2012
episodes.overview: Lacey decides to play it cool with Dylan, but will she end up regretting it? Brendan tries to help with Lynsey's funeral but Cheryl keeps him at a distance.

episodes.name: October 22, 2012
episodes.overview: Lynsey's brother Eoghan arrives in the village, leaving Ste wondering about his past with Brendan and Cheryl. Meanwhile, Rhys is surprised by Cindy and Tony's engagement, and Cindy's necklace causes confusion. Elsewhere, spurred on by Ally, Lacey and Dylan share a kiss - but Lacey wonders if he's the only one who fancies her. Also today, Jacqui discovers Joel and Theresa's loot and demands the pair put it back, while Martha tries to help Ash - but will it do her any favours?

episodes.name: October 23, 2012
episodes.overview: Cheryl goes in search of answers from an unlikely source. Ste offers a saddened Brendan a shoulder to cry on and Lacey snubs a confused Dylan in pursuit of another beau.

episodes.name: October 24, 2012
episodes.overview: Brendan tries to be there for his sister but will Cheryl let him? Darren's mouth gets him into trouble and a dejected Cindy wants attention, but is Tony the man for the job?

episodes.name: October 25, 2012
episodes.overview: Dodger gives Tom advice on women, not realising who the true object of his affection is. Jono and Bart are at loggerheads and battle it out on the army assault course. Finally, Jen attempts to boost Esther's self-esteem, but is it in vain?

episodes.name: October 26, 2012
episodes.overview: Darren is wary as Tom finds excuses to hang out with Texas and Dodger, while Jono makes a surprising decision. Meanwhile, Esther is given food for thought by her online chum.

episodes.name: October 29, 2012
episodes.overview: Neil and Bart join forces to try to convince Jono not to join the army. Esther decides to stand against Maddie at college and Jacqui's stunned as Rhys makes a shocking declaration.

episodes.name: October 30, 2012
episodes.overview: A surprise visitor causes tension between Ste and Doug, while Myra worries about her daughter's marriage.

episodes.name: October 31, 2012
episodes.overview: As Cindy is offered a chance to escape, a call from the hospital makes her question everything. Esther is left humiliated when the teenagers plot a prank against her and Doug is stunned as Brendan continues to come between him and Ste.

episodes.name: November 1, 2012
episodes.overview: As things look bleak for Tony, he offers Cindy a way out. Doug is incensed as Brendan saves the day for Ste again.

episodes.name: November 2, 2012
episodes.overview: Cindy faces a tough choice, while Jono asks Ruby to make a life-changing decision.

episodes.name: November 5, 2012
episodes.overview: The village is reeling with excitement from the unexpected arrival of a familiar figure. Lacey develops an illicit crush, but are her feelings returned? Frankie goes to extreme lengths to stop Ruby from making a horrible mistake.

episodes.name: November 6, 2012
episodes.overview: There's trouble in town as a mischievous newcomer arrives in Hollyoaks. Joel finds himself in a precarious situation, and Cheryl admits to Tony that there is a slight complication with their big day.

episodes.name: November 7, 2012
episodes.overview: Mitzeee finds out there's still a hidden secret that could change her life for ever. Myra struggles financially, finding charity from the most unlikely source. Callum is surprised at Martha's honesty.

episodes.name: November 8, 2012
episodes.overview: Mitzeee is dealt some difficult news and, at the Kanes', things heat up for Lacey. As Esther offers Ruby a heartfelt gift, she is once again thwarted by Maddie.

episodes.name: November 9, 2012
episodes.overview: With Jacqui believing her relationship with Rhys is on the mend, will Rhys be able to tell her the truth, or will he leave Hollyoaks for ever? Jono is faced with an important decision and, either way, he will hurt someone.

episodes.name: November 12, 2012
episodes.overview: Who will Tony reveal his secret to? And, with her big day looming, will Ruby get cold feet?

episodes.name: November 13, 2012
episodes.overview: On the morning of the wedding, Ste makes a shocking discovery and Esther faces the threat of Maddie's wrath.

episodes.name: Enjoy the Ride
episodes.overview: A catastrophic accident threatens to destroy lives in the village as Esther and Bart's antics push Maddie to the limit. While Doug can't let go of the past, Ste finally discovers the truth about Brendan. Is Hollyoaks destined for any happy endings?

episodes.name: November 15, 2012
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the accident, Hollyoaks falls into disrepair. Things are put in perspective for many in the village, but how much longer can the truth stay buried?

episodes.name: November 16, 2012
episodes.overview: One resident hears life-changing news, but can they live with the consequences? And just when they thought they were safe, tragedy strikes for one much-loved couple.

episodes.name: November 19, 2012
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the devastating crash, Phoebe struggles to retain her silence about what she knows, and Lacey seeks solace in an unlikely friend.

episodes.name: November 20, 2012
episodes.overview: As Ash struggles to articulate her emotions, and Lacey's illicit feelings intensify, are the Kanes headed for disaster? And when Dodger receives a piece of life-changing information, he is once again left torn.

episodes.name: November 21, 2012
episodes.overview: Dodger makes the bold choice to meet his real dad as one resident's grief causes havoc in the village.

episodes.name: November 22, 2012
episodes.overview: Dodger is faced with a shocking revelation, and Lacey's forbidden infatuation escalates.

episodes.name: November 23, 2012
episodes.overview: Barney arrives back in the village but someone has a proposition for him. Will Carmel's first day at work help her confidence?

episodes.name: November 26, 2012
episodes.overview: Martha becomes increasingly suspicious of Ally's behaviour, while Nana McQueen takes it on herself to play matchmaker for Carmel.

episodes.name: November 27, 2012
episodes.overview: Martha confirms her worst fears. Texas makes a decision that could change things for ever. Carmel faces her own insecurities, while Nana wonders if she's done the right thing.

episodes.name: November 28, 2012
episodes.overview: With Sienna's help, Dodger tries to set matters right, while things heat up in Barney's love life.

episodes.name: November 29, 2012
episodes.overview: Dodger plans a surprise in order to bring his family together. Mitzeee tells Maxine to find a job, but her sister has other ideas, while Ash considers giving Martha another chance.

episodes.name: November 30, 2012
episodes.overview: Jacqui is on self-destruct, while Dodger and Dirk face a difficult choice. Maxine decides Mitzeee needs her support, but can she remind her sister how to have fun?

episodes.name: December 3, 2012
episodes.overview: Sinead is faced with a monumental decision, while it's time for Mitzeee to face Mercedes again.

episodes.name: December 4, 2012
episodes.overview: As lawyer Jim paints a very black and white picture for Mercedes, is Mitzeee strong enough to take her on? Diane and Bart learn of Sinead's plans, but can they change her mind?

episodes.name: December 5, 2012
episodes.overview: Jim unknowingly complicates things when he welcomes a star witness in the dock. Doug and Ste struggle to cope with the stress of family life.

episodes.name: December 6, 2012
episodes.overview: It's judgement day for Mercedes, and Carmel receives attention from an unlikely figure, but are his feelings reciprocated?

episodes.name: December 7, 2012
episodes.overview: Surprise arrivals in Hollyoaks deal Doug some shattering news. Sienna and Texas attempt to cast aside their differences for the sake of Dodger.

episodes.name: December 10, 2012
episodes.overview: On the day of the crash inquest, Esther's world comes tumbling down, while Doug and Ste are in utter turmoil when they face a life-changing decision.

episodes.name: December 11, 2012
episodes.overview: Doug pushes Ste to the limits, while Esther is faced with Maddie, Jono and Neil's memorial. Jacqui enlists Cindy's help with the funeral.

episodes.name: December 12, 2012
episodes.overview: It's the day of Rhys's funeral. When Tony is asked to give a speech, can he bring himself to praise the man who was sleeping with his wife? Or will he publicly expose Rhys's infidelity? Meanwhile, Jacqui seeks solace in an old friend as Cindy prepares to say a painful goodbye to the man that she loves. Elsewhere, as Frankie and Jack despair over Esther, Ruby confides in them - are things finally looking up for Esther? Also in the village, Ste's world comes crashing down, and Nancy struggles to control her jealousy. (Jacqui and Tony share a kiss!)

episodes.name: December 13, 2012
episodes.overview: Jacqui finds a clue which leads her directly to the heart of Rhys's disloyalty, only to be met with a devastating discovery. Meanwhile, cracks begin to form among the Savages, but can anybody help Dodger and Dirk see sense? Elsewhere, Theresa prepares for Joel's release from prison before being dealt some shocking news.

episodes.name: December 14, 2012
episodes.overview: As the differences between his two families transpire, how will Dodger cope? Meanwhile, Texas is left confused and reeling when Sienna attempts to stir trouble within an already fractured family. Elsewhere, at the Christmas lights switch-on, Maxine has her eyes set on one guy only, but are the feelings mutual?

episodes.name: December 17, 2012
episodes.overview: As Doug and Ste bid farewell to the village, Cheryl is left questioning Ste's affections, but is it too late? Meanwhile, Texas's fear mounts as Sienna and Dodger spend time alone, knowing her secret is a ticking time bomb. Can Texas bring herself to tell Dodger the truth? Elsewhere, seeing Bart shattered by Sinead's rejection, Jacqui makes a devastating decision. Also today, with money tight, will Joel give into temptation?

episodes.name: December 18, 2012
episodes.overview: Cheryl makes a revelation that leaves Doug in utter turmoil. As Theresa maps out the future, Joel makes an executive decision.

episodes.name: December 19, 2012
episodes.overview: Leanne is overjoyed when an old friend returns to lend a helping hand, and Maxine and Mitzeee make a deal that can only lead to disaster.

episodes.name: December 20, 2012
episodes.overview: Nancy fears the worst when she receives a call from the hospital. When Maxine struggles to stick to her promise, can she keep another secret from her sister?

episodes.name: December 21, 2012
episodes.overview: Maxine and Mitzeee make a scandalous discovery, and Nana McQueen is dazed by a shock confession from Barney.

episodes.name: December 24, 2012
episodes.overview: It’s the day of the Christmas ball! After confiding in a friend about his secret arrangement, Barney prepares to admit his true affections to Carmel... will she get the fairy-tale ending of her dreams? Elsewhere, Brendan struggles to cope with his overwhelming situation, while an isolated Mercedes gets a surprise visitor knocking on her door.

episodes.name: December 26, 2012
episodes.overview: The McQueen's world is rocked when a mystery bundle arrives with no explanation. On her first Christmas without Rhys, Jacqui's emotions run high as she makes a heart-breaking discovery, with disastrous consequences... Worried for Carmel, Myra overhears the events of last night and throws one McQueen out in the cold. Is Christmas over for this lonely figure? Elsewhere, John Paul struggles to adapt to Christmas back at the McQueen's.

episodes.name: December 27, 2012
episodes.overview: As Jacqui learns the full extent of Rhys's infidelity, she leans on Tony for support. Could there still be a spark between the pair? Meanwhile, Darren and Nancy are struggling with parenthood, but could there be an underlying issue? Elsewhere, seeing Mercedes upset, Browning concocts a plan to get back in favour with the McQueens'.

episodes.name: December 28, 2012 #1
episodes.overview: Darren and Nancy's worry increases as they seek professional advice at the hospital over their fears that Oscar could be deaf. Meanwhile, Myra's fears for the future escalate as she finds out what she thought was a hangover could be something worse.

episodes.name: January 2, 2013
episodes.overview: When a social worker turns up to look into the situation at the Osbornes' following Charlie's disappearance, they soon realise they can't continue to go on the way they have been.However when Ruby blames Esther for not watching Charlie she finds solace at Mitzeee's. Cheryl tries to get Brendan and Seamus to bond over a lunch at the dog, however when Brendan storms out she gives him a ultimatum. And Leanne doesn't remember anything from the night before much to Dennis' dismay.

episodes.name: January 3, 2013
episodes.overview: Things end up becoming even more tense for the Osbornes. Esther manages to find friendship in a trusted source.

episodes.name: January 7, 2013
episodes.overview: Cheryl's concern escalates over Seamus's disappearance. Can Brendan keep his terrible secret? Meanwhile, a harassed Joel deals Theresa heartbreaking news, but can she change his mind? Elsewhere, Mercedes manages to make inroads with Myra, but there's trouble ahead when Mercy jumps to the wrong conclusion. Also today, Bart fears that he'll never be able to turn over a new leaf. Finally, as Esther is pushed to the limit, she makes a decision that will affect all of the sixth formers.

episodes.name: January 17, 2013
episodes.overview: It's the day of Myra's fundraiser, and a familiar figure arrives back to hear of recent events at the McQueens'. Meanwhile, Dodger is left reeling from yet another shocking discovery. Elsewhere, as Esther's bullying continues, nothing can prepare her for what she is about to see.

episodes.name: January 28, 2013
episodes.overview: As Tilly vows to expose the truth, Jen takes drastic measures to stop her. Things go from bad to worse for Phoebe, and Brendan surprises himself and Ste as he looks after Leah.

episodes.name: January 29, 2013
episodes.overview: Ste is taken aback as Doug returns, seeming happier than ever. Will he accept Doug's proposition? Meanwhile, Mitzeee pushes Brendan on his past, but can he reveal all? Elsewhere, with the truth laying heavy on Jen's conscience, can she bring herself to expose it and risk her career? Also today, Phoebe struggles to be heard in the McQueens', but things look up slightly when John Paul finds out about her suspension from college and offers to tutor her. Finally, Jacqui is left reeling by Myra's actions when she discovers that her mum is £7,000 in debt.

episodes.name: January 30, 2013
episodes.overview: Ste is rattled when Brendan questions his commitment. Can Ste reveal the truth about his relationship to Amy? At the same time, as Mitzeee encourages Brendan to face up to his past, a shady figure intervenes… and an old enemy returns. Meanwhile, following yesterday's revelations, Jacqui rallies the McQueens into action - but the news that Carmel has some savings doesn't provide relief for long as the dizzy blonde decides to buy a car! Elsewhere, Theresa proves she's more than just a pretty face, but has Dodger got more than he bargained for? Also today, Ash and Barney plan a party for Will, but there's a spanner in the works when they hear that he won't be allowed out of hospital.

episodes.name: January 31, 2013
episodes.overview: Ste worries about his future with Brendan, but Brendan makes the bold choice to live with Ste. Meanwhile, Ash and Barney come up with a daring plan to help Will, disguising him as an old woman to break him out of the hospital. But could the plan backfire? Elsewhere, the McQueens' attempts to go straight have disastrous consequences for everyone as they end up in a massive bar brawl. Also today, an increasingly dejected Phoebe makes a tough decision as she steals £50 from the cash tin and prepares to tell Jacqui that she's leaving. But will the bar brawl interrupt her plans?

episodes.name: February 1, 2013
episodes.overview: Cooped up in a prison cell, the McQueens find themselves seeking help from Jim McGinn once again - but for what repayment? Meanwhile, as John Paul struggles with the pressure of being a job-seeking single parent, a shock visit turns his world upside down. Elsewhere, panic strikes the village as time is ticking for Will, who has disappeared amid the chaos of his party. But as a guilty Dodger wishes to reconcile, is it too late?

episodes.name: February 21, 2013
episodes.overview: John Paul makes it his mission to infuriate Ste at the careers day by undermining him in front of the students, and the pair end up fighting in the school corridors. Meanwhile, chaos reigns in the Osborne household as Nancy is forced to confront her worst nightmare, but is there more heartache yet to come? Elsewhere, Jacqui sees an opportunity to improve the McQueens' dire financial situation when she spots a "cleaners needed" flyer. However, she already knows the interviewer Trudy from her prison days...  Also today, Texas realises that her feelings for Will aren't real when Dodger gives her a 'goodbye kiss'. Can she ever be honest with Will?

episodes.name: February 22, 2013
episodes.overview: Nancy's suspicions intensify when Darren returns from a night out and she demands to know what's going on - has he been with Cindy? How much longer can Darren hide the truth for, and at what cost? Meanwhile, Brendan returns to the village from Ireland but doesn't receive a warm welcome from Ste. Elsewhere, Jacqui is pushed to the limits by Trudy, who wants revenge for their time in prison and is going to make Jacqui pay. Can Jacqui get through this cleaning job without losing her temper? Will Doug finally admit his true feelings?

episodes.name: February 25, 2013
episodes.overview: Darren concocts an elaborate plan to secure his family's future. Can things between Trudy and Jacqui get much worse? And can Ste and Brendan overcome the obstacles in the way of taking their relationship to the next level?

episodes.name: February 26, 2013
episodes.overview: As tension mounts, can Leanne resolve the chaos she's caused before it's too late? Darren panics under pressure, but can he save the day?

episodes.name: February 27, 2013
episodes.overview: How will the Osbornes cope with the consequences of the previous night? Tony steps in to save the day. Is Cheryl having reservations about Nate?

episodes.name: February 28, 2013
episodes.overview: Leanne gives some controversial advice, but will her idea work? Seamus grows suspicious of his daughter's new man.

episodes.name: March 1, 2013
episodes.overview: Seamus reveals his uncertainties about Nate. Will Dodger admit how he really feels to Theresa?

episodes.name: March 4, 2013
episodes.overview: Walker issues a lethal ultimatum, putting Maxine at serious risk, but can Kevin bring himself to fulfill such a deadly task? Ruby prepares for her first day back at college, but will this former bully be easily forgiven? Will manipulates an awkward situation. Precisely what is he planning?

episodes.name: March 8, 2013
episodes.overview: Still shocked by what he saw last night, can Will confide in anyone without revealing his own sordid secret? Elsewhere, Sinead is forced to make a serious life decision, and the full horror of Kevin’s dishonesty is unveiled. Things go from bad to worse for the McQueens, but is there more to Trudy’s cleaning company than she’s letting on? Meanwhile, Cindy unwittingly pushes Holly further away.

episodes.name: March 11, 2013
episodes.overview: Sinead anxiously awaits Diane's life-changing decision. Has a concerned Leanne isolated a resolute Texas even further? Jacqui's day takes a shocking turn as she is confronted by her worst nightmare.

episodes.name: March 12, 2013
episodes.overview: Will Jacqui open up to anyone about her ordeal? As Kevin understands the full repercussions of his actions, can he hide such a big secret from Walker? When Cheryl's surprise to Nate backfires, will she lose everything she's ever dreamed of?

episodes.name: March 13, 2013
episodes.overview: A shock proposal leaves Cheryl contemplating the opportunity of a lifetime, while Trudy tempts Jacqui into becoming her accomplice. Brendan decides to take matters into his own hands after lawyer Jim McGinn reveals the dire truth about his case, and a terrified Kevin finds himself cornered.

episodes.name: March 14, 2013
episodes.overview: Seamus offers Cheryl an offer to rival yesterday's, but which will she choose? The Osbornes hear some shocking news. As Walker learns the magnitude of Kevin's deceit, could Kevin be in mortal danger?

episodes.name: March 15, 2013
episodes.overview: Things heat up for Walker, but what exactly does he have planned? Is it game over for Kevin? Could there be more to Ellie than Will is aware of?

episodes.name: March 27, 2013
episodes.overview: A nostalgic Tony attempts to rekindle his relationship with Jacqui, but has he missed his chance? Meanwhile, to what extremes will Nancy go to fuel her addiction? Elsewhere, Jacqui reveals heartbreaking news to Doctor Browning, but will he believe her? Also today, Myra is horrified to learn of her mother's betrayal.Finally, Phoebe urges an anguished George to divulge the truth about his one-night stand.

episodes.name: March 28, 2013
episodes.overview: A mystery woman in red posts a photo of a gagged Mercedes to Browning, shortly followed by the return of Clare Devine. Has she done something to Mercy? Meanwhile, wrongly assuming that George's one-night stand was with John Paul, Phoebe decides to teach JP a lesson by mugging him. Will her actions prove costly? Elsewhere, Darren's suspicions grow when he finds Nancy frantically picking spilt pills up from the floor.
