Also today, Tony struggles with his affections, but will he make a mistake by pursuing Diane? Finally, the McQueens host an unconventional baptism.

episodes.name: March 29, 2013
episodes.overview: Doctor Browning is confronted by an unwanted visitor, but how does he know them? Meanwhile, Jacqui and the McQueens beg John Paul to withdraw his statement to protect Phoebe, but it's too late as she already has a court date. Worried over her uncertain future, Phoebe hits the bottle. Elsewhere, Tony questions where his heart truly lies, and Diane is crushed when she sees that Jacqui is still the object of his affections. Also today, Nancy makes a shock admission to Sienna.

episodes.name: April 2, 2013
episodes.overview: Jacqui is on the warpath in the fallout from Phoebe's collapse. With Trudy refusing to take the vodka off the shelves, Jacqui decides to get rid of it all in her own way - by smashing it up. Meanwhile, new boy Robbie Roscoe is introduced to Patrick at college. It's clear there's a devilish side to this newcomer, but Patrick is up for the challenge. When Robbie trashes a display at the deli and frames Callum, it's up to Cal to face the wrath of Patrick. Elsewhere, Esther struggles to overcome her demons as the sixth formers plan a fashion show in her honour. Is she ready to face up to her past? Also today, Tony finds himself in the midst of a love triangle, but who will he choose?

episodes.name: April 3, 2013
episodes.overview: Tilly has planted Esther's tell-all diary in John Paul's pigeon hole at college, with details of her and Jen's affair in it. At the college open day, Jen is proud to be giving a speech to the prospective parents, but she's humiliated when images of her and Tilly in various romantic clinches are projected behind her – busted! Meanwhile, Jacqui is in a moral quandary when Trudy offers her the chance to get Phoebe off any charges, but at what cost? Elsewhere, Maxine and Liam break into Chez Chez to recover the abandoned alcohol following the Bradys' departure and plan a themed cocktail night. The entrepreneurial pair decide to buy Chez Chez and run it together. Also today, Callum has a new partner in crime and they are intent on exacting revenge!

episodes.name: April 4, 2013
episodes.overview: Romance blossoms for Tony, but his recent sacrifices threaten to scupper the success of his new business. Later, Jacqui decides that it's time Tony knew what really happened between her and Trudy in prison, so she makes a shock confession. Meanwhile, Tilly finds an unlikely ally as she attempts to rid the village of Jen for good. Elsewhere, John Paul turns to Doug for solace as he is forced to evaluate his future. The pair get drunk and end up sticking post-its all over Patrick's car, unaware they're being photographed by Cal and Robbie. Also today, Callum and Robbie continue to ruffle feathers in the village. Is this the start of a destructive friendship?

episodes.name: April 5, 2013
episodes.overview: Chez Chez is up for auction and it's a race to the finish line for the prospective bidders. Despite Liam's departure, Maxine hopes to be able to afford the club thanks to a loan from Mitzeee. At the same time, Clare is still hopeful that Browning will step up and invest in the club. However, Doctor Browning has some reservations about Clare, especially when Jim tells him that 'Cassandra' doesn't exist. Will he see through her devious plans? And who will succeed in securing the club? Meanwhile, things appear to be on the up for John Paul, but a harmless prank may be the undoing of him. Elsewhere, Tilly and Esther grow closer as recent events draw them together.

episodes.name: April 11, 2013
episodes.overview: Leanne confronts Will and is further shocked when she discovers a shoebox filled with CCTV DVDs - what kind of sick person is he? Can Leanne bring herself to tell her Texas the ghastly truth? Meanwhile, the McQueens fall into despair as the stakes are raised, with a £200,000 ransom being demanded in exchange for Mercedes's safe return. But does Jacqui have an idea up her sleeve? Elsewhere, Maxine finds a unique way to improve her academic skills. Also today, Theresa receives relationship advice from an unlikely acquaintance.

episodes.name: April 12, 2013
episodes.overview: Pushed to the extremes in order to secure Mercy's safe return, will Jacqui shake hands with the devil? Meanwhile, Leanne leans in to kiss Will, but will it prove to be a costly mistake? Elsewhere, Maxine is jubilant after receiving fantastic news, but for how long can her good mood last? Also today, Carmel offers a shoulder for petrified Myra.

episodes.name: April 15, 2013
episodes.overview: The McQueens concoct a plan to save Mercedes, but to what extremes are they willing to go? Meanwhile, as Callum is left feeling dejected, who will he turn to? Elsewhere, Sinead and Diane are gobsmacked when Sinead's dad Rob returns and delivers the shocking news that Finn has gone missing. Also today, Tony is left questioning his future as his Decree Absolute arrives.

episodes.name: April 16, 2013
episodes.overview: Jacqui prepares to meet with Trevor and trick him into buying a supposedly vodka-laden truck for £50,000. She is shocked when Phoebe jumps into the van with her - she's not budging. Later, when Jacqui hears a crash from the back of the van, she is alarmed to find five illegal immigrants smuggled away. What will she do about it? Meanwhile, on the way to an all-night gig, Sinead, Callum and Robbie are horrified when they knock someone over and jump out to find a motionless body in the road. Elsewhere, Diane privately makes a surprise decision.

episodes.name: April 17, 2013
episodes.overview: Sinead is horrified after being involved in running over her own brother Finn. With Finn's memory hazy, can Sinead cover for deceitful Robbie despite their wrongdoing? Meanwhile, with extremes of life or death, how much are Phoebe and Jacqui prepared to risk? Elsewhere, Tony is left with tough decisions to make. Also today, Diane is stunned to the core by a piece of life-changing news.

episodes.name: April 18, 2013
episodes.overview: Jacqui is offered one final opportunity to save her sister, but is it too late? Meanwhile, Nancy has arranged for Darren to do an interview with the Herald about his win on the horses, but he refuses to do it. Nancy questions her husband and is horrified when he tells her the truth about the betting slip.

episodes.name: April 19, 2013
episodes.overview: Jacqui's day takes a terrifying turn. Later, after planning her getaway, Jacqui says an emotional goodbye to Phoebe and departs the village alone. Meanwhile, can deceived Nancy find it in her to forgive and forget? Or will she finally admit to her own dishonesties?

episodes.name: April 24, 2013
episodes.overview: An unwelcome figure from Tom's past returns to Hollyoaks, while Carmal begins to see Jim in a new light.

episodes.name: April 25, 2013
episodes.overview: Secrets and lies are revealed at Texas' hen du, meanwhile, Mercedes is wracked with guilt.

episodes.name: April 26, 2013
episodes.overview: Texas is faced with a difficult decision when Will tells her that he has a life-threatening aneurism. But what will she choose - her head, or her heart? Meanwhile, Myra feels compelled to tell Carmel the truth, but will she break Carmel's heart? Elsewhere, Mercedes goes to extreme lengths to settle her debts with a family member.

episodes.name: April 29, 2013
episodes.overview: A familiar face  turns up on Maxine's doorstep, Sinead goes into labor and Ste returns to Hollyoaks, but it doesn't take long before he loses control.

episodes.name: April 30, 2013
episodes.overview: Patrick's hostility towards Maxine's new flatmate pushes him to extremes. Meanwhile, Finn makes a plan that could save his family and Ste makes a shocking confession to Doug.

episodes.name: May 1, 2013
episodes.overview: Ste and Doug need to put there differences aside in order to win a prestigious food competition. Callum gets on Robbie's bad side and Maxine tries to deal with her true emotions.

episodes.name: May 2, 2013
episodes.overview: Ste may have finally found a solution to his financial problems, while Robbie throws a rave at Chez Chez. Phoebe is shocked when she sees a familiar face from her past. Meanwhile, Robbie tries to get revenge on Callum, but when his plan goes badly it means life or death for someone else.

episodes.name: June 6, 2013
episodes.overview: It's the day of Tony's operation, so Darren decides to tell Cindy about Tony's condition. She rushes to the hospital and reassures Tony that he's not alone anymore. Meanwhile, Ste is desperate to get back into Freddie's good books, but the newcomer is refusing to supply him. However, Sinead swipes Freddie's phone, finds the name of his supplier and sends Ste off to meet him - unaware that it's evil Trevor. Elsewhere, Sinead fills a bag with painkillers to sell. Later, Sinead is trapped in the alleyway and attacked by a student who she sold a dodgy pill to. Also today, Tilly has a heart-to-heart with a distraught Esther.

episodes.name: Plots and Plans: Myra's Final Week
episodes.overview: As the McQueens become aware of Dr. Browning’s evil plan, is there anything they can do to save their family? Meanwhile, Ziggy is desperate to prove that he’s not under the thumb when it comes to Ruby, Vincent thinks he might have found the answer to his prayers and Cindy struggles to control her agoraphobia.

episodes.name: Risky Games
episodes.overview: Mercedes is devastated at the risky, extreme lengths she has to go to protect her mum, but will her efforts be in vain? Or will Dr. Browning get his own way, with devastating consequences? Elsewhere, George can’t deny his feelings any longer, but how will Vincent respond?

episodes.name: Danger and Distress
episodes.overview: A distraught Mercedes seeks the ultimate revenge on Dr Browning, but will she put herself in danger? George and Vincent settle their differences, whilst Phoebe gets the shock of her life. Sandy is speechless as an old face arrives back in the village, and the McQueens realise that life will never be the same again.

episodes.name: A Glimmer of Hope
episodes.overview: The McQueens are left utterly broken by the week’s events, but can Jim provide a glimmer of hope to one family member? Meanwhile, the Roscoes are aghast to hear of their brother’s recent torment, and the threat of Trevor still looms over the village.

episodes.name: Difficult Decisions
episodes.overview: The Roscoes are dealt some shocking news, but, despite wanting to think the best of her sons, Sandy’s suspicions are piqued. Vincent is forced to make a difficult decision, but who will he choose: George or Phoebe? Elsewhere, Sinead is interrogated by the police.

episodes.name: Dangerous Actions
episodes.overview: Will's jealousy and paranoia continues to increase. Can anybody stop him from murdering again? Jack tries to hide his dishonesty from his wife, but will Frankie realise his deceit? The McQueens struggle to come to terms with the loss of their loved one. Meanwhile, Patrick makes a devastating discovery that could shatter his family forever.

episodes.name: Guilt and Suspicion
episodes.overview: A guilty Will struggles to deal with the consequences of his actions, but has he done enough to cover his tracks, or will he find himself caught out? Patrick receives yet another blow as he is held fully accountable for yesterday's events. The McQueens receive yet more distressing news, but do they have an illicit idea up their sleeves? As Frankie's suspicions are raised, will she get to the bottom of Jack's treachery? Meanwhile, Leanne and Dennis are planning their dream wedding, but can they afford it?

episodes.name: Tragedy
episodes.overview: As a furious Jack makes an emotional Frankie apologise to Sandy for her behaviour, Lindsey is in the wrong place at the wrong time - with devastating consequences. As those that surround him become suspicious, are the walls finally closing in on Will? Dennis is roped into Nana McQueen's risky plan, but can he go through with it?

episodes.name: Broken Hearts
episodes.overview: As tensions run high, could Dennis and Leanne's wedding be called off? Lindsey is rushed into hospital, leaving Joe utterly distraught. Could Frankie be to blame for this tragedy? Old feelings are resurrected for Carmel, and elsewhere, Trevor is given food for thought. Meanwhile, Patrick comes to a shocking realisation.

episodes.name: New Beginnings?
episodes.overview: Emotions escalate for the Roscoes as Frankie refuses to lay old worries to rest, but has Jack done enough to convince everyone otherwise? Freddie struggles to keep his distance as he watches a loved on grieve. Trevor decides to get pay back, but how far will he go? Meanwhile, a proposal leaves smiles all round.

episodes.name: A Day To Remember
episodes.overview: It's finally the day of Frankie and Jack's wedding vow renewal, but can they put the problems of the past behind them to ensure they have a day to remember? As trouble erupts in The Dog, Sandy makes a gobsmacking admission, while Joe gets the shock of his life. Meanwhile, Trevor and Fraser plot the ultimate revenge of a deceitful Jim.

episodes.name: Breaking Point
episodes.overview: With recent events hanging heavy in the air, could this be the end of an era for the Osborne family? Or will Jack's desperate attempts to reconcile prevail? Elsewhere, still reeling from yesterday's shocking news and coming to terms with his recent grief, is Joe nearing breaking point? His brother Freddie isn't fairing much better, as his jealousy hits a raw nerve with Sinead.

episodes.name: Surprise Surprise
episodes.overview: With her relationship on the rocks, Frankie surprises herself as she seeks comfort in the arms of a family acquaintance. Freddie is forced to perform a terrifying task, but will it go to plan? Meanwhile, Sienna asks Darren to take their relationship the next step.

episodes.name: Trapped In The Closet
episodes.overview: Freddie watches on aghast as his mission doesn't quite go as planned, especially when he discovers who has been trapped inside! Meanwhile, feeling flustered and embarrassed, Frankie is desperate to keep her actions a secret, but will she succeed? Will Fraser pull off his cruel plot to frame Jim? And Sienna shows her true colours while fighting to keep Darren happy.

episodes.name: High and Dry
episodes.overview: Backed into a corner by Fraser and faced with a moral predicament, what will Jim decide to do? Freddie admits to his demons, but will he lose the love and respect of those close to him? Elsewhere, as Maxine is left high and dry, who will she turn to for support? Sienna is overjoyed as her plan begins to fall into place, but Frankie's ruin serves as a cold reminder to her malicious actions.

episodes.name: An Illicit Arrangement
episodes.overview: A guilty Maxine is overwhelmed by Patrick's persistence to win her back, but will she reveal whose bed she was in last night? As Jim desperately tries to get out of his illicit arrangement, will he succeed? Meanwhile, despite his best efforts, nothing can prepare Joe for Lindsey's heart-breaking revelation and Ste is stunned to receive help from an unlikely source.

episodes.name: How Do You Plead?
episodes.overview: It's the day of Ste's court hearing and Doug pulls out all the stops to keep his friend out of jail; but still feeling an overwhelming sense of guilt, how will Ste plead? Elsewhere, Maxine is desperate to save her relationship, but will she succeed? Joe and Lindsey are on the rocks, but can they sort out their differences? Meanwhile, Leanne's babysitting ends in disaster, and is Tony setting himself up for a fail?

episodes.name: M.I.A.
episodes.overview: Ste has little time to comprehend his sentencing as he's confronted by a frantic Leanne over his daughter's disappearance. Can anybody persuade a scared Leah to safety? As John Paul and Danny go in search of the missing Leah, they make a horrific discovery, but how will they react? Meanwhile, a fragile Tony gets some shocking news and is rushed to hospital.

episodes.name: Tony's Fate
episodes.overview: John Paul struggles to comprehend Danny's strange behaviour, but what is he hiding? Meanwhile, Diane is left distraught as she learns of Tony's fate.

episodes.name: Under Pressure
episodes.overview: As things heat up between John Paul and Danny, the McQueen gets the shock of his life. Meanwhile, after this week's shocking discovery, pressure mounts on Fraser and Trevor, but what exactly are they planning? Elsewhere, Diane promises to be there for Tony as he comes to terms with his devastating news.

episodes.name: You've Been Framed
episodes.overview: Fraser and Trevor attempt to frame an innocent villager for their nasty deed, but will they succeed with their malicious plan? Meanwhile, has Ste managed to exorcise his demons, and can John Paul really call it a day with his secret lover Danny? Elsewhere, Mercedes attempts to bring down bad boy Trevor, and Martha's dislike for Will grows.

episodes.name: Life and Death
episodes.overview: As the odds are stacked against him, will anybody save Ste from a life behind bars? As the investigation into Anna's death draws to a close, is Will in danger of being found out? Meanwhile, Mercedes and Sinead join forces in order to bid farewell to Trevor for one last time, but will they succeed? And, feeling more alone than ever, Tom concocts a plan with a friend to win his family back.

episodes.name: Mortal Combat
episodes.overview: Mercedes steps up her game to bring down Trevor, but has she placed herself in mortal danger? Or will she finally see the back of the McQueen's enemy? Elsewhere, will Tom's efforts to reunite the Osbornes be in vain, or will they prove successful? Doug makes a surprising discover, while Martha's suspicions and Ash's odd behaviour fuel Will's paranoia.

episodes.name: Imminent Danger
episodes.overview: Doug is keen for Ste to know the truth, but with so much history is it really for the best? Under pressure, Darren is left with little choice but to turn on Jack. Meanwhile, with Hollyoaks Village in imminent danger, Jim has an idea, but can he pull it off before it is too late? Will makes a show of himself in front of a concerned crowd, but can Ash forgive him? And Tom steps up his game to expose Sienna's evil antics.

episodes.name: D-Day
episodes.overview: It's D-Day for Mercedes' plan, but has she done enough to secure a safe haven for her family? Tom's idea appears to be working, but how will Darren react to his dishonesty? Meanwhile, Dodger is shocked to discover a piece of Will's disturbing past and Doug and Ste make an impulsive, heart-driven decision.

episodes.name: The Calm Before the Storm
episodes.overview: It's Mercedes' 30th birthday (woohoooo!) and she's determined to celebrate in true McQueen style, but a face from the past has plans to make sure the party goes off with a bang…  Ste and Doug prepare to say goodbye to Hollyoaks, but will Danny reveal the truth to Ste before it's too late? Elsewhere Tom admits defeat to Sienna, Leanne is devastated as she unearths Dennis' lies, and Ash makes a shocking discovery about Will…

episodes.name: The Explosion
episodes.overview: A horrified Ash confronts Will about his past crimes, but how far is he prepared to go to secure her silence? Mercedes' birthday celebrations are in full swing, but the McQueens are unaware of the explosive surprise that's in store for them. Sinead has bagged a leaving present for Ste and Doug, which could change their lives forever. Meanwhile, it looks like the end of the road for Dennis and Leanne.

episodes.name: The Battle
episodes.overview: The whole village is reeling from the explosion and a desperate mission to find survivors gets underway, but who or what will they uncover? An unexpected visitor arrives at the McQueens, but will they get the reception they'd hoped for? Elsewhere, Lindsey and Cindy find themselves forced to face their demons, and Will's feud with Dodger is brought to a shocking conclusion…

episodes.name: The Fallout
episodes.overview: As the dust settles, the Savages pull together as they try to deal with their grief. Everyone is stunned when paramedics uncover another body in the rubble…but whose? Sam resolves that she will find the person responsible for the tragedy and Cindy and Lindsey find themselves bonded by a dark secret.

episodes.name: The Secret
episodes.overview: Cindy and Lindsey struggle with the burden of their secrets, but Lindsey is left speechless with Cindy admits she has one more confession to make. Sam makes a discovery which threatens to turn her life upside down. The Osbornes are faced with utter devastation, meanwhile, Holly struggles to come to terms with her grief and Dennis has to break life-shattering news...

episodes.name: Finished Sympathy
episodes.overview: Having discovered Danny’s ultimate betrayal, Sam struggles to fine it in her heart to forgive him. As pressure mounts for Cindy and Lindsey, who will be the first to crack? And meanwhile, as the Osbornes near breaking point, could Nancy return to save the day?

episodes.name: Earth Shattering
episodes.overview: Holly is left gobsmacked by Cindy’s revelation, but will Cindy listen to her daughter’s honest opinion? Meanwhile, with health results looming, how will Tony cope under the pressure? Sienna is forced to make a difficult decision to save a loved one, but how will it be executed? Elsewhere, Phoebe goes back to her old ways, and Patrick makes a discovery that rocks his world (EEK!).

episodes.name: A Trip Down Memory Lane
episodes.overview: Tony takes a trip down memory lane with Diane but their plans are thrown into chaos when Diane’s waters break and she is rushed into hospital. While Diane is in labour, Tony receives some shocking news of his own!

episodes.name: Surprise, Surprise
episodes.overview: Danny makes a surprise announcement that knocks his family for six, but how will they respond to his life-changing news? Elsewhere, laden with fury over his recent betrayal, Patrick turns to someone for comfort, but will the real truth behind his girlfriend’s actions be revealed? Meanwhile, Vincent returns back to the village, but is he a changed man?

episodes.name: An Alarming Discovery
episodes.overview: When a furious Patrick organises a devious plan to make Maxine confess, he makes an alarming discovery. Devastated that Ziggy has moved on so quickly, is there anything Ruby can do to win the man of her dreams back? Meanwhile, Vincent’s decision leaves Phoebe and George flabbergasted, while Danny is distraught to be faced with an impossible ultimatum.

episodes.name: The Memorial
episodes.overview: At the memorial service, one of the Savage brothers struggles to retain their silence. Will he keep quiet? And Vincent is back! He struggles to adjust to life back in Hollyoaks, leading to Phoebe making a shock proposition. Maxine receives some devastating news, and she doesn't know whether or not she can rely on Patrick for support. Meanwhile, one villager has finally found the family they so desperately wanted, but will they be accepted into family life?

episodes.name: Revelations
episodes.overview: Lindsey decides to spill the beans about Dr Browning's murder to Joe, but will Cindy's secret stop her? The deceit continues as Maxine lies to Patrick to save her relationship, but how long can she outsmart him for? Meanwhile, Vincent and Phoebe make plans for their future but, they face opposition from the McQueens. Will their happiness be short-lived?

episodes.name: Deception
episodes.overview: Cindy and Lindsey have to take drastic action to cover their criminal tracks. Theresa strikes up an unlikely friendship with a new girl in town, but does her new friend have an ulterior motive? And after so much heartbreak, Maxine and Patrick try to forgive each other against all the odds, although it might not be as easy as they hope. Meanwhile, Ruby makes a worrying discovery and Nancy's return causes a stir.

episodes.name: Trick or Treat?
episodes.overview: Lindsey and Cindy know they need to dispose of the evidence, but will anything change their minds? A loved Hollyoaks couple are forced to reunite. How close will they get, and what will the reaction be? In the Roscoe house, Joe is suspicious, but Lindsey is struggling with whether or not to tell him about her dark secret. Elsewhere, Sienna lands herself in money troubles, and Ruby gives in to her own paranoia.

episodes.name: Lies
episodes.overview: Sienna makes a desperate move for quick cash to ensure her sinister plan runs smoothly, but the risks are high. Lindsey tries to show Joe that she is ready for the big commitment, but Joe is struggling to cope with his own regret. Ruby tries her best to win back Ziggy, while he puts his efforts into avoiding her. And Danny tries to help Ste move on, while Cindy and Lindsey try to keep their evidence trail cold.

episodes.name: Fateful Findings
episodes.overview: Martha is handed a piece of evidence that knocks her for six, is the truth about her Ash's fate about to be uncovered? Meanwhile,the search continues for missing teenager Tom, but is he any nearer to being found? Sandy and Nancy can't help but be confused by Sienna's behaviour – the odds are finally stacking up against her. Elsewhere, John Paul is left feeling sorry for one of his students.

episodes.name: A Stern Warning
episodes.overview: As her lies accumulate, will Sienna’s evil plan backfire? Dodger's suspicions against his brother increase, but he receives a stern warning from Patrick to watch his step. Feeling guilty, John Paul attempts to put matters to rest and help out a friend, while Tony’s on edge as he wonders if his past will return to haunt him once more.

episodes.name: Hostage
episodes.overview: A frantic Will is driven to the extreme and, in a shocking turn of events, ends up holding his loved ones hostage: who will survive? Sam is alerted to Will and his malicious intentions, but she has to find supporting evidence to put an end to his cruel campaign. Elsewhere, Darren is still distressed by Sienna's lack of support, while she leaves a trail of devastation behind her.

episodes.name: Web of Lies
episodes.overview: As the wounded hostages try to reason with an increasingly manic Will, he cruelly silences anyone that crosses his path. Sienna’s web of lies is threatening to unravel, but can she maintain control of her illicit secret? Meanwhile, the police are hot on to a murderer's tracks, but time is ticking.

episodes.name: A Tragic Event
episodes.overview: In light of yesterday’s tragic events, a villager seeks to make amends with a close source. Sandy is left stunned as she is faced with the truth about Fraser’s identity, but just how much will she learn, and how will she react? Meanwhile, Ste gets on the wrong side of the village bad boy, Finn attempts to reach out to a loved one and Cindy is struggling to forget the ghost of her past…

episodes.name: Uncovered Truths
episodes.overview: One intrigued villager turns detective, but will they uncover the truth behind Browning's fate? Desperate, Cindy, Lindsey and Mercedes are forced to face up to their demons. Meanwhile Finn is pushed to the extremes with shocking consequences, and Nancy and Joe are left in an awkward situation.

episodes.name: Spiral of Events
episodes.overview: Freddie finds himself caught up in a spiral of overwhelming events in order to save a loved one and with emotions running high, who will be run to for comfort? And will the feelings be mutual? Elsewhere, Finn and Robbie plot their revenge on an unsuspecting victim, but they could be taking things too far. Will the truth about Joe and Nancy be exposed? And Trevor finds himself cutting a raw deal, while Dirk finds solace in an unlikely source.

episodes.name: A Stunning Discovery
episodes.overview: As Patrick catches wind of Finn and Robbie's cruel plan, is trouble in store for John Paul? Elsewhere, George is worried about Phoebe and Vincent as he makes a stunning discovery, but can he stop them before it's too late? Meanwhile, Phoebe is left devastated by her mum's harsh antics, and, under pressure, Joe makes a shock confession. Carmel struggles to look after a poorly baby Matthew, and Tony gets a shocking message...

episodes.name: The Biggest Mistake
episodes.overview: George, Tilly and Esther embark on a road trip to Ireland to stop Phoebe and Vincent from making a colossal mistake, but will they succeed? And when confronted by her friends, how will a furious Phoebe respond? Elsewhere Trevor offers a devastated villager a way out, whilst John Paul is left feeling utterly guilty. Meanwhile the Lomaxes can't help but question Danny's motives.

episodes.name: Confessions and Warnings
episodes.overview: Tony plays with fire as he attempts to cut a deal of his own - will he be taken seriously? And as the evidence is discovered by Diane, will he confess his sins? Darren's suspicions escalate, and Sam receives a stern warning.

episodes.name: Unsuspecting Villager
episodes.overview: Diane's heartache fuels Tony’s guilt, but is it enough for him to come clean? Sienna's left with a difficult decision to make, but will she show any signs of compassion and make the right choice? Worried about the discovery of Dr. Browning, Cindy leads an unsuspecting villager into a trap.

episodes.name: A Rekindling Relationship
episodes.overview: Browning’s body is discovered, but will the investigation into his death reveal his true murderers? Cindy prepares to reveal her dark secret to Dirk, but will he get the wrong end of the stick? Elsewhere, Jason goes missing, Holly makes a startling discovery, and, after reminiscing about old times, could Darren and Nancy be rekindling their relationship?

episodes.name: Autumn Sails
episodes.overview: As Darren and Nancy grow closer, can Nancy find it in her heart to forgive Darren and move forward? Meanwhile, It’s the day before Lindsey’s wedding, but a shocking accusation leaves her utterly devastated. Meanwhile, Cindy knocks the wind out of both Dirk and Mercedes’ sails, and Holly’s uncomfortable with Jason’s sexual advances.

episodes.name: The Show Must Go On
episodes.overview: Despite yesterday’s shocking developments, can Lindsey and Joe’s wedding go ahead? Elsewhere, Darren learns of Nancy’s betrayal, Holly and Ruby plot revenge when Holly is left mortified by Jason's antics, and bitter Sienna creates even more drama.

episodes.name: Robbie's Revenge
episodes.overview: Darren finds himself isolated from all his loved ones, but can he count on Nancy’s support? Sam’s desperation to put Trevor behind bars is apparent, but she doesn't quite have the evidence to send him down. Meanwhile, Freddie makes a shock confession, leaving scorned Sinead devastated. Robbie takes his revenge one step too far, and Sienna is comforted by an unlikely source.

episodes.name: Revenge
episodes.overview: Jason and Robbie find themselves in a dodgy situation... and Robbie's not going to let the culprits get away with it. Elsewhere, Darren finds Sienna in an emotional state, but is there anything he can do to stop her making a regrettable decision? Meanwhile, Maxine’s desperate to prove Patrick wrong and Ruby’s initial excitement is short-lived.

episodes.name: Left Hanging
episodes.overview: With Jack nowhere to be found, Frankie's attentions turn to a certain someone (mentioning no names, coughZiggycough)... but is he going to be left hanging? Across the village, Sinead is distraught as her love life hits the rocks, a false allegation turns one resident’s world upside down and Darren fights for justice... but a new piece of alarming evidence leaves everyone devastated.

episodes.name: Suspicions and Revelations
episodes.overview:
Sienna makes a startling revelation, but will she use the information to help the Osbornes?

Meanwhile, Ruby’s suspicions about the Zigmeister (or, err, Ziggy as most people call him) are piqued, Tony’s asked to perform a high risk job, and Robbie attempts to fix things between Holly and Jason.

episodes.name: Living Nightmare
episodes.overview: The village gather to congratulate Tony on his achievement, but he's a bit busy, y'know, being caught up in a LIVING NIGHTMARE. However, after a surprise twist of events, Tony's got a moral dilemma: should he leave Trevor for dead in order to save himself? Elsewhere, Ruby behaves erratically, Dodger rekindles old feelings and Jason is left feeling inadequate compared to his brother.

episodes.name: Make a Change
episodes.overview: Despite her denial, Frankie’s relationship is on the line, but is it too late for the Osbornes? In other 'Oaksy news, Dodger begs for Maxine’s affections, but how will she respond? Grace befriends heartbroken Ruby and Theresa, but does she have an idea up her sleeve? Meanwhile, Jason makes a change to be more like Ziggy.

episodes.name: Revelations
episodes.overview: It's the day of Tony and Diane's babies' naming ceremony, but when Trevor and Fraser realise that Tony's got an ulterior motive, he's in a whole heap of danger. On Grace's advice, Ruby plans to take revenge on Ziggy, while Cindy gives Mercedes a shoulder to cry on (yes, she can cry. Real tears and everything!). Meanwhile, the world is crashing down around Sienna as the truth behind her evil lies is revealed.

episodes.name: Revenge and Despair
episodes.overview: Sienna helplessly watches on as chaos descends around her, but will Dodger reveal the truth to the entire village? And it looks like Trevor could be in immense danger as Fraser makes a startling discovery, meanwhile Sam is disappointed to have lost her confidante. Ruby's plan for payback is starting to take shape, and Cindy is distraught to lose someone close to her.

episodes.name: Difficult Decisions
episodes.overview: Cindy and Mercedes go head-to-head over the welfare of Browning's baby, whilst Jim has an idea that could save Vincent from extradition, if he's willing to answer some tough questions. Elsewhere, Dennis is served a harsh remembrance, and Maxine is left worried about Patrick's reaction.

episodes.name: Desperation
episodes.overview: Tom becomes more desperate than ever to escape Sienna's clutches, while love could be in the air for Cindy and Dirk. And George is feeling hurt by Vincent's cold attitude, but is there an underlying reason for his frostiness?

episodes.name: Determination
episodes.overview: A very guilty Patrick attempts a huge display of affection, but it might not go all to plan. Cindy and Mercedes go head to head for Browning's inheritance, and Carmel grows suspicious of Jim's odd behaviour. Meanwhile, Vincent tries to find the courage to declare his true self, despite his fear, and Sam vows to get to the bottom of Fraser and Trevor's relationship.

episodes.name: The Realisation
episodes.overview: Patrick is feeling angry and humiliated, and Maxine tries everything she can to make it up to him. Mercedes attempts to scare Cindy off Browning's inheritance, and Carmel is left devastated as she discovers Jim's heart-breaking secret. Meanwhile, Esther and Tilly's romantic meal is a complete disaster, and Trevor has an idea up his sleeve.

episodes.name: Previous
episodes.overview: Realising that Cindy and Mercedes have a dark history, Dirk puts pressure on Cindy to figure out what she's hiding. Meanwhile, Carmel is left distraught by recent events. Elsewhere, Tilly struggles to hide her jealousy and Dodger reignites an old flame.

episodes.name: Misunderstandings
episodes.overview: Fraser serves a punishment that shatters someone's world, and Cindy leaves Mercedes inconsolable. A familiar face returns to the village, while the Lomax family get the wrong end of the stick. Sienna ups her game as she realises that Tom is on to her, and Tilly makes a move that surprises even herself.

episodes.name: Plan Before the Fall
episodes.overview: Sam is desperate to uncover the truth behind the attack, and Tegan makes a shocking admission. Recent events put Sienna's malicious plan in jeopardy, while Darren remains oblivious.

episodes.name: The Fall of Sienna
episodes.overview: Tilly begins to connect the dots behind one person's intentions and vows to out the truth, but is she playing with fire? Nancy makes a gob-smacking discovery and tries to make the rest of the village believe her. Meanwhile, desperate Sienna goes to new extremes to conceal her secret. Will her efforts be in vain?

episodes.name: Reparations
episodes.overview: While a very dangerous Sienna is on the loose, a broken Darren attempts to rekindle his relationship with Nancy. Tilly and Esther try to repair their relationship, and Phoebe is torn between jealousy and loyalty as Vincent tries to make bail.

episodes.name: Tête-à-tête
episodes.overview: Darren's worst nightmare unfolds in front of his eyes, and things are going to get even worse for him. Nancy and Sienna go head-to-head once again, and Jack makes a startling discovery.

episodes.name: False Friend
episodes.overview: Patrick is in utter despair - has he lost Sienna for good? Dodger attempts to comfort his best friend Darren, but is left paying the price for Sienna's deceptions. Meanwhile, Phoebe and George find a new ally in bad-boy Robbie, but they can't figure out whether he's only out to cause more trouble. And Ste attempts to bond with his sister, much to Sam's outrage.

episodes.name: Hope
episodes.overview: Can Dodger ever forgive his family for the devastating spiral of events? Darren is in turmoil as the cruel reality kicks in, but is there a light at the end of the tunnel? Meanwhile, as John Paul continues his secret affair, he becomes a victim of a cruel act of revenge, with shocking consequences. And Peri stuns her family at the school's Christmas concert.

episodes.name: Strange Comforts
episodes.overview: The truth about Danny's infidelities could come to light, while Ste talks away his worries with an unlikely source. Carmel is handed some life-changing information, and with no-one to turn to, Ruby starts to experiment…with Trevor (yes, you heard us right)!

episodes.name: Shrouded in Mystery
episodes.overview: Ste makes a decision that rocks the Lomaxes' world, and it doesn't look like anyone can change his mind. Leela is left confused by Tegan's mystery cheque, and Carmel struggles hiding her resentment towards Theresa. Meanwhile, Freddie is concerned by Sandy's secretive behaviour, but can't quite figure out what it is she's hiding. And Ruby is forced to choose between honesty and her family.

episodes.name: Evil Plots
episodes.overview: As Grace's hatred for Mercedes increases, she ensures Trevor's malicious plan is in full swing. Carmel believes she has found the answer to her prayers, but it might take a bit of convincing to get Jim onside. Sinead feels pushed out by a surprise arrival in the village, and the truth about Fraser is close to being exposed. And when Leela confronts Tegan about her findings, will the true identity of baby Rose's parents be revealed?

episodes.name: Christmas
episodes.overview: It's Christmas Day! Woohoo! Unfortunately, there doesn't seem to be smiles all around Hollyoaks village. Fraser is left shocked to the core to discover the whereabouts of his missing daughter, and Sinead struggles to contain her jealousy. Mercedes manages to find an inner generosity that seriously surprises the receiver, and Holly and Jason consider taking their relationship to the next level. Meanwhile, Carmel and Theresa struggle to put their differences aside, until they have a heart-stopping wake up call. And Freddie makes a discovery that turns his world upside down.

episodes.name: Sacrifice
episodes.overview: With a loved one in danger, will Freddie sell his soul to the devil? Desperate to save her relationship, Sinead is landed with a sickening ultimatum, and a lovesick Ziggy is given hope, but can Ruby really forgive him? Holly and Jason try to overcome their awkwardness, and Fraser makes an arrangement that could prove very costly for one villager…

episodes.name: Race Against Evil
episodes.overview: Can Freddie reach his loved one in time to save them from their deadly fate? And can he convince Mercedes to part with her cash for the sake of her life? Sinead is faced with the prospect of losing Freddie forever, and tries to come to a decision. Carmel is devastated by Jim's callous approach, and Ruby opens up about Frankie's betrayal to an unlikely source.

episodes.name: Suspicious Minds
episodes.overview: Fraser begins to vent his frustration as he learns of Freddie's underhand tactics, while Jason's suspicions of Sinead increases. Will he realise the reason behind her secrecy? Meanwhile, Finn tells Tony and Diane that he wants to see his daughter, and Ruby disguises her loneliness by turning to an unlikely source.

episodes.name: Bitter Sweet
episodes.overview: Ziggy is desperate to win back the love of his life, but his plan backfires in a way he hadn't quite expected. Tom is overwhelmed by the Osbornes' birthday gift to him, and Esther takes matters into her own hands. Elsewhere, Robbie and Finn make a bet that ends in disaster.

episodes.name: Torn
episodes.overview: Ziggy's makes a terrifying discovery which tears his world apart. John Paul is concerned for Finn's safety, and Tilly is left to make a difficult decision, but what - or who - will she pick? And Dodger gets a nasty shock when he receives a malicious email.

episodes.name: Anticipation
episodes.overview: Carmel's delighted when the opportunity to be a mum presents itself to her. Dodger is excited about his future, and is counting on no-one trying to burst his bubble. Meanwhile, Robbie jumps to his own conclusions about Finn's whereabouts…

episodes.name: Revenge
episodes.overview: Theresa's left high and dry; she's determined to seek revenge at any cost. Esther makes a heart-breaking decision that changes her life, and as John Paul makes another attempt to get through to Finn, Robbie further aggravates an already furious Diane.

episodes.name: How Much for Your Soul?
episodes.overview: Fraser attempts to buy Freddie off - just how far will Freddie go to remove himself from Fraser's shady clutches? What is being planned for John Paul? Theresa further fuels Carmel's anger as an old face returns, and Ste reaches a difficult decision with the help and support of Leela. Meanwhile, Diane and Tony learn the hard way that things aren't always as they seem…

episodes.name: Getting Away With it All
episodes.overview: Freddie searches for Fraser's accounts in order to save his own skin, and Theresa's world is turned upside down as an old face returns, leaving Carmel wondering if she's made a monumental mistake. Finn gets wound up by Robbie's taunts about John Paul, and Sinead struggles to contain her excitement about the upcoming wedding, but Diane doesn't exactly feel the same way. Meanwhile, Tony's faced with a setback, but has Ste got the solution?

episodes.name: Terrible Plans
episodes.overview: Will Finn's malicious plan succeed, or will he be discovered? Theresa is devastated at the prospect of losing her child - and her future - forever. Freddie finds himself needing to pull off yet another risky task, and love is in the air for an unsuspecting couple.

episodes.name: Horror
episodes.overview: John Paul unveils Nana McQueen's attacker, but the ordeal isn't over. Tony and Diane are left devastated by the events of yesterday, and need Trevor to answer their prayers. Meanwhile, Carmel tries to stop Theresa from making a huge mistake.

episodes.name: The Fallout
episodes.overview: John Paul struggles to come to terms with the trauma he was faced with yesterday, and tries to summon the courage to admit the truth. Finn desperately tries to get rid of the evidence, but it might not be enough. Danny and Ste rekindle their father-son relationship, while Robbie remains blissfully unaware of the horror-task his friend has just performed.

episodes.name: A Bitter Taste
episodes.overview: Fraser learns all about Trevor's betrayal, and Grace is terrified that she could lose the love of her life forever. When a devastated Sinead sees Freddie getting a bit close with someone he shouldn't, she seeks comfort elsewhere. And following his malicious attack, John Paul tries to brave his return to school. Will Finn confess to his ghastly deed?

episodes.name: Secrets
episodes.overview: Sinead discovers the truth about Freddie's secrecy, but she fears that the damage has already been done. Jim is under pressure from the vicious Grace and could be getting closer to revealing Freddie's treachery. Meanwhile Jason is shocked to realise the truth about his brother's betrayal.

episodes.name: The Wedding Day
episodes.overview: It's the day of Sinead and Freddie's wedding. Woohoooo! But as secrets are revealed (of course, it's a Hollyoaks wedding!), will the marriage go ahead? Elsewhere Grace blackmails an unlikely source to kill Mercedes, and Lindsey toys with revealing the truth about her darkest secret. And, wanting to help his sister, Dodger is forced to ask Darren a difficult question…

episodes.name: Determination
episodes.overview: Desperate Freddie knows that one of his loved ones is in grave danger and starts on a frantic search - will he reach them before it's too late? Meanwhile Nancy tries to summon the courage to face her demons, and Mercedes is led into the lion's den with devastating consequences.

episodes.name: Consequences
episodes.overview: Darren attempts to rekindle his relationship with Nancy, but it may prove to be as difficult as he'd expected. Freddie tries to do the right thing, but between his head and his heart, he can't quite figure out what that is. Grace, being as ruthless as ever, is determined to bring down anyone that gets in her way, and Fraser gives Freddie a hefty ultimatum.

episodes.name: Pressure Points
episodes.overview: As pressure mounts on Freddie, he has to decide whether to reveal the heart-breaking truth to his loved ones. Meanwhile, the Osbornes are left astounded by Darren's behaviour, but is everything as black and white as it seems? And Maxine’s excited as she organises a surprise engagement party for Patrick.

episodes.name: Surprise Surprise
episodes.overview: Nancy has a surprise in store for Darren, while Ruby’s confused by Ziggy’s odd behaviour. Desperate to impress Holly, what lengths will Jason go to impress her? And Maxine makes a discovery that rocks her world…

episodes.name: Dark Truths
episodes.overview: Mercedes’ suspicions of Sonny grows, Patrick begs Dodger not to reveal the dark truth about Sienna’s daughter and Jason has an idea, but is it enough to win back the girl of his dreams?

episodes.name: The Winner Takes it All
episodes.overview: Patrick is desperate to salvage his relationship with Sienna, but will she be won over? As a friend becomes more concerned for Maxine, will they realise the reality of her relationship with Patrick? And Fraser and Grace feel the pressure from an unlikely source.

episodes.name: A Silent Witness
episodes.overview: Nancy begs Maxine for answers, but will she have the courage to speak up? Meanwhile, Jason’s day goes from bad to worse, with horrifying consequences. Mercedes warns Carmel of her suspicions, but will her words fall on deaf ears? And Grace is determined to silence a Hollyoaks favourite once and for all.

episodes.name: Damage Control
episodes.overview: Fraser has to cover up Grace's mess once again and is furious about it, but he has bigger things to worry about. Jason is terrified as he's held by the police, while Tegan is set up on a date by Leela. And Maxine is left feeling that everything is her fault…

episodes.name: Interference
episodes.overview: Sandy's gobsmacked by a realisation that rocks her world, but in true Roscoe fashion, Freddie might just have an idea up his sleeve. John Paul tears the McQueen family apart, and Tegan gets involved in matters that she shouldn't.

episodes.name: Dilemmas
episodes.overview: Fraser is determined to bring a close source down, with devastating consequences. Will Trevor betray his boss to save an innocent? Sinead is desperate to uncover Lindsey's secret, and Carmel considers a fresh start away from Hollyoaks.

episodes.name: Mounting Pressure
episodes.overview: Freddie is feeling guilty and begins to bubble under pressure from Fraser to retain his silence. Sonny comforts an inconsolable Carmel, but everything might not be as it seems. Jason overhears a shocking conversation and has to decide whether to tell those affected, and Sam begins to buckle under Trevor's demands. Meanwhile, Lindsey is gutted to receive a callous text from a loved one…

episodes.name: Surprise Surprise
episodes.overview: Furious after the revelation about his father's death, Trevor comes face to face with Fraser in the ultimate showdown. The McQueens are rocked by a surprise return, and Freddie cosies up to Lindsey to try to take her mind off things.

episodes.name: The Deal
episodes.overview: Sinead is feeling under threat from Lindsey, and becomes desperate to give Freddie the best birthday ever. With nerves increasing about the grand opening of The Hutch, Ste tries to save the day as things go bad to worse for Tony.

episodes.name: Decision Time
episodes.overview: Furious after yesterday's revelation, Sinead gives Freddie a weighty ultimatum; what will he decide? Meanwhile, Tony is eager to ensure his business is given the very best start despite everything. John Paul takes his frustrations out on an old friend, and any prepares to write her first review for the paper.

episodes.name: Consequences
episodes.overview: Trevor is keen to put things right, but Fraser has different ideas, while Tony finds himself backed into a corner with Diane. Holly and Jason prepare for some alone time, and end up putting themselves in unthinkable danger, and when faced with his attacker at Parent's Evening, a desperate John Paul makes a bad decision.

episodes.name: Trapped
episodes.overview: As the fire engulfs the Deli, a frightened Holly and Jason are trapped. Will anyone manage to reach them in time? John Paul has the day from hell, and Tom is keen to impress Peri when babysitting at the McQueens.

episodes.name: The Beginning
episodes.overview: It's the grand opening of Tony's new restaurant. Woohoo! But Ste's deal with the devil casts a shadow over celebrations. Cindy's guilt over Browning's death increases as she begins to suspect someone else knows what they did. When John Paul admits to his outburst last night, how will Sam react? Meanwhile Dennis makes a business proposition, and Ruby can't help but be worried about Ziggy's latest idea...

episodes.name: The Phantom Freezer Unlocker
episodes.overview: Cindy is shocked to learn the identity of the phantom freezer unlocker, and the culprit may be very close to home. George tries to do everything he can to help Vincent on the day of his asylum appeal, and Ziggy makes a discovery that could change his future forever.

episodes.name: Distractions
episodes.overview: Ziggy takes his mind off yesterday's shocking find by distracting himself, but will he remain faithful to Ruby? Sonny finds some information on Jim, and tries to decide whether he should show it to Carmel. Phoebe is desperate to find a way to secure a happy future for Vincent and a helpless Cindy goes into labour.

episodes.name: Devastation and Suspicions
episodes.overview: Cindy receives some devastating news that turns her world upside down, but Mercedes may have a solution. Ruby is suspicious of Ziggy but at whose door will she land the blame? George is upset by Vincent’s decision and begs him to change his mind whilst Leela’s shocked to find herself waking in Ziggy’s bed…

episodes.name: Dilemmas
episodes.overview: As Mercedes pulls out all the stops to ensure Cindy’s baby survives, she is met with a dilemma… Ziggy tries to prove his faithfulness to Ruby, whist Jack and Frankie’s relationship is on the rocks. Meanwhile, Cindy’s grateful to have a shoulder to cry on, and Tegan has a cunning idea to get what she wants.

episodes.name: Suspicions Grow...
episodes.overview: Grace’s suspicions grow, as she is about to discover a truth that could rock her world. Mercedes is left speechless as a source very close to Dr Browning plots to uncover the truth behind his death… Dennis and Dodger attempt to help Sienna find her long lost daughter, whilst Darren begins to move on from Nancy.

episodes.name: Furious Freddie
episodes.overview:
Despite knowing it will break Sandy's heart, will Jason confess what he saw to his mum? Darren's nervous to discover Oscar's operation is booked in for tomorrow, but will Nancy agree to let it go ahead? Meanwhile, Vincent's faced with an amazing prospect away from the village, and he must decide if he wants George or the job.

Elsewhere, Freddie is furious when he thinks Lindsey has moved on, and Dodger searches high and low for clues that could lead Sienna to her missing daughter...

episodes.name: Walls Close In
episodes.overview: Nancy is devastated by Darren's lack of consideration. As the walls close in on Freddie and Sinead, they begin to wonder whether they'll be forced to admit the truth. Meanwhile, Tegan's embarrassed by her family, but she's thankful when a friend offers a shoulder of support. Elsewhere, Fraser is forced to take action to safeguard Grace's secret.

episodes.name: A Helpful Sam
episodes.overview: Freddie has no option but to hurt Lindsey, but in turn forces her to make a drastic decision. Sam empowers John Paul, but can he reason with Patrick in order to save his career? Leela can't hide her crush on Darren so Tegan organises a date, but Nancy isn't pleased.

episodes.name: Red-faced
episodes.overview: When Finn gets himself into a life-threatening situation, will John Paul find the strength to rescue his attacker? When Freddie finds out about Lindsey's devastating decision, he needs to pick who needs his support the most: Lindsey or Sinead. Meanwhile, Dodger leaves Dennis feeling very red-faced…

episodes.name: Life or Death
episodes.overview: John Paul is faced with the dilemma of saving Finn or letting him die. Dennis' situation goes from bad to worse, Darren has an awkward date with Leela, and Sinead is terrified for her daughter as she rushes baby Katy into hospital…but where is Freddie?

episodes.name: Misunderstandings
episodes.overview: Robbie is hell-bent on getting revenge. What will John Paul do when he's pushed to the extreme? Sinead is left heartbroken as her family turn their backs on her, and hopes that new evidence might change their minds. Meanwhile, Nancy might get the wrong end of the stick when she finds Leela sleeping at Darren's flat, and Dennis wonders whether he's finally found love after Leanne.

episodes.name: Big Decisions
episodes.overview: Lindsey fears the worst when Diane wants justice for Katy. Elsewhere, Dennis' new friendship hits the rocks, while Darren and Leela get to know each other better.

episodes.name: Spiral Downwards
episodes.overview: Things go from bad to worse for Sinead. John Paul hits an all-time low, and nothing seems to be able to pick him up. Dodger and Patrick go to see Sienna and Dodger worries that his sister is taking the wrong advice. And Sandy worries that she may lose another son.

episodes.name: Freedom?
episodes.overview: Maxine has to decide whether to speak out about her abuse, or abide by Patrick, as he puts her under a lot of pressure to change her plea in court. Will Jason go to jail? Nancy and Darren share a touching moment; has Darren really moved on? Meanwhile, Sinead is devastated as her world spirals out of control, and Sienna's keener than ever to be discharged into the village…

episodes.name: Repercussions
episodes.overview: Maxine is left dealing with the consequences of yesterday's betrayal, and Nancy's past catches up with her and gets her in big trouble. And love is in the air for Carmel and Sonny.

episodes.name: Discoveries
episodes.overview: Tegan struggles to keep away from Fraser, how long can they keep their affair a secret? Robbie makes a shocking discovery, but has Holly been cheating on Jason? Nancy starts a petition to get her arch enemy out the village, but will Tom take the campaign too far? And Frankie’s devastated as she doesn’t think she’s enough for Jack…

episodes.name: Big Decisions
episodes.overview: It’s decision time for Fraser, but who will he leave heartbroken? Sienna steps up the hunt for her daughter, but do old habits die hard? Is it all over for Holly and Jason or can he save their relationship? Meanwhile, Jack is desperate to woo Frankie and takes matters into his own hands.

episodes.name: Ulterior Motives
episodes.overview: Dirk pulls out all the stops to cheer up his friend, but how will Frankie react? As Grace learns the truth, she offers Tegan her friendship, but should Tegan be wary? Blessing is desperate for a job, but lands herself in hot water with the boss. Sienna is desperate to prove her innocence, but will anyone believe her?

episodes.name: Bad Days
episodes.overview: Grace tries to make a deal with Tegan, but when faced with danger, will Tegan accept? Will Frankie’s attempts at saving her relationship be successful? Nancy is caught in an emotional dilemma. Blessing’s trial shift at The Hutch goes from bad to worse, and Sam, Danny and Sandy are all in for the shock of their lives…

episodes.name: Everything Falls Apart
episodes.overview: Fraser’s world comes crashing down around him, but is this only the beginning? Will Blessing find out Ste’s big secret? Sinead needs to watch out as Robbie is ready to cause some trouble and Jason is left crushed and focuses his attention elsewhere.

episodes.name: Innocence?
episodes.overview: With the latest shock weighing heavy on Ste's mind, he has to decide whether to risk everything and reveal all to the police. Maxine is terrified about her court case; will she be sent to jail? Elsewhere, the finger of blame is being pointed at Blessing. And Sinead is driven to extremes to try to win back her daughter, but nothing could have prepared her for what will happen next…

episodes.name: Indecent Positions
episodes.overview: Freddie is furious about the exploitation of his girlfriend, but could he use this terrible situation to his benefit? As Ste searches high and low for his children, he hopes that his worst fears won't be confirmed. Will Maxine's secret be discovered? Meanwhile, Ziggy and Frankie find themselves in a compromising position. Oops!

episodes.name: Surprise
episodes.overview: Sinead is desperate to win back her daughter and will do anything to succeed. Mercedes is on a mission to get her friends back, but Cindy and Lindsey might not want to accept her apology. And Patrick shocks Maxine by surprising her with an unusual gift.

episodes.name: Desperation
episodes.overview: Distraught Sinead must decide what to do with Freddie's offer weighing heavy on her mind. Maxine makes a shocking discovery, but how will Sienna retaliate? Ste is caught in a tricky situation, and Lindsey's gutted to say goodbye to a friend.

episodes.name: Underhanded
episodes.overview: Sienna continues to blackmail Maxine, but Patrick begins to notice Maxine's odd behaviour. Elsewhere it's a race against time for Freddie and Sinead, and two teens have the shock of their lives...

episodes.name: Grave Danger
episodes.overview: Alex Browning is determined to uncover the truth about his father's death; so is Mercedes, Lindsey and Cindy's darkest secret about to be revealed? As a shadow from her past returns to the village, Grace is put in grave danger. Jason and Holly are desperate to get the morning after pill. Maxine is shocked at the lengths Sienna is prepared to go to prove Peri is her daughter, and Dennis' new business venture has an eventful opening…

episodes.name: Ray of Light
episodes.overview: With yesterday's events weighing heavy on his mind, Trevor is more determined than ever to bid farewell to his violent lifestyle, but how simple will it be to go straight? Dirk attempts to take the rap, but has he made matters a whole lot worse? Danny gives John Paul a ray of light. Meanwhile, will Holly discover the truth about her mum?

episodes.name: Go Your Own Way
episodes.overview: Cindy braces herself for some tough questioning at the station. At John Paul’s plea hearing, is he strong enough to stand up in court against his attacker? Determined to get his own way, Fraser makes certain that Trevor will commit one last job for him…

episodes.name: Peri's Problem
episodes.overview: Trevor drives his nemesis to the middle of nowhere, but is it game over for his father's killer? Danny and John Paul bid a passionate farewell to one another, but will their illicit affair go unnoticed? Tom helps Peri overcome her new fear, and Robbie is terrified about court tomorrow.

episodes.name: The Day of the Trial
episodes.overview: It's the day of John Paul’s sentencing; will Robbie step up and do the right thing by his teacher? Reeling from her discovery, will Peri reveal all? Meanwhile, Trevor seeks the ultimate revenge. Elsewhere, Nancy’s left with food for thought, and Mercedes concocts an elaborate plan to save her brother from prison…

episodes.name: Coming to Terms
episodes.overview: Danny's desperate to make sure that Peri stays silent, with devastating consequences for the Lomax family. Nancy's got first day nerves when she starts her new job, and is desperate for it to be a success. Leela gives Ste the extra push he needs to speak to John Paul, but will her efforts be in vain?

episodes.name: To Tell or Not to Tell?
episodes.overview: Maxine thinks she'll be able to keep her community service secret from Patrick, but not for long. As Ste realises the weight of Peri's discovery, he has to decide whether or not to reveal the truth to Sam. Has Tony been completely honest with Diane? Sinead is hopeful that from a distance she can still be a good mum, and won't let anyone or anything scupper her plans. Meanwhile, Darren feels second best, and Lindsey delivers some heart-wrenching news.

episodes.name: Awkward Conversations
episodes.overview: Yesterday's life-shattering reveal gives Danny an unexpected opportunity. Darren tries his best to persuade Diane to finally forgive Tony. And how will Maxine react when she's confronted about Patrick's abuse?

episodes.name: Rumbled?
episodes.overview: Diane's attitude tips Sinead over the edge, and Freddie's secret plan is in place, but will Finn play ball? Tony has an important question to ask Diane, but it might not be the joyous occasion he had planned. Sienna realises that trying to befriend her daughter's family without raising their suspicions might be a tough feat…

episodes.name: Confrontations
episodes.overview: Sinead is grateful for a chance to prove herself, but will it all go horribly wrong? Diane struggles to comprehend the day's events, whilst Darren is left reeling at Nancy when she gets a little to close for comfort to Patrick.

episodes.name: Malintent?
episodes.overview: With baby Katy’s health seriously declining, Finn’s suspicions grow, but does he really believe his sister could be to blame? Ste is intent on getting revenge on Fraser Black, and a charming as ever Ziggy makes somebody’s day. On her way to work, Leela is horrified to be met by a shocking scene of devastation.

episodes.name: Desperation
episodes.overview: Leela helps Sinead out of the wreckage, but will she be okay? Will she manage to reach Katy in time? And will Diane believe the cutting accusation against her own daughter? Meanwhile, Peri is chuffed to receive a special visitor, and Dodger tries his best to win Dennis a hot date with Blessing.

episodes.name: Devastation
episodes.overview: Sinead struggles to come to terms with the awful news, and is desperate for her husband not to turn his back on her in her hour of need. The police edge closer to catching the person responsible for the crash. Elsewhere, Blessing reveals her true feelings to Dennis and Peri’s decision infuriates her family, and Ste has had enough.

episodes.name: Carpe Diem
episodes.overview: Freddie wants to be there for Sinead, but it might be too little too late. Peri attempts to live her life to the full - could love be in the air for her and Tom (awwwwwwwww!)? An insightful revelation leaves one of the Lomaxes gobsmacked. Ste makes a discovery that could change everything, while Sandy could be about to discover the whereabouts of her missing son…

episodes.name: Confrontation
episodes.overview: John Paul is forced to truthfully answer some tough questions, but the outcome leaves him feeling totally isolated. Ste is desperate to prove Sinead’s innocence, but Sonny is struggling to believe him. Meanwhile, it’s a hard day for the Roscoes as they celebrate what would have been Joe’s 30th birthday.

episodes.name: A New Start?
episodes.overview: Confused, Lindsey seeks advice off Mercedes but is unsure whether she should take it. Meanwhile, Freddie is over the moon, until he gets the shock of his life. Sienna learns of Maxine’s secret and is torn about whether she should reveal the truth to Patrick. Dennis is concerned for his friend, while Dodger is given hope of a rekindled relationship. Trevor is left intrigued by an interesting proposition.

episodes.name: Frayed Relations
episodes.overview: Things get worse for Maxine, and Lindsey doesn't know whether she stills feel the same way towards Freddie. In order to regain control, Fraser searches for information to blackmail Freddie with. Grace is furious with Trevor and she can’t understand why he’d betray her.

episodes.name: A Chance to Escape?
episodes.overview: Trevor and Grace prepare for their life away from Fraser. Can anything - or anyone - tempt them back to the village? Freddie and Lindsey are left with little choice but to reveal the truth, but it might come much too late. Patrick tries his manipulative best as he tries to save his relationship with Maxine. Dennis tells Dodger that it’s now or never, and Sonny’s determined to find out the truth about Katy’s death.

episodes.name: Despair
episodes.overview: It’s the day of Katy’s funeral and Ste is furious to discover that Sinead knows nothing about it. Is there anything he can say to ensure a catatonic Sinead says a final goodbye to her daughter? Sonny delivers some life-changing news, while Grace leaves Trevor astounded by revealing her deadly goal…

episodes.name: Farewell
episodes.overview: Diane’s farewell is short-lived as a grief-stricken Sinead interrupts. Will Grace still be intent on following through with her evil plan? Tegan is devastated to realise the extent of her statement, but when Leela overhears, how will she react? Ste is gutted to realise that he’s receiving the full brunt of Fraser’s lies.

episodes.name: Is it the Truth?
episodes.overview: Sinead is shocked when a guilt-ridden Ste is arrested for murder, while Fraser tries everything to win Tegan over before she goes to the police. Joe is determined to make Fraser pay, and Lindsey is scared that she will lose her job as Katy’s death is investigated.

episodes.name: Teaming Up
episodes.overview: Joe joins unlikely forces with Trevor and Grace to get revenge on Fraser, but is he walking right into a trap? Ste hits rock bottom as Sinead struggles to come to terms with his betrayal. Sandy toys with allowing Fraser back into her life. Meanwhile, Tegan makes a shock confession to her family, and with Jim’s evidence in his hand, Sonny struggles with his conscience.

episodes.name: The Plan
episodes.overview: Joe outlines his plan to kill Fraser, unaware that Grace has a plan of her own. Sam is determined to get to the truth, while a hard-up Nana inadvertently sells Jim’s confession DVD. Can Sonny get it back before it falls into the wrong hands?

episodes.name: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
episodes.overview: The plan is in place to kill Fraser, but can Grace go through with it? A panicked Joe and Freddie realise Sandy’s life is in danger, while Ste stumbles upon new evidence. And Mercedes tries her hardest to persuade Cindy to keep her options open and go to the ball.

episodes.name: Tipping Point
episodes.overview: Will Joe and Freddie get to Sandy in time to save her? Will Cindy betray Dirk and will Mercedes bag her dream man? Elsewhere Trevor is desperate to flee before the choice is taken out of his hands, and Tegan is left with a life changing decision to make.

episodes.name: Revenge
episodes.overview: Hot on his heels, will Sandy find Fraser before he gets to Tegan? Grace is hell bent on revenge, but can Trevor persuade her to do the right thing? Meanwhile, Cindy has to work hard to win Dirk back, but there’s a shock in store for Holly. Elsewhere, Joe discovers Freddie is helping out a sworn enemy. He ain't happy about it either.

episodes.name: Boxing Night
episodes.overview: Sam is fearful that Danny has been pushed to the edge, but it’s Tegan who makes a grim discovery. Joe and Freddie have a bit of a boxing match at The Hutch, while Mercedes cosies up to a brooding Trevor. In the light of recent news, Ste tries to make peace with Sinead but will her reaction send him on a downward spiral?

episodes.name: Freakin' Out
episodes.overview: After a rocky few days, is Grace prepared to bail Trevor out? Meanwhile, suspicions are rife in the Roscoe household. After discovering a body, a freaked out Holly wants Jason to flee the village with her. Sam resorts to desperate measures to save her family, and is Sonny any closer to solving his case?

episodes.name: The Net is Closing In
episodes.overview: The net is closing in on the Lomaxes, but how far is Ste prepared to go to protect himself and his family? At the Roscoes, Lindsey and Sandy want answers, but will they get to the truth before anyone else does? When Holly turns to crime to fund her plan, Jason has to decide whether or not to come to her rescue.

episodes.name: Shockwaves Through the Village
episodes.overview: A new development in the murder enquiry sends shockwaves through the village. Guilty feelings are running high at both the Lomaxes and the Roscoes, while Grace attempts business as usual. Meanwhile, as Holly’s determined to go ahead with her plan, what does Jason have up his sleeve?

episodes.name: Desperation
episodes.overview: Maxine witnesses a horrific incident, but getting Patrick to believe her is a different matter. Jason risks everything to get Holly her promised money, but their freedom will only come at an even higher cost. Holly attempts to rekindle her relationship with her mum. Phoebe comes one step closer to discovering the horrors that John Paul has suffered, and George takes matters into his own hands.

episodes.name: Turning Point
episodes.overview: Desperate to impress, Patrick is humiliated in an extremely embarrassing way, while Maxine attends her 12 week scan alone. As the magnitude of Jason’s blackmail hits home with Holly, the pair must decide whether or not to leave the village forever. Finn takes his bullying to the next level, but will his plan go disastrously wrong? And what is Blessing hiding?

episodes.name: The Blame
episodes.overview: As the truth behind Patrick’s behaviour is revealed, he looks for someone to blame. Holly’s thrilled to finally meet her grandmother, but the feeling isn't completely reciprocated. Cindy is left devastated as she prepares baby Hilton to fight for his life, while Blessing is worried about the new arrival in the village.

episodes.name: Detective Work
episodes.overview: Blessing receives an unwelcome visitor, and a vigilant Nancy does everything to try to figure out who spiked Patrick’s drink. Cindy is getting more and more eager for her daughter to come home. Meanwhile, Robbie can’t help feeling disappointed in Phoebe, and Holly has a difficult decision to make.

episodes.name: Repairable?
episodes.overview: Patrick attempts to reconcile with Maxine, but he may have pushed her too far this time. Holly’s grandma makes a bold decision that might be enough to ensure the teens return home. As Sonny comforts a devastated Sinead, Carmel gets the wrong end of the stick. And elsewhere, Phoebe tries to win back Robbie’s friendship.

episodes.name: Call The Cops!
episodes.overview: As Sandy returns to find her son missing, can Cindy prevent her from calling the police? Joe attempts to reconcile with Lindsey and Sinead reveals she will do anything to get justice for Katy, leaving a source close to her concerned. Meanwhile, Sienna tries to get closer to Peri…

episodes.name: Money, Money, Money... and Nana
episodes.overview: At Katy’s hearing, will Sinead get the answer she craves? Will Lindsey’s affair with Freddie be made public? Sonny admits his deepest secret, but will his confidant be able to keep quiet? As Nana McQueen’s money troubles worsen, an unexpected villager offers a random act of kindness. Sienna ups her game to win over the Lomaxes, and Sandy, Tegan and Grace go head to head at Fraser’s will reading.

episodes.name: What Lies Ahead?
episodes.overview: When Sinead concocts a malicious plan to bring down her arch enemy, is she getting in too deep? Sienna is left devastated as her chance to get close to Peri fails. Grace visits an old flame, who gives her food for thought. Nana is excited by a new job prospect, and nothing can prepare Lindsey for the day’s events that lie ahead of her…

episodes.name: I Got You Under My Spell
episodes.overview: Vulnerable Ste finds himself under Grace’s spell. Ziggy puts his foot down to a modelling job, leaving his agent high and dry. And just what is Peri up to?

episodes.name: Havoc
episodes.overview: Under Grace’s grasp, Ste’s in bigger trouble than he could ever have imagined. Does Tegan have a solution to her brother’s problem, or will she make matters worse? Sienna causes havoc for the Lomaxes, and is love in the air for Leela and Ziggy? Meanwhile, George considers internet dating…

episodes.name: Misunderstandings?
episodes.overview: As George fantasises about his date he wonders whether it can go any further, and Nana McQueen tries her best to repay Ziggy’s kindness. With their money fast running out, Jason and Holly begin to panic about what to do. Is love on the cards for Dennis and Blessing? And will the Lomaxes grow wise to Sienna’s wicked ways?

episodes.name: Danger
episodes.overview: It’s the day of the school play, but no one is prepared for the shocking grand finale. George's guilt gets the better of him, but will he feel any better after a pep talk from Ziggy? Holly and Jason find themselves in graver danger than they’d realised. Tom’s worried about Sienna, and is desperate for Peri to heed his warnings. Dennis has had enough of Blessing acting suspicious, and manages to massively jump the gun.

episodes.name: Panic
episodes.overview: Still reeling from yesterday’s revelation, it seems like this could be the end of the Lomaxes. Despite Dennis trying to clear up the misunderstanding, he thinks he’s lost Blessing forever. And Jason tries desperately to reach Holly, as his condition deteriorates.

episodes.name: A Big Meeting
episodes.overview: When Jason is forced to admit that he can’t go home, his new-found acquaintance tries to come up with a solution. Sienna makes Peri’s wildest dreams come true, but with the Lomaxes hot on their heels, will the pair leave the village forever? Meanwhile Dennis’ odd behaviour leaves everyone confused and worried.

episodes.name: Confrontation
episodes.overview: When someone close to Jason fights for his freedom, is Sonny's time up? Jason is desperate to make amends with Holly, but he’s sure he’s missed his chance. When Dennis makes his move Blessing reveals a secret from her past to a surprised Tony.

episodes.name: The Matchmaker
episodes.overview: After Tony’s advice, does Blessing have the confidence to tell Dennis her innermost secret? Can Holly forgive Jason? Meanwhile, Sinead’s plan spirals out of control and Robbie is confused by his brother’s secrecy.

episodes.name: Suspicious Minds
episodes.overview: When Sinead and Carmel rally around to receive charity funding, Diane is left devastated as she learns about her daughter’s condition. As Joe’s suspicions increase, can he convince Lindsey to get concrete proof? Will Tony’s restaurant review go off without a hitch? Ste’s left feeling more alone than ever, and Phoebe gets jealous.

episodes.name: Antics
episodes.overview: Emotions are heightened at the fundraiser, but can Sinead keep her secret hidden? Patrick and Maxine arrive back from their holiday and are horrified to discover Sienna’s recent antics, while Phoebe checks Robbie’s phone as her jealously heightens.

episodes.name: Danger! Danger!
episodes.overview: With a poignant day ahead, Sinead sets out to ensure justice for Katy is finally achieved. Are Freddie and Lindsey in more danger than they realised? Is Sienna any closer to finding her long lost daughter? Meanwhile, Trevor attempts to uncover the truth about Fraser’s murder.

episodes.name: Misread Signals
episodes.overview: Freddie resigns himself to admit the truth about him and Lindsey, but will she reveal the extent of her infidelity? A heartbroken Sinead grows closer to Sonny, but has she misread the signals?

episodes.name: The Pact
episodes.overview: Sandy is still reeling from Lindsey’s revelation, but will she out the truth and risk splitting up the Roscoes for good? Nana’s concerns grow as she watches a blossoming friendship, and she massively gets the wrong end of the stick. Maxine struggles to bring herself to tell Patrick that their baby may have Downs Syndrome, while Ste and Freddie make a deadly pact.

episodes.name: Lies
episodes.overview: Dodger battles to suppress his feelings for Maxine, but will anything make him change his mind? Freddie breaks Sandy’s heart, while she could have inadvertently found the answer to his prayers. When a pair of boxers are found in her room by Cindy, Holly faces some difficult and awkward questions. Could this be the end of Holly and Jason? Furious, Carmel gives Sonny an ultimatum.

episodes.name: Speed Dating
episodes.overview: Will Maxine stick by Patrick, despite his callous remarks? Tensions run high between Blessing and Dennis as a speed-dating event brings home their feelings for one another. Meanwhile, Blessing is gobsmacked as her past begins to haunt her. Holly tries to hide the truth about her infidelity and makes up with Jason, but how long can she keep this secret?

episodes.name: The Truth
episodes.overview: Wanting the best case scenario, Holly’s lies spiral out of control, with life-changing consequences for one unsuspecting villager. After a shock encounter, Tony encourages Blessing to tell the truth, but she’s struggling to find the courage to open up. Maxine is left confused and distraught; what will she decide? Elsewhere, Finn seems to have set his sights on his next victim…

episodes.name: Malice Spreads
episodes.overview: As Cindy stands by her daughter, Dirk is forced to make an impossible decision. Sinead is confused by Finn’s odd behaviour, but will she convince Diane and Tony to take action against the troubled teen? Dennis has a lot on his mind, leaving everyone around him concerned. Meanwhile, a day of fun turns incredibly sinister for Blessing, and Robbie struggles with his mock A levels.

episodes.name: A Dangerous Plan
episodes.overview: Sinead is desperate to prove to Diane that Finn is up to no good. Will Dennis find it in his heart to make up with Blessing? It’s exam day and Nancy is shocked to find the papers have been opened, but student is behind it? Meanwhile, Sandy’s worried for an ill-looking Darren, and Freddie forms a dangerous plan…

episodes.name: Tearing a Family Apart
