Elsewhere, Simone informs Lindsey that she has bought her flat and plans to move in right away.

episodes.name: Uncovered Secrets
episodes.overview: Kim finds a silky camisole underneath Dylan’s clothes, and Nico jumps to conclusions. Jason tries to get rid of any evidence from the car crash but ends up discovering something a lot worse. Cleo receives some suspicious CCTV footage which makes her doubt Harry, and Freddie tells Lindsey that he has found somewhere for them to live, which could be controversial.

episodes.name: Background Check
episodes.overview: Ben is having issues with his new recruit and decides to do some digging. Nico is fed some lies to protect Dylan’s secret, this backfires and Sienna finds herself in danger. Elsewhere, Harry has to prove himself to Cleo in order to regain her trust.

episodes.name: Breaking Point
episodes.overview: Dr S'Avage agrees to help Sienna, but after realising the truth about Dylan, Nico begs for Sienna’s forgiveness, but it could be too late. Porsche goes to desperate measures to gather some cash, while Cindy tries to relieve some of Jason’s tension. Meanwhile, Esther is surprised when Kim tells her about Kath.

episodes.name: Looking for Comfort
episodes.overview: Sienna regrets her actions, and finds solace in a certain doctor’s arms. Celine gets involved in some dodgy dealings to stop Porsche from going too far, and Reenie arrives in the village. Meanwhile Grace tests Esther’s feelings for Kim to prove a point.

episodes.name: Happy Families
episodes.overview: Grace is overwhelmed with jealousy when Dylan’s mum turns up at the hospital. Reenie invites the family to lunch at The Dog and insists she’s staying for good, so Porsche hatches a plan to send her straight back to prison.

episodes.name: Dark Revelations
episodes.overview: Things take a sinister turn when Reenie’s boyfriend Pete arrives at the McQueens and a dark revelation is uncovered. Elsewhere, Grace is in hospital and a love-struck Kim continues with her malicious antics.

episodes.name: Blinded from the Truth
episodes.overview: Porsche is devastated when Reenie accuses her of lying about Pete’s assault. John Paul offers to babysit baby Hay as Ste struggles to juggle work and fatherhood, while Sinead wishes to reveal her secret crush.

episodes.name: Cry Wolf
episodes.overview: Sinead is convinced that John Paul wants Ste back so she causes havoc to gain Ste’s attention. Sienna helps Dr S’avage clean out Mariam’s house, but finds there are a number of precious items missing.

episodes.name: Part-Time Burglars
episodes.overview: Cameron and Celine break into Mariam’s house and plan to get a painting back for Dr S’Avage. An argument erupts between Sinead and Ste, which leads him to visit someone from the past.

episodes.name: 50 Shades of Cindy
episodes.overview: There’s some awkward chemistry in the air when Cindy begins to pen an erotic novel and ropes Jason into helping her. Ste insists he wants to do the ‘family thing’ with Sinead, and Nico plans a chilling revenge for her mother.

episodes.name: Blake vs McQueen
episodes.overview: Reenie and Sienna battle it out for a job at Price Slice, whilst Nico collapses in the flat after her malicious plan to hurt her mother goes terribly wrong.

episodes.name: Against Time
episodes.overview: Phoebe’s health is deteriorating as John Paul desperately tries to find a way to get through to her. Elsewhere, Scott is disgusted to hear Sinead wants him to move out of the flat.

episodes.name: All Aboard The Party Bus
episodes.overview: Lockie attempts to calm a troubled Porsche from drinking her problems away, but his efforts are wasted when she leaves on a party bus. Elsewhere, John Paul breaks the news of Phoebe’s unconsciousness to a heartbroken Robbie.

episodes.name: Secrets Under Covers
episodes.overview: Porsche returns home from another night out, grabs Lockie and takes him upstairs to the shock of John Paul who catches them in the act. Dr S’Avage presents a twinkle of hope for the McQueens, but a grief-stricken Robbie endeavours to halt Phoebe’s treatment.

episodes.name: No Entry
episodes.overview: Robbie persists to barricade Phoebe’s hospital room door, while the McQueens desperately struggle to get in. Elsewhere, Tegan is put-out by the return of loved-up Leela and Ziggy.

episodes.name: Mistaken Identity
episodes.overview: Thinking that Grace shot Phoebe, Robbie seeks help in getting revenge. Meanwhile, Tegan is furious to see her potential date giving Celine flowers.

episodes.name: Guilty Conscience
episodes.overview: Joe decides to hand himself in to the police for shooting Phoebe, while Trevor is distracted in the flat by Val, unaware that Kim’s hidden camera is watching them.

episodes.name: Say Cheese!
episodes.overview: Val makes a move on Trevor and kisses him, which is all caught on camera. At the garage, Mercedes urges Robbie to stop Joe going to the police with a reason he can’t ignore.

episodes.name: Photo Bomb
episodes.overview: During Esther’s baby shower, Kim maliciously shows Grace the photos of Val and Trevor kissing. Elsewhere, Ziggy is seething with jealousy when he returns to find Tegan and Tony getting cosy with a game of Twister.

episodes.name: The Power of Love
episodes.overview: Grace starts pretending she’s in love with Kim to keep her sweet. Tony arranges a drink with Tegan, only for it to be sabotaged by a jealous ex, but whose? Elsewhere, Scott plans revenge on Ste and Sinead, and Holly realises the messages from Zoe aren’t coming from Switzerland…

episodes.name: Green with Envy
episodes.overview: Ziggy tries to tell Tegan that Tony is using her, but Tony manages to convince her otherwise. Elsewhere, Dirk fools Cindy into thinking she’s won a writer’s competition. In the Magic Bean, Holly messages ‘Zoe’ and is shocked to see a message arrive on a phone where Louis Loveday is at.

episodes.name: Biting the Bullet
episodes.overview: Thinking Louis is behind the messages from Zoe, Holly, Cleo and Harry tell Zack about the folder. Elsewhere, Tegan threatens to flee the village with Rose after getting into an argument with Diane, but is there an even bigger shock in store?

episodes.name: Doing the Right Thing?
episodes.overview: Leela suspects Diane is lying about her whereabouts when Rose was snatched, so she heads to The Hutch for clues. Elsewhere in the village, everyone is shocked when the police make an arrest.

episodes.name: Incriminating Evidence
episodes.overview: DS Thorpe questions Tegan, while Tony asks Darren to give him an alibi. Elsewhere, Zack is furious when Louis doesn’t stand up for their family, and Ben and Sienna’s relationship continues to bloom.

episodes.name: Lights, Camera, Action!
episodes.overview: Accusations are thrown around the village for the kidnapping of baby Rose. During the press conference, Tony suspects the worst and drops Diane in the firing line. Elsewhere, Louis tells Zack they’ve decided to leave Hollyoaks.

episodes.name: Master of Manipulation
episodes.overview: Patrick attempts to meddle in Sienna's love life by insinuating that Ben is no good for her. Meanwhile, a hooded intruder is spotted in a family home.

episodes.name: Independent Woman
episodes.overview: Patrick maliciously flaunts Minnie in the village, but Maxine is stronger than ever with a new business venture to secure a future for her and Minnie. Meanwhile, Jason becomes increasingly jealous of Holly and Zack’s relationship.

episodes.name: Should I Stay or Should I Go?
episodes.overview: An argument erupts between Sienna and Patrick, so Ben gives her the choice to leave with him and offers his hand. Elsewhere, the attraction between Jason and Cindy is uncontrollable.

episodes.name: Loyalty Lies
episodes.overview: Pete attempts to fit in within the village, while Porsche is devastated to see Lockie socialising with her abuser. Sienna takes extreme measures after Nico warns her about the possibility of another woman in Ben’s life.

episodes.name: Secrets and Lies
episodes.overview: Ben’s past starts catching up with him, while Robbie flies into a fit of rage after a heartbreaking discovery. Elsewhere, Porsche despairs when some sinister secrets bubble to the surface.

episodes.name: A United Front
episodes.overview: The McQueens are in meltdown, but can they pull together for Phoebe’s funeral? Lockie and Porsche are at breaking point, and Mercedes is devastated when Joe gives her a few home truths.

episodes.name: Betrayal
episodes.overview: Cleo’s betrayed by someone she thought she was close to, but how far is she prepared to go to save her Mum? Elsewhere, an unlikely hero means Ziggy can attend the audition of his life, and John Paul let’s out his devilish side for the sake of love.

episodes.name: Facing Facts
episodes.overview: Mercedes decides to confront the truth, which has huge consequences. Elsewhere in the village, Nancy‘s in for a shock from a mystery admirer, and Lindsey takes drastic action when she uncovers a conspiracy that could ruin her future.

episodes.name: New Beginnings
episodes.overview: Reenie promises to turn over a new leaf, but is it too little too late? Elsewhere, the Roscoes race against time to finally put things right, while Theresa comes up with a wicked scheme, but she could be totally overstepping the mark…

episodes.name: Motherly Instincts
episodes.overview: Maxine hears Minnie crying through the window of Patrick's flat, she goes to investigate and sees him collapsed on the floor. Meanwhile, Mercedes and Joe discuss how to tell Lindsey about their baby.

episodes.name: New Arrival
episodes.overview: Leela introduces her cousin Angela to the village and gives hope to Peri in finding prospective adoptive parents for her baby. Elsewhere, Patrick’s secret is out when Maxine discovers leaflets about MND.

episodes.name: Close Encounter
episodes.overview: Prior to the re-opening of The Loft, Grace panics when Kim plasters the walls with photos of them kissing. She confronts her and they share a passionate kiss... but are they alone? Elsewhere, Patrick is furious when Theresa reveals his illness to Darren.

episodes.name: Bold and Beautiful
episodes.overview: Trevor is shocked to see Dylan wearing women’s clothing and locks him in the flat, so Dylan plans a merciless act of revenge on his father. Meanwhile, Kim spikes Esther's drink with a drug that induces labour.

episodes.name: Family Quarrels
episodes.overview: Trevor lashes out and accidentally hits Dylan for vandalising the new Loft. Elsewhere, Dr S’Avage continues to misread the signs from Sienna and Dirk insists that she only feels sorry for him.

episodes.name: Unexpected Attractions
episodes.overview: Dr S'Avage finds himself the object of an unlikely suitor’s affections, while another villager has a life changing decision to make. Elsewhere, Reenie has a high price to pay for the night before.

episodes.name: Blake VS McQueen
episodes.overview: Sienna gives a scheming McQueen a taste of her own medicine, while Grace and Trevor have a devious trick up their sleeves, but can they pull it off? Elsewhere, it’s time for Lockie to choose whether to follow his head or his heart.

episodes.name: Interfering Individual
episodes.overview: Frankie’s interfering threatens to have devastating consequences for Tom and Peri. Cleo visits a familiar face in an act of desperation, and Porsche is out for blood as she plots a cruel act of revenge. Elsewhere, Sienna is helped by a secret saviour.

episodes.name: Mother on a Mission
episodes.overview: Leela is on the warpath and Frankie’s meddling tips her over the edge. Cleo is reeled back into a web of deceit, while Tegan is playing with fire when she turns to someone she shouldn’t.

episodes.name: Hauntings of the Past
episodes.overview: Zack is at breaking point when the Lovedays refuse to let go of the past. Tegan panics when her good deed jeopardises everything, while Ziggy makes a horrifying discovery, but will he keep it to himself?

episodes.name: Revelations and Repercussions
episodes.overview: Heartbroken and distraught, Louis could be about to push his family too far. Ziggy needs to make a life-altering decision when the truth dawns on him, and Harry’s suspicions grow, but will he realise the threat is so close to home?

episodes.name: One Step Forward, Two Jumps Back
episodes.overview: When there’s a danger of losing everything, Zack chases after Lisa. Elsewhere, Robbie’s good deed turns into a chaotic nightmare, while Cindy falls head first into her old ways.

episodes.name: Actions and Consequences
episodes.overview: Cindy’s mortifying moment has her embarrassed and nervous. Elsewhere, Robbie spies an appealing opportunity and is determined to take action, while Lisa’s stories start to untangle when someone sees something they shouldn’t.

episodes.name: Good Intentions
episodes.overview: Nico urges Sienna to forgive and forget when Ben attempts to make amends, but does he have underlying intentions? Elsewhere in the village, Nancy is given a lavish gift from a very untrustworthy source.

episodes.name: Temptation and Turmoil
episodes.overview: Extreme measures are taken when Sienna tries to get to the bottom of her lover’s secret, while Jason has to choose between a brother in need and a job he loves. Elsewhere, Holly tries to resist temptation after her actions the night before.

episodes.name: When Pranks Turn Sour
episodes.overview: A schoolboy prank upsets Celine, revealing a dark secret, could she be the gloved hand? Meanwhile, Sienna is left reeling when Ben sheds new light on his mystery woman, and wonders whether she might have made a huge mistake. Darren sees red when Patrick gets closer to Maxine.

episodes.name: Worse To Come
episodes.overview: Sienna and Nico struggle to hold it together in the aftermath of a horrific accident, but does it end there? Cameron and Celine finally get some time alone, while Zack tries to make amends with Lisa and reunites his family.

episodes.name: Under Pressure
episodes.overview: Sienna fights to keep her cool but Nico looks like she might crumble under the pressure. Unsettled after the events of the previous night, Celine looks like she may slip back into her old ways. Elsewhere, Darren becomes increasingly agitated by Patrick and struggles to keep his temper under control.

episodes.name: Nasty News
episodes.overview: Dr S'Avage delivers some crushing news to Patrick, but Maxine continues to show her support. A jealous Kim fumes as Grace and Trevor look set to get their happy ever after. Meanwhile, Jason and Robbie make amends, but Jason struggles to keep his brother on the right path.

episodes.name: Test of Temptation
episodes.overview: Robbie chases after his forbidden love. Elsewhere, Grace and Frankie lock horns over a villager’s latest meddling and Dylan will stop at nothing to prove himself to his father.

episodes.name: Pushed to the Limit
episodes.overview: Twin rivalry reaches new heights when Robbie and Jason lock horns, resulting in a terrible accident. Elsewhere, Trevor’s determined to get rid of Kim once and for all, and Scott spins a web of deceit to get Ste on his side.

episodes.name: Embarrassing Encounters
episodes.overview: Tom infuriates Peri when he humiliates her at the baby scan. Sparks fly between a forbidden couple, while Grace’s blood runs cold when Frankie gets too close for comfort.

episodes.name: A Leopard Never Changes its Spots
episodes.overview: Frankie has a trick up her sleeve to get her own way, while Leela sees red when she finds out the shocking truth about what Tom’s been up to. Elsewhere, Sinead spots an intimate moment she shouldn’t have – and can’t help but interfere.

episodes.name: Meddling Ways
episodes.overview: Porsche comes up with a secret scheme, and Cleo is torn between her heart and her head when she realises she has some big decisions to make. Elsewhere in the village, Ben’s looking for revenge on Trevor when he’s given a tip-off.

episodes.name: Unhappy Birthday
episodes.overview: It’s Porsche’s birthday, but there’s trouble brewing, in true McQueen style. Sinead’s interfering goes disastrously wrong due to an awkward case of mistaken identity, while Mercedes flies off the rails when she follows her gut instinct about a lie.

episodes.name: Steal a Kiss
episodes.overview: Harry and Ste get a lot closer, while Sinead realises the mistake she has made. Porsche's birthday party doesn’t go to plan when Reenie spoils the decorations. Meanwhile, trouble is around the corner when Mercedes makes a play for Lockie that he cannot resist. Elsewhere, Nico in her frustration lashes out at Dylan.

episodes.name: McQueen’s At Your Door
episodes.overview: It is a close call for Lockie and Mercedes when Porsche nearly catches them fooling around. Meanwhile, Scott is punished for his lies and Ste tries to play happy families while Harry looks on. Elsewhere, Maxine is shocked to find evidence that links Sienna to Carly’s murder.

episodes.name: Nico on the Edge
episodes.overview: Nico risks spilling everything when Darren and Maxine decide to do some digging. Celine tries to convince Porsche to come home but she is having none of it. Elsewhere, Mercedes and Joe attend their first baby scan and Lockie gets the wrong idea when he finds the scan photo.

episodes.name: A Blake Affair
episodes.overview: Ben asks Sienna to move in with him, but she worries when she sees Maxine with Nico. Meanwhile, Mercedes moves into the Roscoes', and Nancy’s luck changes when she walks in on the Lovedays in a compromising position.

episodes.name: Pop the Question
episodes.overview: Nancy agrees to help Darren with his big proposal, but things don’t go according to plan. Meanwhile, Patrick goes missing after leaving a note, and everyone fears the worst. Elsewhere, Grace gives Trevor a choice to make, while Dylan receives a shocking threat from ‘GothBoy98’.

episodes.name: Blunder and Heartbreak
episodes.overview: Dylan’s blood runs cold when he realises he’s made a massive mistake, while a frustrated Darren is left heartbroken. Elsewhere, Cameron wants to take the next step in his relationship with Celine, but can’t understand why she’s holding back.

episodes.name: In Hot Pursuit
episodes.overview: A high-speed car chase has explosive consequences for all involved, while Dylan’s gutted when he’s betrayed on his big day, and Esther makes the biggest decision of her life.

episodes.name: Moral Dilemma
episodes.overview: Tegan decides it’s time to cut all ties - but will she listen to what her head is telling her? Elsewhere, an embarrassed Celine comes face-to-face with a love rival who needs her help, while Frankie and Jack get a call that changes their whole lives.

episodes.name: Sealed Lips?
episodes.overview: Cameron catches Celine red-handed, but will he keep quiet about what he’s seen? Elsewhere, Nico’s behaviour causes Sienna serious concern, while Tom sinks to sinister blackmail to get what he wants.

episodes.name: Feuding Neighbours
episodes.overview: An unsuspecting Diane is in danger when Tegan sets out on the warpath. Elsewhere, Ste shares a forbidden kiss with an unlikely villager, and it looks like Cameron’s big confession is about to be exposed!

episodes.name: A Proposal
episodes.overview: Ste proposes to Sinead and a furious Harry confronts his secret lover at school. Tensions rise, as does the passion, and the pair end up having a steamy kiss. At the end of his tether, Tom sets a revenge plan in motion that’s set to send ripples through the village, and Tony pulls out all the stops to impress Diane.

episodes.name: Labour Day
episodes.overview: Peri goes into labour with Cameron and Leela by her side. Elsewhere, Ziggy shares a stolen kiss with someone he shouldn’t, and Celine needs to declare her feelings before it is too late.

episodes.name: Love Wins
episodes.overview: Peri overhears Tom tell the baby about how much he loves her, will they hand their newborn over to the Browns? As Celine’s self-esteem crumbles, Pete is satisfied he has her in his clutches. And after a passionate moment Tegan is overjoyed, but will her happiness last?

episodes.name: Dreams Come True
episodes.overview: Harry thinks he is finally going to get what he wants, while Nico is determined to settle the score on a tragedy close to her heart. Meanwhile, Kim’s haunted by visions of Dylan.

episodes.name: Darren's Concern
episodes.overview: Darren is concerned when Theresa makes a comment about Patrick not changing, despite being ill. Nico’s quest for the truth leaves her in grave danger. Elsewhere, as Robbie and Holly get closer, Jason finds it difficult to control his jealousy.

episodes.name: Leela's Lies
episodes.overview: A disastrous mistake sends Jason on a downward spiral. As Leela's lies become more elaborate, she finds herself going to extraordinary measures. Meanwhile, after a shocking revelation, Kim gives herself a creepy make-over.

episodes.name: The Big 3-0!
episodes.overview: An unwanted visitor threatens to change everything for Trevor. Elsewhere, it’s Lindsey’s 30th birthday and the Roscoes are in high spirits until a misunderstanding leads to a disturbing consequence, and Darren decides to trust his instinct by seeking the help of an old friend.

episodes.name: A Sinister Scheme
episodes.overview: Jason puts his heart on the line, while Robbie finds himself in the centre of a sinister scheme. Louis’ concerns for Nico grow as he gives Sienna an unwelcome suggestion, and Patrick gears up for an investors’ reception at the school, but will all go to plan?

episodes.name: Grave Danger
episodes.overview: Trevor goes to drastic measures to uncover the truth, putting someone in grave danger. Meanwhile Sienna is anxious that Nico will crack under pressure. As chaos erupts at the school, a secret looks set to be exposed.

episodes.name: Locked Horns
episodes.overview: Lisa’s blood runs cold when a blast from the past returns to the village, meanwhile Nico and Sienna lock horns over Sgt Ben. Elsewhere, shivers run down Reenie's spine when she receives an unexpected phone call.

episodes.name: Secret Meetings
episodes.overview: Nana promises Derek that she won't tell Reenie about her visits, while Lisa's world is turned upside down when her past comes back to haunt her. With emotions at fever pitch, Ben and Trevor lock horns over Carly’s death. Tony is stunned when he discovers a forbidden love letter; a secret affair could be exposed.

episodes.name: Red Alert
episodes.overview: Kim sees red when she suspects her sister is slipping away from her. Meanwhile, Zack spots his sister playing a dangerous game. Tensions rise between Nico and Sienna, but will Sienna heed Maxine's warning to protect her daughter?

episodes.name: Shattered Dreams
episodes.overview: Zack’s dreams are shattered when a sinister accident has devastating consequences. Lindsey is furious when Freddie ruins a dream opportunity. Joe puts his heart on the line but is it too little too late?

episodes.name: Loveday Flashback
episodes.overview: In a unique flashback, secrets bubble to the surface from the Lovedays’ past. Meanwhile, in the present day, Zack fights for his life.

episodes.name: McQueen Comfort
episodes.overview: Mercedes tries to comfort Freddie, who is at breaking point with his relationship with Lindsey. Elsewhere, Nancy plays the hero when she rescues a villager from despair. Meanwhile, Ste is forced to face the consequences of his actions.

episodes.name: Consequences
episodes.overview: Freddie desperately tries to stop Mercedes from revealing a secret, while Ste suffers the devastating consequences of his hidden affair. Elsewhere, the return of a familiar face leaves Reenie frozen with fear.

episodes.name: Secrets and Lies
episodes.overview: Secrets bubble to the surface and threaten to rip the McQueen family apart, while Leela’s desperate to get her man, as she resorts to desperate measures. Elsewhere, Kim stands in Freddie’s way as he tries to fight for his marriage.

episodes.name: Haunting Revelations
episodes.overview: Pete goes to sinister lengths to get to Cleo, while Reenie’s deep dark past is revealed. Elsewhere, John Paul tries to mend his broken relationship with Porsche.

episodes.name: In Hot Water
episodes.overview: Scott sees an opportunity when Tony is in the bad books with the local community, while an innocent misunderstanding has a dangerous cost for Tegan. Elsewhere, Ziggy seeks answers from a surprising love rival.

episodes.name: Proud Host
episodes.overview: Tony announces that Hollyoaks will be hosting its first ever gay pride event - HollyPride - but will it all go to plan? Elsewhere, Leela is on a downward spiral after an accident, and Cleo goes to an unlikely source for answers on her secret relationship with Pete.

episodes.name: Fever Pitch
episodes.overview: Robbie and Jason’s dangerous rivalry reaches another level, while Leela is a bag of nerves as she begs someone in the village to keep her secret. Elsewhere, Diane is petrified that someone’s out to get her, but she might need to look closer to home if she wants to get to the bottom of it.

episodes.name: Blissfully Unaware
episodes.overview: Ziggy lands himself in an awkward situation when he accidently goes to a gay bar with Tony, while Dr S’Avage delivers some disturbing news to Diane. Elsewhere, Ste goes above and beyond to keep his secret, and Holly is at breaking point when the past comes back to torment her.

episodes.name: Caught in the Act
episodes.overview: Tony makes a shocking decision that could bring Harry’s time in Hollyoaks to an end! Tegan is left feeling lonelier than ever when Ziggy discovers her betrayal, while Leela is in trouble when she’s accused of a crime she didn’t commit.

episodes.name: Haunting Findings
episodes.overview: Cindy finds herself a bit too close to the Gloved Hand when she makes a startling discovery. Elsewhere, Holly continues to make bad decisions with devastating consequences, while Tegan realises Celine still can’t let go of the past.

episodes.name: Payback
episodes.overview: Dirk takes matters in to his own hands when he comes head to head with Trevor, while Dr S’Avage is forced to face up to the truth when his darkest suspicions are confirmed. Elsewhere, Peri is desperately struggling in her new role as a mum – but who will be there to help?

episodes.name: Following the Trail
episodes.overview: Cindy is on the case as the Gloved Hand sets their sights on another victim. Elsewhere, as Zack’s 18th approaches, he can’t believe his luck when his dream woman gives him her number, but all is not quite what it seems…

episodes.name: Taking Action
episodes.overview: Peri takes drastic measures to get what she wants, while Louis feels he may have pushed the Demon Headmaster too far. Elsewhere, Dr S’Avage comes up with a clever plan to stop the Gloved Hand in their tracks.

episodes.name: Unlikely Ally
episodes.overview: Patrick finds a surprising friend to help him take control of his feelings, while the Osbornes are stunned when Peri makes a panicked decision.

episodes.name: Staying Under Wraps
episodes.overview: It’s the day of Zack’s 18th birthday party and Lisa’s worried that Jade will reveal her true identity to the Lovedays. Elsewhere, Reenie and Pete con Jack out of a huge favour, and Carly’s funeral sends Nico on a destructive spiral so she comes up with a plan.

episodes.name: Disaster Strikes
episodes.overview: There’s panic for the Blakes when Nico’s sinister scheme backfires horribly. Elsewhere, Lisa is worried when Jade works out her secret crush, and Theresa causes chaos when she blames someone else for her crime.

episodes.name: Nightmare Sister-In-Law
episodes.overview: Freddie makes a suggestion that leaves Kim reeling, while Lindsey waits for her pregnancy test result. Elsewhere, Sienna and Nico try to cover their tracks but Trevor is already suspicious. Meanwhile, Cleo is heartbroken when she thinks Pete has found himself a new girl.

episodes.name: Knock, Knock, Who's There?
episodes.overview: Grace receives a very unwanted visitor, while Robbie keeps tabs on Trevor. Tony desperately tries to find a back-up location for HollyPride, and Harry lands himself in a sticky situation. Elsewhere, Kim is determined to break up Freddie and Lindsey for good.

episodes.name: Revealing Situations
episodes.overview: Harry bares all to Ste as he tries to plan a fun surprise, while Robbie and Jason fight to support a distressed Holly. Elsewhere, Kim barricades herself in Kath’s room and the police arrive to take her away. Meanwhile, Trevor and Grace kiss and make up and plan to leave Hollyoaks for good.

episodes.name: Curse of the Eavesdropper
episodes.overview: Nancy overhears a conversation between John Paul and Harry that leaves her with a decision to make. Elsewhere, Ashley is set on disrupting things for the Blake family, while Holly has a confession for Jason.

episodes.name: Call the Police!
episodes.overview: Things get worryingly dangerous for Sienna and Nico, when Ashley traps them with her disguise. Elsewhere, Jason tells Trevor that Robbie is the informant, while Freddie makes plans to leave the country.

episodes.name: Hollyoaks Pride
episodes.overview: Tony declares ‘Hollyoaks Pride’ officially open with a fanfare of fireworks and fancy dress. Elsewhere, Joe is heartbroken to hear that Freddie and Mercedes are leaving Hollyoaks together. Trevor is set on destroying the Roscoes when Grace’s true plans are revealed to him, while Sienna enlists the help of Dr S'Avage to keep Ashley quiet.

episodes.name: The Rapids
episodes.overview: In an attempt to escape Trevor, the Roscoe brothers find themselves facing a life or death situation in the middle of some rapids. Back in Hollyoaks, Dr S’Avage is shocked to discover the Gloved Hand’s identity and races to tell Ben, but the killer is in hot pursuit. Meanwhile, Mercedes is torn over what to do, but decides there is only one answer.

episodes.name: The Storm Drain
episodes.overview: Freddie risks his own life to save his twin brothers when they get stuck in a storm drain, and Ben uses Grace as bait to snare Trevor. Elsewhere, Tony and Diane unite in grief at the devastated site of ‘Hollyoaks Pride’ and decide to renew their vows, while Cindy convinces DS Thorpe to investigate the hospital murders.

episodes.name: The Gloved Hand Killer Reveal
episodes.overview: As the hospital staff frantically try and stick together, the Gloved Hand Killer is revealed. Elsewhere, Jack confesses to Darren that he has sold the pub, while Grace tries to convince Esther to give her another chance.

episodes.name: The Hollyoaks Wedding
episodes.overview: Tony is surprised when his old friend, Finn arrives back in Hollyoaks, just in time for his wedding. Cindy is shocked when her secret husband and his family turn up to reveal they are the new owners of The Dog. Elsewhere, Grace panics when Trevor grabs her in the hospital, but he persuades her to run away with him to Paris.

episodes.name: Nightingales Takeover
episodes.overview: The Nightingale family descend on Hollyoaks and Jack hands over the keys to The Dog. Meanwhile, the Roscoe family are left broken in the aftermath of Hollyoaks Pride, while people start to take notice of Cindy's claims that there’s a serial killer at the hospital. Elsewhere, Lockie desperately asks Leela for a favour, while Peri opens up about her feelings towards Baby Steph.

episodes.name: Hidden Agenda
episodes.overview: When an unwelcome visitor arrives at the village, Ellie Nightingale thinks her plans are scuppered. Meanwhile, Tegan and Ste get a nasty surprise when they turn up for Cameron's sentencing. Nancy and Darren are concerned with little Charlie’s strange behaviour, while Scott’s blood boils when he gets on the wrong side of Tony.

episodes.name: Caught Red-Handed
episodes.overview: Ellie’s scheming threatens to rip her family apart when new girl Rachel catches her red-handed. Diane has a change of heart when Scott opens up to her about his troubled past, while Peri receives some sound advice from an unlikely person. Elsewhere, Tegan realises that it is make or break for her and Ziggy and tries to convince him of her true feelings.

episodes.name: Loggerheads
episodes.overview: Patrick fails to keep his cool when he and his new school replacement lock horns, while Rachel confronts Ellie about her scheming. Elsewhere, Peri gives Tom a life-changing ultimatum and Cameron sets his sights on the woman he truly loves.

episodes.name: Resist Temptation
episodes.overview: Maxine causes a scene when she feels someone has been treated unjustly, while Lockie tries to tempt Mercedes away from Joe. Elsewhere, Pete takes his manipulation to the next level when he buys Jade a devious present.

episodes.name: Seething Inside
episodes.overview: Boiling with rage, Sienna sets out to prove that Maxine is taking her dad for a fool. Elsewhere, Nico and new arrival Alfie hit it off instantly much to older brother Nathan’s disapproval. Meanwhile, Nancy is furious when Darren lets his family down at the moment they need him the most.

episodes.name: Dangerous Games
episodes.overview: Alfie attempts to impress Nico but his plans go dangerously wrong, while Jason begins his own private investigation. Elsewhere, after a heated row with Joe, Mercedes floors him with a spiteful lie. Meanwhile, Sienna is stunned when Patrick lets her in on a dark secret.

episodes.name: Nightingales Surprise
episodes.overview: New arrivals the Nightingales have a few tricks up their sleeves, while Alfie gets a lovely surprise. Elsewhere, John Paul and Mercedes decide to get answers on a delicate situation.

episodes.name: Broken Hearted Girl
episodes.overview: Lisa’s heart is shattered when she walks in on her crush getting flirty with Theresa. Meanwhile, Maxine is adamant she will stand by Patrick whatever the cost and Nico tries to track Jason’s plan.

episodes.name: Online Dealings
episodes.overview: Theresa is in turmoil when an intimate snap gets posted online, but this is just the beginning of her troubles. Meanwhile, Ben has a fight on his hands when more villagers hear that there might be a killer amongst them.

episodes.name: Silent Witness
episodes.overview: Lindsey comes up with a wicked scheme to cover her tracks when her Gloved Hand secret is under threat. Lisa begs Theresa to think about her safety when she puts herself in danger for money to help her family. Elsewhere, John Paul’s career hangs in the balance at the disciplinary, and it’s down to Harry to help him.

episodes.name: What Do We Have Here Then?
episodes.overview: Holly and Robbie are forced to think fast when their forbidden affair is about to be exposed, while Lisa’s plan backfires as she puts herself in the firing line for a friend. Elsewhere, Grace sets out on a mission – but where do her loyalties really lie?

episodes.name: Amping Up the Pressure
episodes.overview: Grace pushes Charlie for answers, but with the Gloved Hand right behind her, she could be doing herself more damage than she realises. Ste reveals the latest news about his HIV to John Paul, while Robbie puts his heart on the line when he pushes Holly for answers.

episodes.name: Centre of Attention
episodes.overview: Ste knows all eyes are on him when he turns up at Harry’s 18th birthday party in The Loft, while Jason panics when secrets from Phoebe’s shooting look set to be unearthed during Ben’s investigation.

episodes.name: The (Mc)Queen is Back!
episodes.overview: Mercedes and the McQueens are surprised when Mummy Myra returns, while Cleo pushes Pete to come clean to Reenie as their wedding looms. Elsewhere, Joe sets his sights on getting his woman once and for all.

episodes.name: Following the Heart
episodes.overview: A (rather dishy) new face arrives in the village searching for his mystery love, while Myra helps to put things right between Joe and a heartbroken Mercedes. Elsewhere, Cleo makes a shocking discovery that threatens to halt Reenie and Pete’s wedding, and the Nightingales have no idea what they’ve let themselves in for when they go head to head with The McQueens.

episodes.name: Emotional Turmoil
episodes.overview: Cleo is at breaking point on the day of Reenie and Pete’s wedding, while Cindy turns to an unlikely villager for help in a desperate attempt to keep her two husbands apart. Elsewhere, Jade worries she’ll be rejected by the Osbornes after an altercation.

episodes.name: The Truth Comes Out
episodes.overview: The McQueens are broken at the wedding when Pete’s secrets are revealed, causing a traumatised Celine to collapse. Elsewhere in the village, Jade begs Lisa to help her stay in Hollyoaks, but her sister’s hands may already tied.

episodes.name: Desperate Measures
episodes.overview: Cindy realises her time is running out, so she makes an unlawful move that could change her life, while Porsche decides to save her family. Elsewhere, Jade reaches out to a familiar face, not realising she’s putting herself in the heart of danger.

episodes.name: Cruel Determination
episodes.overview: Mac sets a date to marry Neeta but a certain spoilt family member will stop at nothing to make sure the wedding doesn’t go ahead. Cleo’s loyalties are divided when the McQueens get some shocking news, while Lisa struggles to keep up her lie when she comes close to betraying her true identity.

episodes.name: Wrong Person To Confide In
episodes.overview: Cindy confides in Lindsey when she finds some suspicious evidence on her phone, while Nathan confronts Mac about his supposed affair. Elsewhere, fake Lisa panics when her true identity risks being uncovered, and Nancy starts to fall for Darren again.

episodes.name: Opposites Attract
episodes.overview: Sparks fly for a very unlikely couple, when Darren and Grace take part in a Single Mingle night at The Dog. Elsewhere, Cindy tries to enlist the help of Simone but Lindsey tampers with her medication.

episodes.name: Sweet Revelations
episodes.overview: Esther encourages Nancy to reveal her feelings to Darren, while Lindsey tries to manipulate Dirk into sending Cindy away to a specialist centre. Alfie wants Neeta to adopt him but Mac isn’t so sure, and the Lovedays receive a poison pen letter in the post.

episodes.name: She's Not Lisa
episodes.overview: In a panic, Lisa reveals her true identity to Theresa who threatens to tell the Lovedays, and Louis finds a second blackmail letter and is spooked. Elsewhere, Grace manages to get between Nancy and Darren, while Peri and Leela finally make up.

episodes.name: Loveday Secrets
episodes.overview: Louis has a secret meeting with a woman from his past, who attempts to blackmail him for money. Elsewhere, Lisa prepares to tell her family the truth, while Tegan returns to Hollyoaks with a new boyfriend, much to Ziggy's annoyance.

episodes.name: Unhappy Birthday
episodes.overview: It’s Leela’s birthday but the celebrations turn sour when she makes it her mission to uncover the truth about Tegan and Ziggy. Elsewhere, Louis tries to shake off his unwelcomed visitor, but soon discovers she won’t leave without a fight, while Nico burns with jealousy at the sight of Jason and Holly.

episodes.name: Determination
episodes.overview: Cameron sets out to prove his love to Celine, but a secret admirer threatens to come between them. John Paul discovers the secret that Mrs St Claire was trying so hard to keep buried, while Leela is on the warpath at the Lomaxes’ after last night’s shock revelations.

episodes.name: Always the Bridesmaid, Never the Bride
episodes.overview: Alfie finds himself tangled in a weird love triangle when a romantic gesture goes very wrong, while Tegan decides to go after her man, but instead gets a nasty surprise that breaks her heart. Elsewhere, Mrs St Claire feels betrayed when she thinks John Paul has exposed her secret.

episodes.name: Plots and Plans
episodes.overview: Patrick takes his sinister scheme to a new level when he notices Jason’s curiosity, while the Lomaxes are broken when there’s still no word from the missing family members. Elsewhere, as the tormenting continues, Holly finds comfort with a forbidden friend.

episodes.name: Green With Envy
episodes.overview: Harry's jealous when he sees Ste and John Paul getting close again. Patrick’s blood runs cold when something threatens to throw his master plan off course, and Robbie decides it’s time for the truth to come out.

episodes.name: Love & Jealously
episodes.overview: Nico’s rage spirals out of control, leaving Sienna to bear the brunt of her fury. John Paul reluctantly tries to put his and Ste’s relationship behind him, while Holly suspects Robbie of acting out of jealousy.

episodes.name: New Enemies
episodes.overview: A drunken Ste makes a public declaration of love for Harry, but will it go to plan? Meanwhile, Ellie makes a dangerous new enemy in the form of Myra McQueen, and Diego appears to be hiding something.

episodes.name: Suspicions and Scheming
episodes.overview: With Jason in the palm of his hand, Patrick cranks up his scheme to frame Maxine. Meanwhile, a suspicious Myra is left feeling confused after overhearing a hushed conversation, and Pete asks Cleo for one last favour.

episodes.name: The Christmas Bar Crawl…
episodes.overview: At the Christmas bar crawl, Ellie is on a mission to sabotage Rachel’s relationship with Nathan. Elsewhere, Reenie and Celine search for Cleo, after Harry exposes her secret, while Maxine has a surprise announcement for Patrick.

episodes.name: The Sacrifice for Love
episodes.overview: Mercedes and Joe return to the village in true Hollyoaks fashion, and Nancy makes a painful sacrifice for Darren. Meanwhile, a shocking discovery makes Cleo’s blood run cold.

episodes.name: Coming Forward
episodes.overview: Reenie and Porsche encourage Cleo to do the right thing and talk to the police. After a fall out with Mercedes, a vulnerable Joe finds himself at the mercy (pun defo intended) of manipulative Lindsey’s charms, while Nancy is brimming with jealousy over Darren and Grace’s blossoming friendship.

episodes.name: Look Who's Back
episodes.overview: It’s the day of Freddie’s funeral, and there’s a surprise visitor in store, while Lindsey is furious to see Mercedes and Joe growing closer. Elsewhere, Louis and Simone’s marriage is in danger when Louis receives a card from Joanne. Nancy is overcome with emotion when she decides to let her true feelings be known.

episodes.name: Friend or Foe?
episodes.overview: Ste and Tony lock horns in the village, but will Tony offer his friend the support he needs? Elsewhere, Louis desperately tries to cover Joanne’s tracks, but this might not be the last he’s seen of her.

episodes.name: Blancmange Blunder
episodes.overview: Celine makes a romantic error when she gets the wrong idea about Cameron’s gesture. Ste and Tony build bridges, but will Ste struggle to resist temptation? Elsewhere, Louis’ secret is under threat when he’s confronted by a concerned Dirk.

episodes.name: Not Finished Yet
episodes.overview: Scheming Lindsey will stop at nothing to sabotage Mercedes and Joe’s relationship, while Tony and Tegan team up to help Ste at the time he needs it most. Elsewhere, Cameron plans a special Christmas surprise, but will it all backfire?

episodes.name: Back On Track
episodes.overview: Tegan is heartbroken when someone close is rushed to hospital, while Ste makes a lifelong promise to Harry. Elsewhere, Reenie rips up a letter that would uncover secrets from her past, and Celine’s surprise for Cameron completely backfires.

episodes.name: Frosty Feels
episodes.overview: Fake Lisa burns with jealousy over Theresa and Zack, which tempts her to reveal her true feelings. Meanwhile, Porsche goes with her gut instinct and is floored by what she finds out, and Tony plants a seed in John Paul’s head to keep Ste away from Harry.

episodes.name: Blast For the Past
episodes.overview: It’s an explosive night for the Lomax family, as Cameron stops at nothing to be back in Peri’s life. Elsewhere, Reenie panics when she realises she’ll be sent straight back to prison, while fake Lisa decides to tell Zack that she loves him.

episodes.name: Christmas Confessions
episodes.overview: In this hour-long Christmas special, Ste is forced to choose between John Paul and Harry one final time. Elsewhere, fake Lisa ends up kissing Zack and confesses that she’s not the real Lisa, while Lockie gives Cameron an ultimatum. Tegan has a decision to make about Ziggy, while Reenie and Porsche prepare to say goodbye to Hollyoaks.

episodes.name: Truth Seeking
episodes.overview: Peri fears she’s being lied to by her family again and goes on a hunt for the truth. Lindsey is delighted to finally have Joe all to herself until a certain feisty villager returns, and the pressure gets too much for Lisa as her world starts crumbling around her.

episodes.name: Time’s a Healer
episodes.overview: Lisa and Zack are forced to spend time together, but will it mend their broken relationship? Alfie makes an unexpected breakthrough in the quest to find his real parents, and Patrick asks for one last favour from Maxine that leaves her distraught.

episodes.name: Deadly Stare
episodes.overview: There’s a flicker of her murderous side when Lindsey sees red after overhearing a private conversation. After his big discovery, Alfie puts a plan in motion to finally find out the truth. A raging Sienna locks horns with the McQueen girls when talk turns to Patrick.

episodes.name: Gresther?
episodes.overview: It’s New Year’s eve, and sparks fly between Grace and Esther in the village, while Darren fears for a loved one’s well-being when he finds some leaflets from the hospital at Tom’s 16th. Elsewhere, Kim is determined to stop Lindsey from striking again, but it might be too little too late.

episodes.name: Final Request
episodes.overview: Sienna tells Ben about Patrick’s plan to die. Elsewhere, Darren takes Nancy on a ‘first date’ and ends up putting his foot in it, while Grace tries to make amends with Esther.

episodes.name: Change of Heart
episodes.overview: Patrick has second thoughts about framing Maxine, and the vow renewal goes without a hitch. Elsewhere, Lindsey refuses to leave the Roscoes and tells Kim she has bought the house, while Darren has a surprise for Nancy.

episodes.name: Troublemaker
episodes.overview: Nancy becomes suspicious about Darren and Maxine, while Nico tries to persuade Alfie to steal money from The Dog till. Elsewhere, Cindy agrees to be Neeta's chief bridesmaid after walking in on an argument between her and Ellie.

episodes.name: Sneaking Suspicions
episodes.overview: Nancy finds something suspicious in the boot of Darren’s car, while eagle-eyed Ellie is curious about Mac and Cindy’s relationship. Elsewhere, Alfie is left embarrassed when his dad finds him working for Tony.

episodes.name: Wedding in Danger
episodes.overview: Ellie is determined to stop Neeta and Mac’s wedding from happening, while Cindy panics when Mac won’t speak to her. Elsewhere, Pete tries to get back in touch with Cleo, while Darren tries to help Maxine out of a sticky situation.

episodes.name: Spinning a Lie
episodes.overview: Ben’s suspicions over Darren’s story leave him wondering whether it’s time to come clean, while Cindy’s life is left in pieces when Holly and Dirk both turn their backs on her. Elsewhere, Cleo realises the past won’t be easy to move on from when she goes to see Pete.

episodes.name: Fairy Godfather
episodes.overview: A new face descends on the village and promises a lifeline to Cindy just when she needs it most. Alfie feels rejected when Tony decides he wants to keep his secret buried, while Harry is furious when he finds out the reason behind Cleo’s strange behaviour.

episodes.name: Breaking the Rules
episodes.overview: Holly and Robbie find themselves on the wrong side of the law when they step their affair up a gear at a hotel. Manipulative Pete turns to dirty tactics to get himself back in the good books, while love is in the air over at the Lomaxes’… until one villager returns unannounced.

episodes.name: Mood Killer
episodes.overview: Things get steamy between Cameron and Leela, but someone is waiting to pour cold water on their passionate moment. Cindy and Ellie lock horns over Mac’s past, while it looks like the game’s up for Holly - is the truth about to come spilling out?

episodes.name: Competition Time
episodes.overview: It’s the day of The Dog’s Mr and Mrs Contest and Cameron is feeling the pressure to prove himself, while the rift between Tony and Ste grows even deeper when Tony points a finger of blame at his once best pal.

episodes.name: Scheming and Revenge
episodes.overview: When Peri locks horns with Mrs St Claire, her revenge plan takes a nasty turn. Jealous of Joe and Mercedes, a desperate Lindsey starts a new scheme to sabotage their relationship, while Tegan’s suspicions grow as a shifty Cameron keeps Lockie captive.

episodes.name: Desperate Measures
episodes.overview: Lindsey stoops to desperate measures to keep Joe close to her, while Grace tries to prove herself to Esther, but is she just lying to herself? Elsewhere, Louis fears Mrs St Claire is about to do something drastic when she sees red.

episodes.name: Truth, Suspicions and Lies
episodes.overview: Esther stumbles upon a clue that could get Trevor released, but her and Ben’s personal feelings could stand in the way of justice. Elsewhere, just as Joe is falling for Lindsey’s evil scheme, Mercedes suspects that all is not as it seems, while John Paul’s efforts to help Mrs St Claire backfire with horrible results.

episodes.name: Shock Revelations
episodes.overview: The village is in suspense as the case against Trevor takes an unexpected turn. Joe is determined to do the right thing by Lindsey, but his decision could hugely affect his relationship with Mercedes. Elsewhere, Mrs St Claire returns in triumph, while cracks start to show between Rachel and Nathan.

episodes.name: Dangerous Paths
episodes.overview: When Ben’s anger over Trevor leads to violence, Sienna begs him not to let his obsession destroy the family. Elsewhere, it seems Mrs St Claire could have a hidden agenda, while Lindsey plays a clever game knowing DS Thorpe is hot on her tail.

episodes.name: You've Got a Friend
episodes.overview: Alfie is shocked to hear that Jade might have cancer and he tries to reassure her. Elsewhere, Diego’s fears are confirmed when he walks in on Myra and Nathan getting cosy, while Ellie is delighted when her meddling works perfectly.

episodes.name: Sweet Sixteen
episodes.overview: It is clear that Alfie and Jade want to be more than just friends when he gives her a beautiful charm bracelet for her 16th birthday, while Peri confesses that she misses Tom. Meanwhile, Sonia plans to tell Simone and Louis the truth about her identity.

episodes.name: Suspicious Minds
episodes.overview: Diego tells Rachel about Myra and Nathan’s affair, while Nancy is suspicious about what Darren is hiding from her. Elsewhere, the case is closed on Patrick’s disappearance as Maxine requests for him to be declared as officially dead.

episodes.name: Wonder Wall
episodes.overview: It’s the day of Patrick’s memorial and Maxine is nervous when Ben drills a plaque into the wall, and Sienna launches an attack on Maxine over her father’s will. Elsewhere, Joanne tells Simone about an opening at her firm and Louis is devastated, while Cindy calls James for help.

episodes.name: The Game Plan
episodes.overview: Cindy has an ulterior motive when she decides to meet James, while Nancy confronts Darren about his secrecy. Elsewhere, Maxine is left feeling tormented when she hears Patrick’s voice, and Sienna makes plans to contest the will.

episodes.name: Face to Face with the Enemy
episodes.overview: Mac can’t believe his eyes when Cindy teams up with two of his rivals in an attempt to ruin him. Elsewhere, Simone gives Louis the silent treatment after last week’s shocking accusations, while the brave face Jade has been wearing starts to crumble behind closed doors.

episodes.name: Picture Perfect
episodes.overview: Maxine is in for the shock of her life when Mrs St Claire summons her, Nancy and Sienna to the school. Tony offers to make amends with Harry, but it may be too little too late. Elsewhere, Mac is really feeling the pressure when someone threatens to start playing dirty.

episodes.name: Shock to the System
episodes.overview: Alfie struggles to get his head around yesterday’s shocking news, while Lindsey finds herself face to face with the only witness to her killings. Elsewhere, Darren and Nancy break some bad news to Charlie, but they’re shocked to discover he has a dark secret of his own!

episodes.name: Killer Intentions
episodes.overview: Lindsey takes drastic measures to make sure she’s out of the frame for the Gloved Hand murders by eyeing up her next victim. Celine encourages Tegan to take part in Dee Valley Hospital’s new poster campaign, while a certain someone returns to The Dog.

episodes.name: Wrong Side of the Law
episodes.overview: Trevor is furious when he’s landed in more trouble with the police, while Lindsey sees an opportunity that’s too good to miss. Elsewhere, Celine, Kim and Tegan are speechless when the new face of the hospital billboard campaign is revealed…

episodes.name: Accessory To Murder
episodes.overview: Lindsey risks being found out when one of her earrings is found at the scene of her latest attack, while Kim is determined for her sister’s fake pregnancy to be revealed. Elsewhere, DS Thorpe lets Freddie go to fend for himself and he decides to make contact with a certain someone. Meanwhile, a visitor at the hospital spooks Tegan.

episodes.name: A Roscoe Reunion
episodes.overview: Joe, Robbie and Jason are stunned to find Freddie alive and well, while Lindsey is determined to end his life once and for all. Elsewhere, Trevor finds solace in an unlikely neighbour when Sienna suggests he has a go at colouring to relax.

episodes.name: Who Found Freddie?
episodes.overview: Freddie is caught sleeping rough on The Dog couch, and Ellie starts developing feelings for him. Elsewhere, Alfie tries to help Nico cheat during her presentation, and Ben is demoted to PC. Meanwhile, after a confrontation with Darren, Trevor has a sudden realisation.

episodes.name: A Royle Vendetta
episodes.overview: Trevor goes after Ben when he is convinced that he’s the one who attacked him, but panic descends when Nico has a heart attack. Meanwhile, John Paul covers for Cleo when she falls behind at school, and Simone has to choose between work and her family.

episodes.name: Aphrodisiac Alert
episodes.overview: Joanne tries to seduce Louis with Prosecco and oysters after she convinces him to let her stay over. Meanwhile, Cleo asks for a job at The Hutch while Diane comforts her. Elsewhere, Sienna hears a gun shot from outside The Loft and arrives to find Trevor face down on the floor.

episodes.name: Topless Trouble
episodes.overview: Theresa is shocked to find Zack in bed with another woman, while Grace wants revenge for Trevor so goes to find Ben. The Loveday parents have a blazing row when Louis finds out Simone has been lying, and Joanne sees this as her perfect opportunity. Meanwhile, John Paul and Tony come up with a plan to make Cleo see sense.

episodes.name: Turned Down
episodes.overview: Diane and Tony refuse Marnie’s offer to buy The Hutch, but will she take no for an answer? Elsewhere, Theresa threatens to tell the whole village about Zack’s latest conquest, while Joanne makes one last attempt for Louis’ attention so jumps in front of his car.

episodes.name: Let The Games Begin!
episodes.overview: Marnie and James are caught red-handed by an unsuspecting Scott after stealing Diane’s laptop. Elsewhere, Zack kisses Lisa and makes his feelings clear, while Pete manipulates Cleo into robbing The Hutch.

episodes.name: Jealous Genes
episodes.overview: Holly and Jason’s wedding plans are in full swing, but it all gets too much for Robbie at the sight of the happy couple. Elsewhere, Tony fires Cleo but ends up helping her to pay off Pete, while James turns his charm onto Scott.

episodes.name: You Can Leave Your Hat On
episodes.overview: Jason is delighted with his stag do surprise, but Holly is furious with Robbie. Elsewhere, Cindy and Dirk break the ice and call a truce, while Celine puts the trial in jeopardy when she reveals something to Pete.

episodes.name: Wedding Bells
episodes.overview: It is the day of Holly and Jason’s wedding but Robbie is determined to win Holly’s heart. Kim confronts Lindsey when she overhears that Pete was attacked the night before, while Joe risks finding out the truth. Elsewhere, Diane is furious with Scott when she hears about his secret scheming.

episodes.name: Not Such A Best Man
episodes.overview: Robbie is left reeling when Holly turns him down, while Jason receives a strange video message. Alfie successfully fixes Dr S’Avage’s laptop, and Nico is particularly intrigued by some footage she finds. Elsewhere, Diane is devastated that their business is in trouble, and Tony and Scott try and work out a plan to promote their services.

episodes.name: Leap Of Faith
episodes.overview: Alfie promises to put his vertigo aside and take part in the abseil, but only if Jade goes to her chemo appointment. Lindsey is at risk of being found out when Dirk watches the footage on Dr S’Avage’s laptop, and Freddie has a flashback. Meanwhile, Peri asks for Ste’s help when Cameron refuses to change his mind.

episodes.name: Love Is In The Air
episodes.overview: The charity abseil is a huge success, despite an unlikely mishap. Jade is in awe of Alfie’s bravery and the pair share their first kiss. Elsewhere, Lindsey prepares to silence Freddie once and for all.

episodes.name: Protective Father
episodes.overview: Cameron boils with anger when Peri goes to stay with Nico for the weekend. Elsewhere, Alfie and Jade are both on Cloud 9 after their kiss, while Jack is upset when he receives flowers and a card…

episodes.name: Got the Wrong Girl
episodes.overview: The village is shocked at the latest arrest for the hospital killings, but as Lindsey goes about her normal day, she suddenly comes face to face with a sinister visitor. Elsewhere, James manipulates Scott into carrying out a plan which could spell disaster for The Hutch, and Jade makes a terrible discovery at the cancer support day.

episodes.name: Zack, 18, Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Simone signs Zack up to a dating site when he complains about “girl trouble,” leaving Lisa to try and ignore her feelings for him. Alfie finds himself in the firing line when the Osbornes try to get to the bottom of Jade’s missing money, while Nathan flips when he discovers James and Marnie are trying to sabotage the Hutch.

episodes.name: Shake it off
episodes.overview: Alfie and Jade put their health worries on the back-burner and have some fun in the village, while Darren falls back into old habits when he tries to make amends for Jade’s missing money. Elsewhere, Simone is floored by what she finds when Zack and Lisa are left alone in the flat.

episodes.name: Get Pasta it
episodes.overview: Things get messy in Price Slice when Simone discovers what Louis and Joanne have been hiding from her, while Lisa’s cover could be blown when a familiar face returns. Elsewhere, Ben desperately tries to find a new kidney donor for Nico, but she thinks the answer is right in front of her.

episodes.name: Any Sides with that?
episodes.overview: Lunch at the Hutch takes a turn for the worse when Trevor calls Grace an embarrassment. She storms out, leaving Sienna and Trevor alone, trying to resist their feelings for each other. Elsewhere, Joanne has a plan up her sleeve when she manipulates her way back in with the Lovedays, and Nico puts a deadly plan into action.

episodes.name: Swig In The Wrong Direction
episodes.overview: Nico has a change of heart, but it’s too little too late when Theresa drinks the spiked wine. Elsewhere, Cameron is encouraged by Ste to give Peri some space, while Trevor continues to meet Sienna and leaves Grace struggling to cope on her own at The Loft.

episodes.name: The Ultimate Cringe
episodes.overview: Grace decides to take matters into her own hands, and Trevor is shocked to find her standing over Sienna’s lifeless body. Meanwhile, Cameron realises that Tom and Peri have been left alone together, and storms in to find them kissing. Elsewhere, Diego suggests that he and Myra should have a baby one day.

episodes.name: Chemical Romance
episodes.overview: Trevor worries that the forensics might find his DNA on Sienna’s body, while Grace packs his bags and asks him to leave. John Paul is shocked by the news that Diego and Myra are thinking of having a baby.

episodes.name: Suspicious Minds
episodes.overview: All eyes are on Ste when Cameron plants a bag of cocaine in Rose’s baby changing bag, while an anxious Tom pushes Peri away. Elsewhere, Trevor begins having second thoughts about leaving Grace, and Mrs St Claire invites lonely John Paul for a drink.

episodes.name: Clowning Around!
episodes.overview: Scott decides to become a children’s entertainer to help raise money for The Hutch, and Darren offers Tony gambling advice. Meanwhile, Ste tries to plead his innocence but not even Harry believes him.

episodes.name: The Art of Deception
episodes.overview: John Paul lies to Mrs St Claire and heads out on a date with a mystery man, but he’s shocked to see him at the school later. Cameron is determined to find out what Tegan’s hiding when he catches her in a tricky situation. Elsewhere, Tony chooses a dangerous route when he tries to save The Hutch.

episodes.name: Clowning Around
episodes.overview: Scott’s clown show leaves one villager injured when it goes spectacularly wrong, while John Paul is worried that someone has a crush on him. Elsewhere, Darren is on edge when Tony’s new business idea threatens to expose his dark buried secret.

episodes.name: Dig a Little Deeper
episodes.overview: John Paul and Scott have a heart-to-heart, which reveals there’s far more to carefree Scott than John Paul first thought. Elsewhere, Alfie tells Jade he wants everyone to know they’re together, while a shocking discovery leaves Myra in an impossible situation.

episodes.name: Standing Up To Cancer
episodes.overview: Alfie and Jade stand united in their fight against cancer by shaving their heads together. Joanne threatens to tell the truth about Lisa’s identity, while suspicious Diego follows Myra, only to find out she’s been twisting a few truths.

episodes.name: Money on the Mind
episodes.overview: Myra prepares for a financial windfall at Tony’s expense, while Rachel pushes Alfie to tell his family that his cancer has returned. Elsewhere, Lisa pleads with Joanne to keep her secret, but Joanne may already have said too much to Louis.

episodes.name: Deep Dark Secrets
episodes.overview: DS Thorpe breaks up a heated argument between Louis and Joanne when Louis’ suspicions spiral out of control. At the Osborne’s, a case of mistaken identity has embarrassing repercussions for Ste, while Jason is furious when he spots Holly and Robbie on their first outing together.

episodes.name: Table for One
episodes.overview: The heartbreak continues for Jason when he comes face to face with Holly and the Savages. Elsewhere, loyal Simone supports Louis’ bold claims against Joanne, while Kim puts Esther in a difficult position when she asks her for a special favour.

episodes.name: Sleeping Rough
episodes.overview: Ste and Harry’s relationship is really put to the test when they’re left with no place to stay, while guilty ‘Lisa’ tries to pluck up the courage to come clean about her true identity. Elsewhere, Esther discovers a shocking secret about Lindsey.

episodes.name: Guilty Conscience
episodes.overview: Rachel is burning with guilt about going behind the Nightingale’s backs when Alfie receives his results. Meanwhile, Ellie offers Cindy a beauty treatment, but Marnie has got sabotage in mind!

episodes.name: Family Ties
episodes.overview: The Nightingales pull together following their recent revelation. Marnie overhears a private conversation and uses it to her advantage, while Holly is in shock when Robbie makes a life-changing suggestion.

episodes.name: Judgement Day
episodes.overview: The Roscoes unite when Robbie and Jason have an important decision to make, while Holly races against time when she puts her life in danger to follow her heart. Elsewhere, new boy Liam gets Celine and Tegan all hot under the scrubs when he meets them at the hospital.

episodes.name: The Aftermath
episodes.overview: Following Holly's loss of control behind the wheel, there’s chaos as a car explodes with somebody still inside. Back in the village, Celine is quick to show Liam around Hollyoaks. First stop? The hot tub, obvs, but it looks like there could also be romance on the cards for Tegan…

episodes.name: Hopeless Romantic
episodes.overview: Ellie finds herself as the object of Freddie’s affections, but does she feel the same way? Liam ends up in a messy situation when his double-crossing is exposed, while Alfie prepares for his first chemo session, but Jade delivers some bad news about her own diagnosis.

episodes.name: Head to Head
episodes.overview: Celine is determined to win her man, but a shocking intervention leaves her heartbroken. Lindsey’s on edge when Esther comes clean about her visit to Kath, while a cunning Marnie warns Ellie not to trust Freddie… for one very sly reason.

episodes.name: Bump in the Road
episodes.overview: Lindsey’s huge bump causes a stir when Mercedes arrives back in the village demanding answers. Kim is terrified that Lindsey could resort back to her murderous ways, while Freddie plans to take Ellie out on a date, but Marnie uses her hold over Freddie, to give him some food for thought.

episodes.name: Tangled
episodes.overview: Darren finds himself spinning a web of lies when he’s caught hiding stacks of cash. A furious Freddie overhears a conversation about Lindsey’s baby daddy, so he goes looking for answers. Elsewhere, Mercedes’ suspicions about Lindsey grow, but it’ll take a lot for her fears be taken seriously.

episodes.name: Deception
episodes.overview: Kim’s world starts to crumble around her when she realises she’s been betrayed, while Joe prepares a romantic setting for his proposal, unaware he’s in serious danger. Elsewhere, Tegan and Celine join forces in a bid to get revenge on Liam.

episodes.name: Quick Getaway
episodes.overview: Lindsey’s escape from Hollyoaks takes a nasty turn when she hitches a lift with Frankie, while Esther continues to fight for Kim’s innocence, and Joe is floored by Mercedes’ bold claims.

episodes.name: Danger, Danger!
episodes.overview: The Osbornes wait for Frankie to return, unaware what’s really happened. Meanwhile Esther tries to be the hero while Lindsey threatens to kill again.

episodes.name: Lethal Partnership
episodes.overview: Lindsey tries to make her great escape with the help of a deadly ally, while Frankie’s life hangs in the balance. Elsewhere, it’s Sonia’s birthday, and Zack decides to come clean about his true feelings for her. Elsewhere, Cindy attempts to play cupid, but it’s not long before it backfires.

episodes.name: Fright of your Life
episodes.overview: With encouragement from Zack, Louis decides to fight for his marriage and books a romantic getaway, but he and Simone are in for a huge shock when they return to the flat. Elsewhere, Sienna worries that Nico is onto her when she tries her best to get a confession.

episodes.name: Steamy Affair
episodes.overview: Sienna and Trevor’s secret affair hots up, but Grace is close to bringing it all crashing down. The Lovedays are in crisis following yesterday’s shock revelation, while Ste and Harry vow to cheer up Grace with an offer she can’t refuse.

episodes.name: Where to Start?
episodes.overview: Louis, Simone and DS Thorpe turn up to interrogate Joanne, while Sienna and Trevor plan to leave Hollyoaks together, but something stands in the way of their happy ending. Elsewhere, Ste and Harry contemplate a night sleeping rough, but they’re being watched!

episodes.name: Not Quite Home
episodes.overview: Harry finds a shack for him and Ste to stay in, but it seems like James Nightingale wants something from them. Elsewhere, Darren’s concerned that Maxine can’t keep quiet about their terrible secret, while Joanne meets up with Margaret, who abducted the real Lisa all those years ago!

episodes.name: Hush-Hush
episodes.overview: Darren, Nancy and Maxine worry that someone knows their big secret, while Marnie threatens Freddie to stay away from Ellie, who’s still pining after him... but Mac comes to the rescue. Elsewhere, Esther cringes when Frankie tries to put her own stamp on The Magic Bean.

episodes.name: Ahoy There!
episodes.overview: Freddie tries to put a smile on Ellie’s face but she is sick of his games, while Marnie is determined to keep the pair apart. Elsewhere, another blackmail note arrives at the Osbornes' and Maxine gets the wrong end of the stick, while grieving Nathan lashes out at Holly.

episodes.name: Rachel’s Funeral
episodes.overview: The Nightingales are worried when Nathan doesn’t come home in time for Rachel’s funeral, while Marnie threatens Freddie to stay away from Ellie. Frightened Kim spots Lindsey disguised in a blonde wig, so she decides to leave the village with Esther. Meanwhile, Leela annoys Cameron when she decides to set up her own cleaning company.

episodes.name: Under Pressure
episodes.overview: Cleo is furious when she sees Nathan and Holly looking cosy and decides to tell the truth, while Lindsey blackmails Kim to meet her with money. Elsewhere, Ste agrees to help Leela with her cleaning business, but he’s got ulterior motives. Meanwhile, Freddie tells Marnie that he wants her not Ellie and leans in for a kiss.

episodes.name: Art Attack!
episodes.overview: Ste tries to clean the Lovedays' flat with Leah and Lucas getting under his feet, while Simone heads home when she finds out that Ste is cleaning her flat not Leela. Elsewhere, Cleo meets Pete when there’s no one for her to talk to and asks whether they can run away together.

episodes.name: Innocent Entrees
episodes.overview: Mrs St Claire invites John Paul for lunch but Myra gets the wrong idea, while Ste asks Mac for a job and James suspiciously encourages his dad to give him a chance. Elsewhere, Holly is on to Cleo when she spots her heading straight towards Pete’s van.

episodes.name: Innocent Entrees
episodes.overview: After a day at the hands of James’ meddling, Harry is blown away when he’s receives an alluring offer. Elsewhere, Scott is devastated when he overhears someone’s true feelings about him, while Holly realises she needs to make a sacrifice to save Cleo from Pete.

episodes.name: Dine ‘n’ Dash
episodes.overview: Ste does a runner with Leah and Lucas after lunch at The Tug Boat, but furious Cameron gets the last laugh when Ste’s temper lands him in serious trouble. Elsewhere, devious Marnie convinces Scott to take desperate measures to help Tony, while Zack locks horns with James.

episodes.name: Under Cover of Darkness
episodes.overview: Scott’s (literally) playing with fire when he tries to help Tony, while Harry makes a decision that could end his relationship once and for all. Meanwhile, after a night in the cells, Ste’s luck goes from bad to worse when a blast from his past arrives in the village.

episodes.name: Dazing Discoveries
episodes.overview: Suspicious Zack and Sonia team up to steal Joanne’s laptop, but they’re totally shocked by the secret they find hidden in her emails. Elsewhere, Scott discovers Marnie’s true intentions following last night’s foiled plan.

episodes.name: Quite the Entrance
episodes.overview: Joanne finally comes clean and the Lovedays’ world is rocked when the real Lisa turns up! Elsewhere, love is in the air when Frankie sets Esther up on a mystery date, while Bridezillas Grace and Sienna exchange a war of words when they both ask Esther to help with their wedding dresses.

episodes.name: Friends Turn to Foes
episodes.overview: Lisa lashes out when the truth is revealed about Sonia stealing her life and Zack has to step in to separate the warring girls. Meanwhile, Grace suggests a faux truce with Sienna for Esther’s benefit. Elsewhere, Mercedes and Joe get close while they feed the ducks with Baby JJ, but they’re being watched…

episodes.name: Sneaking Suspicions
episodes.overview: Kim tries to get close to Baby JJ without Joe cottoning on, while Freddie and Ellie are determined to bring Joe and Mercedes back together. Meanwhile, Sienna feels like the walls are closing in on her when Ben presents her with a pressured surprise, and Lisa refuses to leave Margaret’s side.

episodes.name: Killer Disguises
episodes.overview: Lindsey disguises herself to get closer to Baby JJ, while Joe becomes increasingly worried about his whereabouts. Elsewhere, Trevor is confused by Sienna’s sudden kindness and doesn’t trust her motives, while Louis prepares a special dinner to try and win Lisa over.

episodes.name: Written in the Stars
episodes.overview: Alfie takes Jade stargazing on the hospital roof to celebrate their ten-week anniversary, but Frankie soon finds out and brings them back down to Earth. Meanwhile, Sienna tries to get under Trevor’s skin by becoming frenemies with Grace.

episodes.name: Hen-Don't
episodes.overview: Grace gives Sienna a glamorous makeover for her hen-do celebrations, and Sienna tells Trevor he needs to make a decision about what he wants. Elsewhere, Frankie unsuccessfully tries to keep Alfie and Jade apart, while Leela panics when she has to be in two places at once.

episodes.name: Chiming For the Wrong Man
episodes.overview: It’s Sienna and Ben’s wedding day, but Sienna knows she’s walking down the aisle to the wrong man. Elsewhere, Harry notices the “Cameron is a killer” engraving on the floor of the shack, and Leela suggests Cameron should call Lockie. Elsewhere, Marnie has a ‘helpful’ suggestion for Tony.

episodes.name: O Brother Where Art Thou?
episodes.overview: Ste swipes Cameron’s phone and confronts him about Lockie, while James is surprisingly unsettled by his mother’s latest tactic. Elsewhere, Alfie turns up dressed as a Frenchman to help Jade with her revision.

episodes.name: In Deep Water
episodes.overview: Ste and Cameron battle on a boat, causing Ste to fall in - but he can’t swim – so Cameron has a life-or-death decision to make. Meanwhile, Scott is heartbroken when he realises John Paul is ashamed of him, and Jade’s illness takes a dramatic turn for the worse.

episodes.name: The Truth Hurts
episodes.overview: Sally and Myra lock horns over John Paul, leaving Myra with some food for thought. Elsewhere, Alfie and Jade face some serious repercussions after yesterday’s events, while Leela worries about what has happened to Ste.

episodes.name: Dangerous Encounter
episodes.overview: Silas makes a return to the village and Kim plays straight into the palm of his hand, while Tony finds himself in trouble when his money problems spiral out of control. Elsewhere, Myra and Sally have a face off over John Paul, but they’re unaware they’ve been overheard!

episodes.name: Hoodwinked
episodes.overview: Mercedes meets her match in an unlikely villager when she conjures up a get-rich-quick scheme. Elsewhere, Pete gives Cleo an ultimatum that could mean she misses her A Levels, while Silas and Lindsey’s wicked plot is in danger of being foiled.

episodes.name: Nurse’s Instinct
episodes.overview: When Lindsey’s waters break at the garage, she calls Kim who rushes to be with her, but Celine and Tegan are reluctant to help their old colleague. Meanwhile, Joe and Mercedes make up, but she’s later shocked by a visitor at the Roscoe’s. Elsewhere, Cleo is pestered by calls from Pete at the Space Ball.

episodes.name: Out of this World
episodes.overview: Scott proposes to John Paul at the Space Ball, while a petrified Mercedes bares her soul to Silas over a sinister game of chess, which has devastating effects for someone.

episodes.name: Parental Bond
episodes.overview: Cleo’s decision to go away with Pete sparks a showdown at the school which exposes a huge secret, while a conflicted Freddie has a big decision to make about his newfound fatherhood.

episodes.name: When the Going Gets Tough
episodes.overview: John Paul decides he’s had enough and gets tough, while Esther comforts Kim when her parents don’t want anything to do with her. Meanwhile, Tony and Diane are left with a life-changing choice to make.

episodes.name: Relight My Fire(man)
episodes.overview: It’s time for Grace’s hunk-filled hen do, but the spotlight is on Sienna when she tells Trevor she wants to leave Ben. Elsewhere, Scott gets a secret off his chest, which has heart-breaking results.

episodes.name: Slashed Hopes
episodes.overview: Nico lands someone with a bombshell when her world starts falling apart, while Grace hits a major bump in the road on the way to the church. Elsewhere in the village, James attempts to impress his latest conquest.

episodes.name: Get Him to the Church on Time
episodes.overview: It’s the wedding of the year, but Trevor’s delayed by a raging Ben. When he finally arrives, Trevor bumps into a tormented Nico before heading up the aisle. Back in the village, John Paul tries to save his relationship.

episodes.name: The Aftermath
episodes.overview: James makes a deal with the devil, while Maxine panics about her big secret. Elsewhere, as shocking news spreads around Hollyoaks, an innocent person finds themselves in the firing line.

episodes.name: Tainted Arrow
episodes.overview: Ellie decides to play cupid when she notices a spark between Holly and Nathan. Celine is forced to become a detective when Cleo tries to outsmart her, and Sienna is rocked when a lie is exposed.

episodes.name: Make-Up or Makeover?
episodes.overview: Grace is annoyed when her half-brothers, Liam and Jesse turn up and decide to give her a makeover. It is the day of Cleo’s trial and Nathan is desperate for justice, while DS Thorpe’s suspicions are raised when he finds Jason’s report on Maxine neglecting Patrick.

episodes.name: Loose Lips Sink Ships
episodes.overview: Darren is worried that Jack might spill the beans when he begins reminiscing with DS Thorpe, while Lisa is given some food for thought. Elsewhere, Cindy is desperate to get Dirk back and offers to help out at The Emporium selling fake designer handbags.

episodes.name: Guilty Kisses
episodes.overview: Marnie and Ellie see Nathan and Holly kissing, while Zack’s loyalty is torn between Sonia and Lisa. Meanwhile, Cindy is alarmed when she is told that someone from the consumer institute is on their way to The Emporium.

episodes.name: A Bit Saucy!
episodes.overview: Lisa goes head-to-head with her rival but Sonia knows when she’s been beaten, while Tony prepares for a job interview. Meanwhile, Darren suspects that Tom might have a crush and Jade tries to push him closer to Peri.

episodes.name: From Friends to Foes
episodes.overview: Lisa tells Sonia that she won’t stop tormenting her until she leaves the village, while James tries to get Harry into bed again with the promise that he will give Tony a job. Elsewhere, Tom records a romantic video for Peri after Alfie and Jade decide to set him up.

episodes.name: Double (Trouble) Date
episodes.overview: The Donovan brothers take the Lomax sisters out for a drink but Cameron sees red when he finds out Leela is with another man. Meanwhile, Ste makes a discovery about Harry and James and Lisa’s not happy when Louis tries to reason with her.

episodes.name: You're Cordially Invited To the Launch of...
