episodes.overview: All is not sunny at the grand opening of Marnie’s new restaurant, while Leela has had enough of Cameron’s angst so decides to have some fun. Elsewhere, Jack and Mac are determined to keep Jade and Alfie apart but the love-struck teens have other ideas.

episodes.name: Poisonous Temptations
episodes.overview: Ste has to dig deep to find strength when Cameron leads him into temptation, while Tegan offers Freddie a shoulder to cry on when she sees that he is struggling. Elsewhere, Mercedes does her best to become a domestic goddess.

episodes.name: Time to Make Decisions
episodes.overview: After ignoring a letter from social services, Freddie finally turns up at the hospital to meet the social worker. Meanwhile, Cameron continues to weaken Ste’s will power and Leela has a confession to make.

episodes.name: Friend or Foe?
episodes.overview: Sienna has her sights on helping Grace, but she seems to have an ulterior motive. Meanwhile, Mercedes and Joe are faced with a life-changing decision and John Paul prepares to deal with his mistake.

episodes.name: Caught in the Act
episodes.overview: Diane is gobsmacked by what she sees when she pops round to Marnie’s flat, while Maxine worries she’s let a secret slip after giving DS Thorpe a lift. Elsewhere, Grace makes a scandalous discovery about Trevor.

episodes.name: Ashes to Ashes
episodes.overview: The dreaded day has arrived – it’s Trevor’s funeral. As Grace and Sienna prepare, Grace is taken back by the arrival of Adam Donovan. Meanwhile, Nancy and Darren play cupid with Maxine and Dirk, but Cindy struggles to hide her feelings.

episodes.name: Bedlam
episodes.overview: Trevor’s funeral descends into chaos, leaving the Donovan brothers to step up to the plate. It’s time for Grace to decide whether she wants them to stick around! Elsewhere, the walls are closing in for Maxine when Sienna is quizzed about Patrick’s disappearance.

episodes.name: You’ve Got a Friend in Me
episodes.overview: Tom is called upon for help when Jade is pining over Alfie. Mac agrees to let Alfie take part in a charity skydive with Jade, and finds himself softening to Marnie on the family trip. Elsewhere, Darren doesn’t approve of Maxine’s new love interest and decides he’s not good enough for her.

episodes.name: Falling for You
episodes.overview: It’s the day of the sky dive! Alfie is terrified of getting into the plane but with Jade by his side they both jump on board. In the air-field, Cindy makes a grand gesture in an attempt to win Dirk back. Meanwhile, Freddie and Marnie share a secret kiss.

episodes.name: Fever-Pitch
episodes.overview: Myra takes a nasty tumble at the school following a heated argument with Sally. With tensions running high, did she fall, or was she pushed? Meanwhile, Alfie makes a heart-breaking decision while he waits to hear more about his treatment, and Nancy and Darren take their meddling to another level when they try to end Maxine’s romance with Adam.

episodes.name: Allegiances
episodes.overview: The McQueens are waiting at Myra’s bedside, but their loyalty is divided - Mercedes is determined to find out the truth about her mum’s accident, while John Paul takes Sally’s side. Elsewhere, James is up to his old tricks when John Paul asks for help and Tony is suspicious about what power Diane has over Marnie.

episodes.name: Young Heartache
episodes.overview: A heart-broken Peri sees red when she discovers something about Tom and Jade. Elsewhere, Marnie reaches breaking point with Diane and Tony, so she begins to plot a new scheme. Meanwhile, John Paul is told Sally should prepare for the worst legal result.

episodes.name: The Talk Down
episodes.overview: Marnie urges Freddie to talk to Diane but can he convince her to keep quiet? Elsewhere, Mercedes and Celine are delighted when Reenie returns to Hollyoaks, but Cleo tries to keep her distance, while Scott is on Cloud 9 after he spends his first night with John Paul.

episodes.name: Justice in Mind
episodes.overview: Cleo is asked to go to the police station to be prepped for Pete’s trial, but Reenie decides she wants to deal with Pete in her own way. Meanwhile, Nathan’s date with Holly is ruined when he gets a call from Rachel’s family, will he come clean about Rachel’s affair?

episodes.name: Day One of Pete’s Trial
episodes.overview: The McQueen’s prepare for Pete’s trial, but Cleo feels let down when Reenie goes missing and Holly finds her outside The Dog. After an altercation with Mercedes, John Paul realises he can’t be with his family at the trial, and Scott tries to cheer him up by telling him he loves him. At the trial Cleo is put under pressure when she is asked questions about Rachel's death.

episodes.name: Day Two of Pete’s Trial
episodes.overview: Pete’s trial continues with witness statements from Harry, Jade, Celine and finally Reenie takes to the stand. Later that day, Alfie goes to see Jade and tells her that he can’t be more than her friend because he doesn’t want her to be heartbroken when he dies like Nathan is about Rachel.

episodes.name: The Verdict
episodes.overview: Reenie gives Mercedes food for thought when she mentions something about a children’s book, and with Celine’s help they tear Cleo’s room apart and find a clue. Meanwhile, Pete is being questioned by both sides and puts on the performance of his life, and Cleo is called back to the stand.

episodes.name: Out-Of-Date
episodes.overview: James bumps into his former lover, Carter and John Paul is roped into pretending to be James’ partner, which means he has to lie to Scott. Elsewhere, Nancy’s opinion of Adam is altered when he finds a missing Oscar and she discovers he can speak sign language.

episodes.name: Welcome Back Max!
episodes.overview: Nancy invites Adam to Maxine’s welcome home dinner, but Maxine arrives with some unexpected news! Elsewhere, Liam and Jesse have to think fast after they struggle to keep The Loft on its feet, and Joanne is intrigued when she hears about the vacancy at James’ ex, Carter’s law firm.

episodes.name: Donovan Dreams
episodes.overview: The Donovan brothers make plans to tell Grace about their idea to renovate the downstairs of The Loft into a salon after she gives them an ultimatum. Elsewhere, Marnie calls for Mac’s attention when there is a break-in at Nightingale’s restaurant, while Ellie tries to drive a wedge between Neeta and her dad.

episodes.name: Like a Puppet on a String
episodes.overview: Ellie plays puppet master to Jesse and Neeta when they are invited to a party at Grace’s flat, while Mac becomes annoyed at Marnie’s interfering. Meanwhile, Tony tells Harry that he and Diane are moving to France for the summer.

episodes.name: Starry Reunion
episodes.overview: Tony and Diane set up Harry and Ste so they’re alone together at the flat, but Ste considers buying a bag of crystal meth. Elsewhere, Neeta creeps guiltily back into The Dog the next morning, and Ellie shows her mum a photo of Neeta with Jesse.

episodes.name: Unstable Ste
episodes.overview: The drugs are burning a hole in Ste’s pocket, but when Esther offers him an interview for a job at The Bean, he has to get his act together. Ste gets the assistant manager job, but what state will he be in?

episodes.name: Malicious Behaviour
episodes.overview: Peri is missing Tom and blames Jade for coming between them, they argue and Peri takes a spiteful photo of Jade when her wig slips. Elsewhere, Sienna chases down a thief at Price Slice, while things are looking up for Sonia when she ends up kissing Jesse and Freddie offers her a job at the garage.

episodes.name: Resist Temptation!
episodes.overview: Ste tries to hide his meth habit from Harry, and is determined to stay clean until Cameron offers him some more drugs. Elsewhere, Jade is heartbroken by the spiteful picture Peri posts online of her, while Lisa is out for revenge when she overhears Sonia calling her a “bone idle brat”.

episodes.name: Bon Voyage
episodes.overview: At the leavers party, Cleo, Harry and Holly are discussing university plans when Peri lets out a blood-curdling scream. Elsewhere, Ste panics when he thinks Baby Rose has eaten his missing drugs, while Tony has second thoughts about moving to France.

episodes.name: Please Don’t Go!
episodes.overview: Tegan meets Diane at The Bean and begs her not to go to France with Baby Dee-Dee, while Lisa announces that she’s got all the teens tickets to go to Ibiza using money from The Tugboat. Meanwhile, Harry realises that Ste is back on drugs.

episodes.name: Special Episode
episodes.overview: In this special three-hander episode, we see Harry and Tony struggle to keep Ste from using more drugs. Ste’s withdrawals get very painful, and he ends up smashing the twins’ piggy bank for money and flees the flat. He ends up being locked in the house but his pain and sickness become too much...

episodes.name: Still Hung Up…
episodes.overview: Zack offers to help Sonia apply to college, while Lisa decides The Tugboat needs a lick of paint and enlists the help of Nathan and Cleo. Elsewhere, Esther has to pretend to be Grace’s partner to impress a potential child-minder, and Kim is left without anyone by her side.

episodes.name: Life on the Line
episodes.overview: After a terrible first day back at work, Kim’s life is in danger when she collapses in a trance-like state. Elsewhere, Cleo finds herself growing closer to Nathan when she gets a job at The Dog, and Grace offers Esther an intriguing proposal.

episodes.name: No Plus Ones
episodes.overview: Zack has an ultimatum for his parents, which they fear could push Lisa away, so they’re relieved when she turns up for a family dinner… until Jesse arrives too. Elsewhere, Celine tries desperately to get through to Kim and Peri continues her cruel campaign against Jade.

episodes.name: Hidden Intentions
episodes.overview: Peri offers to help Alfie with a romantic surprise for Jade, but her true motives show when she gives Jade a horrendous makeover. Meanwhile, Nathan has got some thinking to do when Cleo tells him to forgive Holly or forget her.

episodes.name: Disastrous Dining
episodes.overview: Kim throws a dinner party with dreadful results, while Jack begs someone to stay away from his family. Elsewhere in the village, Maxine is determined not to give into her physical urges with ‘Mike’, but with a face (and bod) like his, she’s struggling. Meanwhile, Warren sees red when James demands his payment.

episodes.name: True Colours
episodes.overview: Maxine visits ‘Mike’, ready to open up to her new man, but she’s scared off when his temper takes over. Back in the village, Jade decides it’s time to stand up for herself, with a little help from Alfie.

episodes.name: Suspicious Silver Fox
episodes.overview: Neeta helps Jesse and Adam with the salon, as Mac keeps a watchful eye on them, but Jesse has a mischievous trick up his sleeve. Elsewhere, Sienna tries to stop Warren from leaving the village with the tempting thought of Maxine being sent to prison, while Nico convinces Peri to come camping with her. Darren and Nancy are shocked by a sight they see through Alfie’s telescope.

episodes.name: Bunking Off
episodes.overview: Peri and Nico find themselves trapped in the bunker, and after an argument about Jade locking them in, a wooden beam falls and knocks Peri unconscious and blocks the exit. Meanwhile, Sienna calls the police and Maxine watches in horror as they head for the wall, do they know where the body is? Elsewhere, Marnie suggests that Neeta model for the Donovan brothers, knowing that Mac will seethe with jealousy.

episodes.name: Caught in a Trap
episodes.overview: Nico attempts to give Peri mouth-to-mouth, while Maxine is taken to the station and Jack and Frankie are terrified by the startling truth. Sienna and Cameron realise that Nico and Peri are missing, while Mac confides in Neeta about his insecurities.

episodes.name: Search Party
episodes.overview: Alfie is stressed worrying about his PET scan results and offers to help look for Peri and Nico as a distraction. Meanwhile, Cameron, Leela, Sienna and Warren team up to find the teens.

episodes.name: Mature & Insecure
episodes.overview: Mac is becoming more and more conscious of the age gap between him and Neeta, while the Donovans worry about the new posters that have arrived at the salon. Elsewhere, Darren allows Maxine and Minnie to stay with them, much to Nancy’s annoyance.

episodes.name: Got the Wrong Girl
episodes.overview: Nathan mistakenly thinks Cleo has asked him on a date, but it’s Lisa who has her eye on him. Kim and Esther try on wedding dresses while Diego’s sister Maria shows up at the McQueen’s with a hidden agenda. Elsewhere, Mac’s arrested for assaulting Neeta when someone reports him to the police!

episodes.name: Suspicious Minds
episodes.overview: Myra is onto Maria and demands answers, while the Donovan’s officially open their salon. It’s Cleo’s 18th and she wants a quiet celebration, but Lisa has other ideas! Elsewhere, Grace and Frankie team up to sabotage Esther’s wedding, and Nathan makes a move on Cleo.

episodes.name: Playing the Game
episodes.overview: Liam and Joanne have an unexpected rendezvous, while Nathan flirts with Lisa to repair his friendship with Cleo. Elsewhere, Esther and Kim scramble to save their big day, while Mercedes goes to desperate lengths to protect her family.

episodes.name: Wedding Day Jitters
episodes.overview: At the wedding ceremony, Kim doubts Esther’s feelings and fears she won’t go through with marrying her. Elsewhere, Nathan’s surprised to see another side of Lisa, while Joanne can’t take a hint from Liam and Mercedes exposes Maria’s betrayal.

episodes.name: Shattered Dreams
episodes.overview: Freddie’s heart sinks when he and Joe see a ‘For Sale’ sign outside the garage, Mercedes threatens to reveal Diego’s lies to Myra, and Esther confronts Grace over her involvement in Kim’s disappearance. Elsewhere, Joanne loses her mother, but finds a potential new man…

episodes.name: Double Trouble
episodes.overview: Warren and Freddie join forces and come up with a plan to save the garage from repossession, while Joe’s world is turned upside down when he discovers Mercedes and Diego’s secret texts. Elsewhere, Alfie and Jade ditch Mac for some alone time and Joanne plans her revenge on Liam…

episodes.name: McQueen Day Out
episodes.overview: It’s a disastrous day out for Myra, Mercedes and Celine when their high-end baby ‘shopping’ trip doesn’t go to plan. Back in the village, crossed wires get Alfie and Jade thinking about losing their virginity, while legal eagle Joanne offers Joe her advice… but as ever, she’s got a hidden agenda.

episodes.name: No Holding Back
episodes.overview: Joanne is on a mission to get her man, while Marnie stands in the way of Jade’s plans to take Alfie to a lecture with his hero – astronaut Helen Sharman. Elsewhere, Mac and Sally end up in a Camper Van bidding war and Warren is furious when Freddie slashes his share of the profits.

episodes.name: Level-Up
episodes.overview: Ellie and Freddie take a big step forward when they decide to move in together, but their bubble could be about to burst! Elsewhere, the Roscoes' garage is sold, while James and Joanne bet on who can split up a relationship first and Amy Barnes arrives home to some disappointing news from Cindy.

episodes.name: Who’s That Girl?
episodes.overview: The Nightingale family descend into chaos, while Ste struggles to cope on his first day out after rehab when he finds a stranger looming over Leah - but all is not as it seems!

episodes.name: The Pay-Off
episodes.overview: The Nightingales are reeling from yesterday’s revelation, and as Marnie tries to stop anyone else finding out her secret, Ellie is stunned by a romantic declaration… on Freddie’s bum. Elsewhere, Cleo is playing cupid for Nathan and Lisa, while Ste struggles to make amends with Ryan.

episodes.name: Hog in the Pond
episodes.overview: Lisa and Nathan’s budding romance hits a bump in the road when there’s a surprise delivery at The Dog. Meanwhile, Alfie’s health takes a turn for the worse, leaving Marnie’s plot in jeopardy. Elsewhere, Scott wants to take his relationship with John Paul to the next level, and Ste confides in Tegan about Leah, but he’s got it all wrong!

episodes.name: Chaos in the Car Park
episodes.overview: Darren and Nancy enlist Grace’s help to get rid of Warren, but their plan ends in total disaster. Elsewhere in the village, there’s havoc when an animal is on the loose, and James comes up with a plan to break up Scott and John Paul.

episodes.name: Repercussions
episodes.overview: Nancy and Darren struggle in the aftermath of the accident, as Scott worries that he’s lost John Paul. Elsewhere, Ste tries to make amends with Ryan and Amy, while Cleo, Harry, Zack and Holly get their A-Level results and Grace finds a reminder of the past that leaves her wanting revenge.

episodes.name: Lights Out, All Out
episodes.overview: Emotions run high as the power goes out in the village - Grace wants the truth from Sienna, while Nathan tries to get closer to Lisa and James attempts to turn over a new leaf.

episodes.name: Sneaky, Sneaky
episodes.overview: Grace is furious and wants revenge on Sienna, so entices Warren with a business proposition, while Darren, Maxine and Tony break into the garage. Meanwhile, John Paul is caught in the middle when Myra and Sally begin arguing, and Jesse gets a VERY hot stone massage from Celine.

episodes.name: Honest Heart
episodes.overview: Adam confesses his true feelings to Maxine, while Grace steals Warren’s phone and texts Sienna arranging to meet her at the garage. Elsewhere, Nico‘s obsession with Peri intensifies as they share a picnic together in The Folly, however she’s furious when Tom returns with Baby Steph.

episodes.name: Waiting Game
episodes.overview: One Hollyoaks family are on edge as they wait at the hospital for news on a loved one. Elsewhere, Jade tells Tom about Peri bullying her, while Mercedes is worried that her family think her wedding to Joe is a joke.

episodes.name: Caught in a Trap
episodes.overview: James’ plan to help Joanne is foiled, while Sienna desperately tries to help Warren. Joe makes fun of Mercedes, and the kids of Hollyoaks High wait with baited breath for their GCSE results. Meanwhile, Nico has a plan to help Peri…

episodes.name: Poisonous Plotting
episodes.overview: Nico’s sinister plan is coming together. Meanwhile, just as Joe and Mercedes think everything’s going to plan, the worst possible thing happens! Elsewhere, Diego finds a way to make John Paul smile.

episodes.name: Hands Off!
episodes.overview: Joanne is delighted when Joe asks her to join him for some wine and they end up kissing, while Diego is doing what he can to help free Mercedes from prison. Elsewhere, Tom is preparing to leave for London when he starts being sick, but Peri is suspicious that Nico has something to do with it. Courtney arrives in Hollyoaks and Cameron tells her she is not welcome.

episodes.name: Smothered Feelings
episodes.overview: Joe announces that he and Mercedes are finished, while Joanne is suspicious that he still has feelings for her. Meanwhile, Diego tracks down Maria and records a confession but he is tempted when she suggests they runaway to Bali together. Warren offers Darren and Maxine their old space at the garage to run the cab business.

episodes.name: Graffiti Artist
episodes.overview: Maxine is spiraling out of control and sabotages Warren’s new banner for the garage, while Nancy panics when she thinks she might have left a brooch in the woods where they buried Patrick. Elsewhere, Cameron is on edge as Courtney tries to track down Lockie, while Alfie is amazed when he gets a video call from his hero, and that it was Cindy who organised it.

episodes.name: Matter for the Heart
episodes.overview: Sienna tries to persuade Darren and Nancy to tell the truth or face the full force of Warren's rage, while Nancy pales when Darren starts having a heart attack and Warren refuses to call an ambulance. Meanwhile, Nico takes Peri’s friendship the wrong way, and they stumble upon an unwanted discovery.

episodes.name: Waiting Game…
episodes.overview: Sienna meets Nico at the police station, and there’s a flashback to Nancy and Darren taking a strand of hair from a hairbrush in Maxine’s flat to plant on Patrick, but does the hairbrush belong to Sienna, Maxine or Nico?

episodes.name: Maxine’s Perspective
episodes.overview: We will see through Maxine’s POV that DS Armstrong is certain she is responsible for Patrick’s death when he interrogates her at the police station. But when she keels over and faints during questioning, she is taken into hospital and Tegan questions whether she might be pregnant. Maxine confides in Adam, and she decides to take a pregnancy test but who would be the baby’s daddy, Adam or big baddie Warren? When Warren catches wind that Maxine might be preggers, he rushes to confront her and ends up in a tussle with Adam. Maxine decides to hand herself in, but when DS Armstrong shows her a brooch that was found in the woods she is pushed to admit who else was involved.

episodes.name: Dancy’s Perspective
episodes.overview: When we are given Darren and Nancy’s perspective, we see that Jack is suspicious Darren might be involved with Patrick’s death, and his fears are confirmed when DS Armstrong arrives to question him. At school, Nancy can’t control herself and panics when she can’t seem to stop her leg from trembling. Louis takes her to the hospital where she confesses that something might be seriously wrong with her health. Back at the Osbornes’, Darren and Jack discover Maxine’s pregnancy test, but think it belongs to Nancy. With his family’s best interests at heart, Darren calls DS Armstrong and prepares to tell him the truth, while Nancy has a light-bulb moment (DING!) and confronts Nico about the night Patrick died.

episodes.name: Nico’s Perspective
episodes.overview: Nico becomes the prime suspect when Armstrong and Ryan find an unseen video clip on Patrick’s memory stick. Louis suggests that Simone should be Nico’s solicitor, but Nico begs Peri to run away with her. Peri becomes suspicious when Tom, who is still sick, mentions the aftershave that she got him, and Nico prepares to tell Peri the whole truth about Patrick…

episodes.name: Warren’s Perspective
episodes.overview: Warren is shocked to find out that Sienna was prepared to help Patrick die, while Ryan explains that he has a link to Warren’s past - Joel - and can use him to get a confession. Warren refuses to listen to Grace as she rants about Sienna’s past, and when Darren tells Warren that Patrick used to abuse Sienna, Warren suggests to Sienna that they run away together.

episodes.name: Sienna’s Perspective
episodes.overview: Sienna flees Patrick’s memorial school fundraiser when the police arrive to ask questions. Leela finds her in the woods and is conflicted when Sienna asks her to help get her away from ‘Oaks. Sienna eventually goes to the police station, and begins being questioned by DS Armstrong… but she is then floored by new evidence.

episodes.name: Forever and Always
episodes.overview: Mac dresses The Dog as Neeta’s ideal wedding venue and proposes to her there and then. (Nothing like a last minute wedding, eh?) Despite all they’ve been though, she says yes, but their happy day is brought crashing down when heartbroken Marnie lashes out and ruins the decorations. Over at the Osbornes', Jade finds a lump when she's getting ready for the wedding and Frankie takes her straight to the hospital. When she turns up at The Dog looking beautiful, Alfie decides to seize the day and proposes, so Nathan ‘marries’ them on the spot. <3 Worried about how much time they have left together, Jalfie vow to live 50 years-worth of marriage right now… starting off with an improvised first home and a very sandy ‘honeymoon’.

episodes.name: Mum’s the Word
episodes.overview: Jesse and Adam are shocked to discover that their mum Tracey has arrived in the village and is on the run from the bailiffs. The boys offer to help her out, but the idea of Tracey sticking around doesn’t tickle Grace’s fancy, so she writes a cheque and tells her to leave. With both mother and daughter acting strange… it seems the two are hiding something from the boys.

episodes.name: Decision Time
episodes.overview: Joe gives Joanne a key to the house, which makes things just a little bit awkward when Mercedes makes a return. Pushed into a corner, Joe comes to a decision about who he really wants to be with.

episodes.name: No Scandal too Scandalous
episodes.overview: Myra is eager to make a quick buck, so she pretends to be having 8 babies to attract media attention… but they won’t buy into it without proof of a scan! With Diego wanting no part of Myra’s dodgy scheme, she enlists the help of Jesse Donovan who reluctantly plays the role of the baby daddy.

episodes.name: Fool-proof Tan Plan
episodes.overview: With his signature glow fading like the summer sun, Scott is desperate for a spray tan and offers Ste £20 when he hears he used to tan Sinead. As it happens, Ste’s a natural and he suggests to Tony that they should invest in a Mobile Tan Van.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksSurprise
episodes.overview: Desperate Esther allows Grace to help her - but can they solve the mystery of missing Kim? And the Roscoe boys endure the 'meal from hell' with an unwanted guest.

episodes.name: #GameOfOaks
episodes.overview: Simone takes desperate measures as Lisa's partying gets out of control. Leah has harsh words for a devastated Ste, while Jack's forced to face his demons as he visits someone from his past.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksWhodunnit
episodes.overview: Simone hosts a dinner party to try to save her family, but with Marnie invited, will all go as planned? And a new arrival in the village puts Cindy's nose out of joint.

episodes.name: #Nightingales
episodes.overview: Freddie tries to win back Ellie's heart. Cleo is heart-broken as Nathan and Lisa are stronger than ever. Cindy thinks her luck is changing, but soon discovers she has the boss from hell.

episodes.name: #MarnieMeddling
episodes.overview: Mercedes' mistake lands Freddie in hot water - can he convince Ellie he loves her? And Marnie's determined to stop Lisa and Nathan from moving forward with their relationship.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksConsent
episodes.overview: It's Freshers' Week in the village and Lisa persuades Ellie to come out to a Loft party to help get over Freddie. In among the chaos and the party, will it be a night they never forget?

episodes.name: #Ellie
episodes.overview: Celine feels trapped by her promise to marry Diego, while Joe has to ask Joanne for a difficult favour. Tegan is desperate for a boyfriend, and Ellie confides a terrible secret.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksHenDo
episodes.overview: It's Mercedes and Celine's hen do, complete with McQueen madness, but someone makes a horrible mistake. Nick gets to know Holly, and Joanne schemes about Joe's wedding.

episodes.name: #McQueenWedding
episodes.overview: Freddie desperately tries to keep things together for Joe's wedding, and Mercedes is in damage limitation mode. Liam suspects something's up with Celine, as everyone prepares for the event.

episodes.name: #McQueensLogic
episodes.overview: Celine prepares to walk down the aisle, Liam and Jesse party in the Loft, and a huge secret is revealed.

episodes.name: Jalfie’s 50 Years of Marriage
episodes.overview: Alfie sets up a green screen to take fake holiday snaps for Jade before her hospital appointment. And Celine tries to help her family as Mercedes has to say a difficult goodbye.

episodes.name: Unhappy Families
episodes.overview: Nathan gets on the wrong side of Lisa when she overhears him talking about Rachel, the tension sizzles between Nathan and Cleo when Lisa storms off. Meanwhile, Jade tries to stay strong.

episodes.name: Double Trouble
episodes.overview: It's the day of the Little Starz talent show and Leah is in diva mode. Eva gets Liam involved in a dangerous plan, and Cameron is upset with Courtney over her Find Lockie page.

episodes.name: Eva’s Web of Deceit
episodes.overview: Eva lies to Liam about how much trouble they're in - what does she have planned? Leela receives some worrying news at the hospital, and Ste fights to see more of the kids.

episodes.name: Courtney’s Mission
episodes.overview: Liam worries his actions have put his family in danger, while Leah and Lucas are confused when Ste takes them out of school. And Marnie is speechless when she faces Cindy's sister Jude.

episodes.name: Ste’s Fight for Custody
episodes.overview: TV stardom beckons for Leah, but chaos ensues when the adults can't behave themselves. Will Ste manage to keep his cool? Jude confronts Jack over past misdemeanours.

episodes.name: Jude’s Return
episodes.overview: Cameron tries to convince Courtney to stop searching for Lockie, but it's the police who uncover a new development. Cindy looks to team up in business with Jude.

episodes.name: A Body Is Found
episodes.overview: Cameron is asked by the police to help with a new development in the disappearance of Lockie. Cindy is furious when her career is scuppered by somebody, but there could be a silver lining.

episodes.name: Maxine Visits Sienna
episodes.overview: Jude's business is hit by a wave of opposition, but can she appease the troublemakers? Despite Adam and Maxine's lies, Warren discovers some big news.

episodes.name: Birthday Girl Mercedes
episodes.overview: Maxine seeks the truth on a prison visit to Sienna. Peri and Nico's plan for revenge on Cameron has horrific consequences. Things get a bit messy at Mercedes' birthday bash.

episodes.name: 50 Years of Marriage Draw to an End
episodes.overview: Mercedes is astounded when she receives news from the police that could be a game changer for her and Joe. Nico and Peri's Cameron prank has devastating consequences for two villagers.

episodes.name: Dear Nathan
episodes.overview: Mercedes is determined to get her man back, but Joanne is equally unwavering. Warren's plan for revenge panics Nico, but will she be able to pull him back from the edge?

episodes.name: Collision Course
episodes.overview: Mercedes and Joanne are set on a collision course, but will it put a stop to Joanne's games? Cleo and Celine have to come up with a plan to prevent Nathan finding out how Cleo really feels.

episodes.name: A Step Too Far
episodes.overview: Can Frankie convince a guilt-ridden Alfie that he is exactly what Jade needs right now? Nathan and Cleo realise that they need to have a serious discussion about their future.

episodes.name: Family Reunion
episodes.overview: Jade's illness looms large over those closest to her. Sonia, Peri and the Osbornes rally around for support, but it's Alfie who Jade turns to as the young lovers spend a dream day together.

episodes.name: Nana’s Home!
episodes.overview: As Myra worries about the future, Nana returns to lift her spirits. Mac is furious when he discovers Neeta's filed for divorce with James's help. Alfie comes to terms with upsetting news.

episodes.name: The Perfect Daughter
episodes.overview: John Paul tries to encourage James to patch things up with his family. It's a tough day for Sonia when someone from her past appears. And Myra is on the hunt for a new baby daddy.

episodes.name: James’ Vendetta
episodes.overview: James is angry at John Paul for meddling. Peri struggles to contain her guilt over Maxine. Sonia has a difficult decision to make as Simone and Lisa remain at loggerheads.

episodes.name: Freaky Friendship
episodes.overview: John Paul encourages James to get some counselling; can they patch things up? Things go from bad to worse for the Lovedays as Lisa makes a rash decision; will Simone ever forgive her?

episodes.name: #NightmareNico
episodes.overview: Cindy starts working for Jude again, but will she uncover the scam? Leela and Cameron desperately search for Peri. Joanne revels in Mercedes' misery when she sees her with Joe and the kids.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksNoExit
episodes.overview: With her crimes exposed, the hunt is on for Nico. Will jailbird Sienna help catch her deadly daughter? And Joe has a surprise in store for Mercedes, but will it go to plan?

episodes.name: #HollyoaksNoExit
episodes.overview: Joanne leaves Joe's plans up in the air, while Jesse and Celine get lost in a maze, then in each other's arms. Cameron's out for revenge, but Nico is on the loose and has murder in mind.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksNoExit
episodes.overview: Sparks are flying between loved-up Joe and Mercedes. Jesse feels guilty as the Spooktacular is devastated by disaster, while Cindy and Jude have seduction on their minds.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's the morning after the horror of Halloween and Sienna finds an unlikely shoulder to cry on. Freddie faces new responsibilities, and Nancy reveals a painful secret to her family.

episodes.name: #TheOsbornes
episodes.overview: Joanne makes a terrible discovery and plans revenge on Mercedes. Cindy and Dirk's luck seems to have changed, but can they enjoy their good fortune when Sally is left out of pocket?

episodes.name: #MissingOsbornes
episodes.overview: Cindy is panicked by the Osbornes' disappearance. Liam is worried about what Eva has done, and Grace finds out something shocking.

episodes.name: #FindTheOsbornes
episodes.overview: Maxine is stunned by an unexpected offer, and Cindy swears to find out the truth about the Osbornes. Nick comes up with a plan, and Louis wants to support Simone.

episodes.name: #GoldieMcQueen
episodes.overview: Myra is floored by a surprise arrival, while Simone gets bad news, which Joanne tries to capitalise on. Maxine worries that Adam is about to do something drastic.

episodes.name: #SimoneLoveday
episodes.overview: Cameron stresses when Courtney tries to get 'Lockie's' body released from the mortuary, and Leela is given a new task. Louis is worried that Simone's drinking is getting out of hand.

episodes.name: #KillerCameron
episodes.overview: Marnie is out for blood when she finds out about Jude's scam, Cameron worries about Leela, and Myra reaches her breaking point. Courtney and Tegan hatch a plan.

episodes.name: #TimeToConfess
episodes.overview: Can John Paul persuade James to help free Diego from prison? A determined Warren vows to find out who set the maze on fire, and Marnie is shocked by James's strategy.

episodes.name: #MarniesMother
episodes.overview: Cameron makes a shocking discovery which he plans to use to his advantage. James concocts a devious plan, but will it work? Tony is sceptical when Marnie asks him for a favour.

episodes.name: #CelinesDilemma
episodes.overview: Joel welcomes a newcomer to the church, but they're not all that they seem. Alfie accuses Cindy of only wanting a relationship with him when it suits her.

episodes.name: #WelcomeHomeOB
episodes.overview: Cindy is delighted when a familiar face returns to the village. Liam finds himself the victim of blackmail, and Joel is concerned by his new parishioner's thirst for revenge.

episodes.name: #McQueenTwins
episodes.overview: When a clue about the disappearance of the Osbornes emerges, who will get there first? Cindy and Grace? Or Eva? Simone is heartbroken when she finds out who Lisa has been visiting.

episodes.name: #LindaGray
episodes.overview: Mac is furious when a surprise visitor comes to town. At Nightingales, Tony is on the menu for one lucky lady, and Liam goes to extremes to protect Grace.

episodes.name: #LisaLoveday
episodes.overview: As Nick and Holly grow closer, Nick decides it's time to get Ellie off his back. Can Harry convince Ste to accept help from an enemy? Lisa drops a bombshell on Cleo.

episodes.name: #HaysSprays
episodes.overview: Marnie's desperate to make up with Mac, and Ellie fights for Freddie. Ste and Amy bond over a bad tan, but can he change her mind over the custody battle?

episodes.name: #DaddySte
episodes.overview: Louis receives some shocking news, and it's Prince and Hunter's first day at Hollyoaks High. It's also the day of Ste's custody hearing, but will it go ahead?

episodes.name: #DaddySte
episodes.overview: Marnie has a plan to sabotage Nathan and Lisa's relationship, Goldie's furious when Prince and Hunter don't keep their promise, and Harry's pleas to Ste fall on deaf ears.

episodes.name: #FoxHay
episodes.overview: Warren and Ste team up against a common enemy. Leah is furious about her acting debut, and Joanne gains new recruits to help her win Louis back. Meanwhile, Ellie breaks Mercedes' heart.

episodes.name: #JJandLexi
episodes.overview: Goldie figures out Mercedes' plan, and Joanne comes to the rescue when Louis gets into trouble. Meanwhile, Warren and Ste have another plan to catch out their enemy.

episodes.name: #Joanne
episodes.overview: Lisa and Zack confront Prince about his accusations, and Joanne gets Louis exactly where she wants him. Simone visits Margaret in prison, and Ryan is tempted by the McQueen charm.

episodes.name: #Joanne
episodes.overview: Celine and John Paul are in a rut, and they decide a McQueen night out is what they need. But Celine has other plans for an oblivious John Paul. James makes John Paul a tempting offer.

episodes.name: #TeamLoveday
episodes.overview: Celine has exciting news for Cleo and Tegan. Leela's not happy about the wedding dress choices so wants to postpone the wedding - but how will Cameron feel?

episodes.name: #MercyVsJoanne
episodes.overview: Celine is terrified to find a hidden message, and Cameron is furious when Leela drops a bombshell. Adam helps set up the Christmas lights in the village but gets his festivities mixed up.

episodes.name: #KillerCameron
episodes.overview: As the Christmas fair continues, Jesse wonders why Celine is ignoring him, and Adam takes a hit. Cameron's temper lands him in trouble. Ste goes to extreme lengths to make Leah happy.

episodes.name: #AdamsSecret
episodes.overview: Leela throws a Christmas party, but where is Cameron? Nick and Tegan discover each other's secrets. Cleo receives news about Celine, and Ste turns to Tony for help.

episodes.name: #AdamsSecret
episodes.overview: Tegan vows to help Cleo, and Leah ends up in hospital after an accident in the village. Leah forms a plan, and Tracey returns for Adam's birthday but things quickly turn sour.

episodes.name: #AdamComesClean
episodes.overview: Tegan is having withdrawal symptoms, and Nick stops her making a dangerous mistake at the hospital. Leah finds a selfie and text from Goldie on Ryan's phone.

episodes.name: #TheOsbornes
episodes.overview: Nick catches Tegan deleting CCTV footage of Kim. Alfie can't stand the thought of Christmas without Jade. Ellie finds out about Holly and Nick and spills all to Dirk.

episodes.name: #TheDonovans
episodes.overview: Grace finds stolen cash and an empty vodka bottle in Tracey's bag - could this be the last straw? Alfie lets slip to Cindy about him talking to Jade, and Nick reassures Holly.

episodes.name: #TomAndOB
episodes.overview: Just as Ellie starts to feel herself again, she discovers Holly and Nick in one of the toilet cubicles at The Dog. Alfie storms over to Cindy's flat and gets some news he wasn't expecting.

episodes.name: #Ellie
episodes.overview: Just as Ellie starts to feel herself again, she discovers Holly and Nick in one of the toilet cubicles at The Dog. Alfie storms over to Cindy's flat and gets some news he wasn't expecting.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksConsent
episodes.overview: Neeta attends an interview for the teaching assistant job, and Sally lets her sit in on a class. However, Prince and Hunter make sure they don't give her an easy ride.

episodes.name: #TheNightingales
episodes.overview: Sienna visits Joel at church but is left frustrated when he doesn't acknowledge her advances. Nick carefully approaches Ellie to see if they can make a fresh start.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksHenParty
episodes.overview: Prince breaks into the garage and watches as Warren showers Sienna with gifts. John Paul leaves Matthew Jesus with James for the day, but it doesn't end well.

episodes.name: #KillerCameron
episodes.overview: Tegan livens up Leela's hen party with a stripper, but it doesn't go down well with Cameron. Alfie decides to spend Christmas with Cindy, while Dirk plans to spend Jude's scam money.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaksmas
episodes.overview: It's Cameron and Leela's wedding day, but will Leela discover Cameron's crimes? Warren swears to find Sienna's stalker, and Cindy catches Holly and Nick in the back of Dirk's van.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaksmas
episodes.overview: Joel offers to spend the day with Warren, but when they walk into The Dog together, Sienna hides. At the McQueens', James promises to try harder for John Paul and Matthew Jesus.

episodes.name: Sly Sienna
episodes.overview: Sienna persuades Warren to ditch the match with Joel and go with her to bury Nico’s ashes. At the memorial garden, Sienna screams when she sees a wooden cross with the words ‘Sienna Blake RIP 3rd January 2017’ painted on it. Protective Warren promises to kill whoever’s doing this to her! Elsewhere, Leah continues to torment Ryan, trying to tear him and Amy apart so she can see more of Ste. Amy freaks out when a note comes through the door asking ‘do you know what your fiance’s been up to?’

episodes.name: Dinner with the Out-Laws
episodes.overview: Grace is trying to dig for info on Eva and offers to cook dinner for Eva and Liam. She invites OB too, but he verbally attacks Eva – not part of Grace’s plan, but it was part of OB’s. Elsewhere, Amy gets a job at The Bean, while Ryan’s increasingly angry at how Leah is wrapping her mum around her little finger. When talk turns to Ste, Ryan hits boiling point.

episodes.name: Beyond the Call of Duty
episodes.overview: Amy throws Ryan out of the house, and when Goldie causes trouble in the village, police duties bring him to the McQueens’… where Mercedes is by herself. There’s sexual chemistry between the pair and they end up kissing. The pressure is mounting for the Osbornes and Nancy tells Darren she wants her old life back. Meanwhile, OB reveals to Jack that Eva is Billy’s daughter, but Nancy is adamant that they’re going home, despite the danger that awaits.

episodes.name: New Year’s Eve in Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Flashback to sixteen year old Billy and fifteen year old Jack getting ready to hit the town on New Year’s Eve, despite their mother trying to protest. Young Billy and Jack head out to teach someone a lesson, but good-guy Jack is hesitant. In the present day, Jack is gutted when the Osbornes return to Hollyoaks instead of fleeing to Ireland. He leaves a note for them and goes to The Loft, but Eva is there enjoying her New Year’s Eve. What will happen when the pair come face to face?! Meanwhile, Harry is planning to propose to Ste, but his plans are sabotaged when he gets on the wrong side of Prince and Hunter.

episodes.name: #Joel
episodes.overview: Tom is guilt-ridden, and comes up with a plan to help Sally make up for the money Jude stole. Sienna has to hide when Joel comes to the flat, and Ryan tells Mercedes he's being blackmailed.

episodes.name: #SiennasRevenge
episodes.overview: Sienna is being hassled by Joel, but when Warren refuses to let her leave Hollyoaks, she steps up her revenge plan. Diego is desperate to win Myra back.

episodes.name: #SiennasRevenge
episodes.overview: Freddie offers Ellie his new apartment to move into when she decides to leave The Dog. Adam and Jesse are swamped at the salon, and Goldie masquerades as a qualified hairdresser.

episodes.name: #WarrenAndSienna
episodes.overview: Marnie reveals a heart-breaking secret to Ellie. Jesse offers Goldie a job as salon receptionist when she spins him a sob story about needing money for her sons.

episodes.name: #CelineMcQueen
episodes.overview: Scott returns from holiday to find that Diane is back, but Diane and Tony are dressed for a funeral. Diane has brought her niece Lily to stay, but Tony isn't keen on the idea.

episodes.name: #AdamAndJesse
episodes.overview: It's Ste's birthday and he wants to see his kids. Prince and Hunter are angry when Amy bans them from The Bean. Lily catches the eye of another classmate on her first day of school.

episodes.name: #JesseDonovan
episodes.overview: Adam finds out that Liam is keeping secrets about Darcy. Amy is reported to Social Services, but by who? Neeta makes a breakthrough with Lily.

episodes.name: #RyanVsSte
episodes.overview: Liam tells Adam what he knows about Darcy. Nathan plans a private cinema treat for Cleo in the Love Boat, but Lisa spots them together and boils with jealousy.

episodes.name: #SteHay
episodes.overview: Ste finds out about Ryan sleeping around. Lisa confronts Nathan about his cosy night with Cleo. Mercedes is furious when she discovers James Nightingale has an online dating profile.

episodes.name: #HollyoaksHeist
episodes.overview: Lisa wants Nathan to choose between her and Cleo. Someone burgles The Dog, and Lisa and Mac are locked in the cellar. Nathan returns and catches the intruder trying to get into the safe.

episodes.name: #TheDonovans
episodes.overview: Prince engineers things so that he and Lily are paired together for a science project, and Kim is put out over Esther and Grace's relationship. Mac thinks he knows who broke into the pub.

episodes.name: #EvasEscape
episodes.overview: Kim makes a panicked phone call to Grace asking her to get to the hospital. When Grace and Adam arrive, a team of nurses rush to Esther's room. Ellie surprises Marnie at the hospital.

episodes.name: #GraceBlack

episodes.overview: Hollyoaks High is re-opening and Breda has written school application for Harley against her wishes. The WAGs come up with a plan to expose Glenn during the re-opening.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Yazz and Marnie follow Alfie to the hospital and are shocked to see a responsive Mac. Kim is gutted when she isn't released from hospital because Farrah changed her records.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: James and Marnie decide Ellie must not know that Mac is awake before she leaves for her trip. Russ is disturbed by the number of Mercedes' partners who have died.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Russ and Mercedes are due to meet Father Dan regarding their wedding, but Russ thinks his future bride is a serial killer... Alfie accidentally blurts out to Ellie that Mac has woken up.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Russ can't decide what to do about Mercedes. Sylver offers him some advice, putting his own feelings aside. Alfie believes everyone is turning against him.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Auntie Kameela is coming for lunch and Misbah is determined to prove to her that their family isn't a shambles. Cindy has a new and unwelcome house guest, while Breda plays Cupid.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Imran discovers that Yazz has been drugging him with pills for anxiety. Breda tells Mercedes that Sylver is in love with her, while James is horrified to find Mac is back in the village.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Ste makes a heartfelt video pleading for Tony to come home, while Dee Dee doesn't recognise Tegan due to her condition.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Ollie makes an entrance at school with Imran and Brooke. Diane tells Tegan she doesn't have a say in what treatment Dee Dee will be given, so Tegan hires James as her lawyer.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren wants to make Brooke a safe space where she can go when she feels stressed. Imran convinces Ollie not to give up his football dream and Mandy catches them bunking off school.

episodes.overview: Brody and Damon are shocked to find out who now owns The Dog, and Brody decides to organise a fundraiser for Ollie. Nancy and Darren want to see if they can officially foster Brooke.

episodes.name: #OaksLoveAffair
episodes.overview: Luke is contemplating drinking again, and Ollie is furious that he would betray him and break their pact. Brody advises Ollie to support his dad and show him he's not alone.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's the day Luke has been dreading in court. Mandy pleads with Scott to stand up in court and defend Luke. Charlie and Oscar overhear an argument between Nancy and Darren.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren is planning a grand gesture for Nancy. Breda is feeling taken for granted by Leela. It's Sienna's trial; she is released and greeted by Nancy, who needs her help.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Brody is trying his best to woo Liberty again. A reformed Sienna asks Sally if she could be a trainee teacher at Hollyoaks High. Hunter is horrified to find out that Mac is back.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Nancy tells Kyle that she won't stop until she tears Darren and Mandy apart. Romeo and Prince are trying to come up with another money-making scheme, while Hunter confronts Mac.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Romeo freezes when he comes face to face with his dad. Sienna invites Liberty to move in with her. Mac spray paints over Neeta's mural, while Damon receives a visiting order from Buster.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Brody uses Damon's ID to visit Buster in prison; he wants an apology, but Buster once again belittles him. Sienna and Liberty are bonding over nail varnish and boy chat.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Damon discovers that Brody used his identity to visit Buster in prison. Lily knows it was Romeo who broke into James' flat, so she's keen for Romeo to move out.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Brody tells Damon he has a connection with Sienna, but Damon advises him to stay away. Joel is back and reunited with Fiancée Cleo. Donna-Marie needs money fast.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Leela is excited to have Louis back, but he seems to want to get something off his chest. Nana and Goldie are taking over plans as they organise a double wedding for Mecedes and Cleo.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Jack breaks into the workshop in disguise to try and find out what is going on with Sylver and Mercedes. Tegan lets Rose skip school and takes her to the salon for a pamper day.

episodes.name: #DontFilterFeelings
episodes.overview: This World Mental Health Day special episode follows Cleo McQueen's ongoing battle with bulimia in the build-up to her wedding day to Joel.

episodes.name: #DontFilterFeelings
episodes.overview: Louis is struggling to keep his three women secret, and it's awkward with Simone when he and Leela go shopping in Price Slice. Grace fills Glenn in on her plans for their final job.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Grace asks DS Roxy for help in getting rid of Glenn, but she thinks it's a terrible idea. Martine threatens to tell Simone who she has secretly married, but Louis rushes to stop her.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Glenn is out of hospital, and Grace finally puts her plan into action to manipulate Jay into killing Glenn. Meanwhile, Goldie offers to help Jesse plan a party for Glenn's birthday.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: The WAGs are celebrating that Glenn is finally out of their lives, or so they think. Joel pays Father Marcus a visit, and Liam surprises Jesse.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Donna Marie turns up at Prince and Lily's flat asking for money. Marnie decides to take James out for a mother and son bonding day.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's Dee Dee and Rose's birthday. Diane and Tony have bought them both bikes, and Tegan promises to give her daughter the best birthday. Kim decides it's time for her to leave.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Romeo decides to blackmail Harry into giving him some money, and the doctors plan to wake Dee Dee from her coma to see if the seizures have stopped.

episodes.name: #StormHollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's Ste and Harry's wedding day, but Goldie forgot to pass the message on to Mercedes that The Dog is meant to be catering. And James uses Romeo to help him expose his affair with Harry.

episodes.name: #StormHollyoaks
episodes.overview: Romeo professes his love for Lily. Diane tells Tony she still loves him and is willing to give things a second try. Rose refers to Diane as her mum, which devastates Tegan.

episodes.name: #StormHollyoaks
episodes.overview: The violent storm has forced everyone inside and they are camped out at The Dog. But Lily is worried she sees Romeo outside, she sneaks out to check on him when Prince is distracted.

episodes.name: #StormHollyoaks
episodes.overview: The storm causes a dramatic structural collapse, putting several lives in danger, while Mercedes and Goldie are in competition with each other about who can make the best cocktail.

episodes.name: #StormHollyoaks
episodes.overview: Sinead is back and she heads to see Diane and Tony first. It’s Rose’s birthday party and Scott is booked as the entertainment! Misbah tells Imran that they are going to the police.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Ollie receives Buster’s plea hearing letter, and talk to Brody. Sylver sees that the phone Max found in the storm is his, with the text message revealing his one-night stand with Mercedes.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren decides to move out for Ollie’s sake, but after Darren apologises to Ollie, he opens up about the plea hearing. Damon visits Buster in prison and tries to force a confession.

episodes.name: #BreakTheSilence
episodes.overview: It’s Buster’s plea hearing in court, and Damon manages to convince Brody to go along. Sienna is trying to persuade Sally to give her a chance, and breaks into a classroom to teach.

episodes.name: #BreakTheSilence
episodes.overview: Sienna convinces Brody to testify, and he then asks Sienna out to dinner to celebrate. Brooke is trying to cheer Ollie up, but he doesn’t want to be protected and shouts at her.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Liam is still suspicious of the WAGs. Maxine is shocked to find out that Glenn left Minnie £20K. Cleo strikes a deal to eat a meal in the pub if Farrah goes out for a drink without Grace.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren goes against Mandy’s wishes and visits Nancy. Farrah encourages Cleo to eat out, and must keep her end of the deal. Martine tells Louis she’s moving to the village.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: The WAGs call Kim to talk some sense into Maxine. Martine plans to out her cheating husband by ordering flowers to Leela’s house, with a card addressed to "Yogi Bear".

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Leela takes the flowers sent by Martine as condolence for Tegan, and Louis manages to rip up the accompanying card before it’s seen. Liam brings Iona to Courtney, and blackmails her.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Sinead tells Ste and Diane that she is picking Hannah up from the airport. Peri and Harley ditch school for the day. Harley lies about acing her classes.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Russ buys Mercedes a necklace, but Goldie demands to have it. Tom invites Peri to spend the day with Steph, and she realises how much she’s missed out on.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Harley tells Peri that she’s quit school. Jack asks Breda to look after Charlie as part of his plan to woo her. Sinead sets up a meeting for Laurie with Sally at the school.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Lisa Loveday returns to Hollyoaks. Lisa admits that she met a guy in Thailand but things didn't end well. Mercedes questions why Goldie is so miserable at her pre-wedding festivities.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Russ loses his temper with Max. Jack's excited about his date, but Breda tells Sylver she's too busy for romance. Courtney meets with social services about Iona.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Breda and Jack have an awkward meeting. Courtney fights with Jesse about him pretending to be her boyfriend to social services.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's Mercedes and Russ's wedding day. Mercedes reminisces about her failed marriages. Liam receives a delivery of poison labelled 'karma', and has Grace tied up in the office.

episodes.name: #KillerMcQueen
episodes.overview: Lily wants to spend the day with Prince, but he keeps rushing off. Meanwhile, Damon decides to steal some cocktail recipes from The Loft, and Louis is playing family peacemaker.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's Lily's 18th birthday, and Prince seems to have forgotten. Mac tells Marnie to come along to Alfie's psychological assessment, against Alfie's wishes.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Donna Marie's daughter Juliet is joining Hollyoaks High. Damon tries to play matchmaker with Sienna and Brody, while James is organising a networking event at The Hutch.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: James vows to be a better dad than Mac could ever be. Louis asks Prince what's wrong, and Prince opens up about how terrified he is about the lump he has.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Simone helps Leela as she breaks down ahead of Tegan's funeral. Misbah is worrying about the repercussions of Ste's murder accusations, while James buys Romeo a new pair of shoes.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's the day of Tegan's funeral, but Ste has war on his mind. Donna Marie strikes a deal with Monster Mac - could it be her family's ticket to happiness?

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Tony is far from impressed that Diane has invited Sinead, Laurie and Hannah to live in their flat. As Ste prepares for Careers Fair at Hollyoaks High, he checks out a mysterious noise...

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's Careers Fair at the school, and Simone and Louis sneak off to Sally's office for some forbidden fun. Will they get away with it? Yazz has a shocking confession to make.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Sinead is convinced Laurie is cheating, and decides to get payback by causing chaos. Ste is determined to get the justice he deserves.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren has filed for full custody, and Kyle helps Nancy by hiring an old friend as her lawyer. The custody war begins...

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Cindy's back, and is horrified to discover her house has been taken over by Donna-Marie. Laurie is given a second chance job interview, but his dark past may interfere with his future.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren and Nancy continue their custody battle, but Mandy is suddenly rushed to hospital. Marnie and Cindy plot to get Donna-Marie out, but get a nasty surprise while looking for evidence.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Sienna loses control in the classroom, but luckily Laurie saves the day. Cindy plans to get rid of Donna-Marie once and for all, and Nancy gives Mandy a second chance.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Farrah decides it's time Misbah and Grace got to know each other. All is going well until Misbah finds a deadly weapon. Nancy tries her hardest to convince Kyle to stick around.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Cindy starts to think Dirk is haunting her, as Mac continues his mind games. Grace tries to convince Misbah that her gangster days are over, and Glenn's will leaves the family shocked.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Prince has an ultrasound appointment but lies to Lily about his whereabouts. Liam is furious when Lisa does a pickup for him but buys a crate of dodgy vodka instead of the arranged deal.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Lily gets upset because she can't understand why Prince has been acting up recently. Romeo tells Lily that Prince is having an affair, and when she confronts him there's a huge argument.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Prince goes into hospital for his operation. Liam worries that he'll have to sell the salon after Jamie demands her money back for the dodgy vodka.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: While Grace is busy playing a game of roulette, Lisa tries to steal money from the safe to pay Jamie for Jesse's freedom. Brody finds out that the police are dropping his case.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Brody is told to try and appeal the decision so he can finally close his case. After drowning his sorrows, he gets into a fight with Damon.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Sinead pitches an idea for the nativity play. Ste plays nice with Yazz, but secretly seeks revenge, and Mandy finally tells Darren the truth about the baby.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Juliet gets kicked off the school play after destroying the set decorations, so Donna-Marie resorts to blackmail to get her daughter back on stage. Mandy visits an old friend.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaksmas
episodes.overview: Hollyoaks High puts on a nativity play with a twist: female empowerment! It's a huge hit, until Donna-Marie takes centre stage. Mandy is unsure whether she can be honest with Darren.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaksmas
episodes.overview: In an attempt to save Christmas, Breda and Goldie beg Sylver to sweet-talk Mercedes into getting them invited to Christmas Day dinner. Ollie starts to feel like a burden on the family.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaksmas
episodes.overview: In an hour-long special festive episode, the McQueens cause chaos on Christmas Day at The Dog, and more is revealed about Breda's past. Grace forces Liam to celebrate with his family.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaksmas
episodes.overview: Leela is very excited to be about to marry Louis, but it seems Louis still has his ex-wife Simone on his mind. Meanwhile, Yazz causes trouble for Ste.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaksmas
episodes.overview: It's Louis and Leela's wedding day in this hour-long special episode, and Louis's secrets start to unravel for all to see...

episodes.name: #HollyoaksNYE
episodes.overview: In this New Year special episode, Maxine, Sienna and Liberty get the party started at The Dog, and Simone and Martine's father Walter pays his daughters a visit.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Harry returns, on a mission to win back former fling James. Romeo wants to expose Mac as the liar he really is.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: The Dog is in hot water with the police, which could spell trouble for Liam. Romeo causes chaos for Yazz.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren convinces Ollie to get back into football, and a professional footballer approaches him with a difficult proposition. Plus, Imran comes home.

episodes.name: #BreakTheSilence
episodes.overview: It's the first day of Buster's trial as he faces prison for claims of sexual assault. Ollie should be getting ready to testify, but he's nowhere to be found...

episodes.name: #BreakTheSilence
episodes.overview: Luke is escorted to the stand by the police, but his anger gets the better of him. Ollie and Brody have to relive their traumatic experiences as they give their testimonies.

episodes.name: #BreakTheSilence
episodes.overview: It's Damon's turn to testify, but will he be able to keep up his lie? Laurie becomes overly friendly with Sienna.

episodes.name: #BreakTheSilence
episodes.overview: Imran makes a shocking confession to his family. Sienna confronts Laurie, and Brody believes his best friend has turned against him.

episodes.name: #BreakTheSilence
episodes.overview: It's time for the closing arguments in Buster's trial, with Brody and Ollie poised to discover whether justice will be served. Have they done enough to send him down?

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Imran tries to win back ex-girlfriend Brooke, but little does he know she fancies his best friend. Goldie has a crush on a priest, and Mercedes parties with bad boy Liam.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Mercedes is nowhere to be found after a wild night out. Lisa decides to tell Liam how she really feels. There's a horrible surprise in store when a mysterious robber breaks in to The Loft.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Grace and Lisa go on a hunt to find the hooded bandit. Louis wants to write a letter to his true love, and Mercedes conceals her hangover as she spends time with Sylver.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Louis has a realisation that makes his situation a lot more threatening. Ollie and Brooke scrape up all their money for a slap up meal in The Hutch, but their date doesn't go to plan.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Louis desperately tries to escape. Mercedes has some grovelling to do to prove to her family that her wild antics with Liam are over. Sinead looks through Jonny's wallet.

episodes.name: #KillerMcQueen
episodes.overview: It's Breda's birthday, but she has more important matters to attend to as her hostage Louis is getting restless. Ste has to face his demons in the form of his stepdad Te

episodes.name: #KillerMcQueen
episodes.overview: Simone is on the warpath as she turns up at Breda's pig farm, while Simone's lover Louis, who is gagged and restrained inside, manages to break free.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: James crashes Harry's blind date to confess his love, which inspires his son Romeo to follow his heart too. Terry hatches an evil plan that may put his stepson Ste in danger.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Ste agrees to help Terry, if it means that Terry will leave town for good. Romeo and Lily rekindle their romance. And Alfie is offered an internship in Washington DC.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Scott gets fired in the aftermath of Terry's plan. Alfie makes Yazz an offer she can't refuse - to go to Washington DC with him, while Sienna gets the wrong end of the stick.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Terry makes Ste's life hell, but luckily Jonny is by his side. Sienna needs to prove to Laurie she's worth trusting, and Romeo plans to make a shocking confession to James.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Yazz and Alfie tell their families about their future plans. Mac is on a mission to stop Alfie pursuing his dreams. Sienna's frustration with Laurie forces her to take drastic action.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren catches ex-wife Nancy in a compromising situation with her new lover. Donna-Marie reveals the truth for all to hear, and Yazz, while feeling second best, makes a drastic decision.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Cindy is back and ready to reclaim her house. Donna-Marie gives Mac some life-changing news, while Laurie, Sienna, Sinead and Brody go on a double date.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: It's Juliet's birthday, which ends in tears. Sinead is determined not to let Sienna steal her husband. Scott discovers the identity of Nancy's new man, while Cindy asks Tony for help.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Mandy and Darren face a big decision about their unborn baby, Mac has a proposition for Sami, while Juliet sparks an inappropriate new crush.

episodes.name: #CelebrateDifference
episodes.overview: Nancy organises a disability awareness day at The Bean. Oscar gets stage fright before his big performance, but Brooke is on hand to reassure him. Mandy has a confession to make.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Donna-Marie sets her sights on a new client, Martine convinces Lisa to stand up for herself, and Brooke gets the wrong end of the stick and confronts Juliet.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Juliet will stop at nothing to try and get her crush to reciprocate her feelings, even if that means destroying a family. Lisa is let down, while Joel tries to talk sense into Mercedes.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: There are two new arrivals in the village. Liam loses his cool when his car is stolen, and Juliet applies for a job in the hopes it will lead to romance with her crush.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Liam accuses someone of being Michael, the mysterious person who has been terrorising him for weeks, unaware that his true tormentor is trainee priest Joel.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Liam shows his vulnerability to Mercedes, but later a fight breaks out and someone gets shot. It's Sinead and Laurie's anniversary, but Sinead is convinced he's having an affair.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: There's a desperate situation for one family as the gunshot victim is revealed. Cleo is asked on a date, and Sinead, Laurie, Sienna and Brody play a game of truth or dare.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Liberty discovers a surprising secret from Sami's past. The McQueen family do all they can to get Bobby in to private school.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: One village resident turns to God for help. Sinead is desperate to find proof that her husband is cheating, so she breaks in to his office.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Hollyoaks High is hosting an 'inspiration' fundraising ball. Everyone dresses up as iconic and inspirational people, but one resident crashes the party and reveals a huge secret in public.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Liberty takes centre stage to save the fundraising ball from being a disaster, but she freezes under pressure. Misbah discovers a shocking meme has been posted on social media about her.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Ste continues to taunt the Maaliks, but did he post the meme of 'killer doctor' Misbah? Tom has a confession to make to Peri, and Damon decides to splash the cash on a new venture.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Tony tries to talk Ste out of his vendetta against the Maaliks. Brody isn't too happy with Damon once he finds out what all their money was spent on, and Mac treats Donna-Marie and Juliet.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Cindy tries to help Donna-Marie get out of Mac's life, but her kind gesture backfires. Maxine is in hospital after collapsing, and Damon is shocked to discover what might be wrong.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Breda tries to stop Sylver from reuniting with his birth mother. Romeo organises an intervention for Juliet, hoping to convince her how evil Mac is, and Damon makes a big gesture to Maxine.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Diane tries to reunite Lily with an old friend. Breda is blackmailed over her murderous ways. Cleo has her first date with Mitchell.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: The McQueens declare war on the Deverauxs, which may cause problems with Cleo and Mitchell's budding romance. Sylver meets his biological mother, but it doesn't go as well as he'd hoped.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Breda tells Sylver all the tragedies of his past, but is it the truth? Darren and Mandy are back from London after her operation, so Juliet pays her crush a visit.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Mandy desperately tries to get in contact with Darren after she feels sharp pains in her stomach, but Juliet has turned his phone to silent. And Breda has a change of heart.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Darren has no idea that he is Juliet's forbidden crush, but that doesn't stop her telling Brooke all about their love. Romeo takes drastic measures to prove a point to Lily.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Brooke is determined to put a stop to Juliet's forbidden love for Darren. Tom asks Tony for some love advice, Myra suggests a double McQueen wedding, and Prince returns to the village.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Prince is determined to win his wife back, but will he find out about her affair with Romeo? Mercedes and Myra have their hen do, while Harley and Tom plan a coming out party.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Lily has to make a big decision on whether to stay with her husband, or start a new life with Romeo. Liam sabotages Mercedes' hen do by convincing Sylver that his bride-to-be is on drugs.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Peri has a shocking confession to make to her lovers Harley and Tom. Sylver is finding it difficult to trust his fiancée, and his anger takes over. Lily struggles to stop harming herself.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Liam does Mercedes a favour, but what does he want in return? Tony has a confession to make to the Maaliks, while cracks appear in Sally and Myra's wedding plans.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Peri invites the Maaliks around for dinner, which doesn't go as planned. Myra is having second thoughts about marrying Sally. Jonny and Stuart's true intentions with Ste become clearer.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Ste is on a path of destruction, but can Jonny stop him from making a huge mistake? Sami's Auntie Kameela takes a shine to Liberty and invites her to dinner without telling Sami.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: This special episode follows the Maaliks having a traditional Indian meal, while Ste is introduced to a group of friends, unaware that they all have far-right extremist views.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Mac is trying his best to bond with his daughter Juliet, but James keeps getting in the way, leaving Mac more determined than ever to rid himself of James for good.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Sylver receives a mysterious gift while celebrating his first birthday since being let out of prison. Breda breaks in to the Cunninghams' house, Lily makes a decision about her marriage.

episodes.name: #Hollyoaks
episodes.overview: Breda has come to a decision about Mac's proposition. Prince wants to help Lily, even if she's resistant, and Damon surprises Maxine, but she is confused by the gesture.

episodes.name: #KillerMcQueen

After witnessing a furious look in Bobby's eye as he watches Mercedes and Felix pack on the PDA, John Paul is forced to warn Felix to keep things lowkey.
